name: Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn, U.S. Army (ret)
subject: Court Martial Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORNICELLI FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60512344:Js3x99oZN:m:1:3317145305:103CDFC0BA571CA8D528C55239014DB6:r "Lt. Gen.
Michael Flynn") Peter: Let me be crystal clear, if Joe Biden was one of my subordinates, I would immediately relieve him of command and court-martial him. We've gone beyond just weak leadership, bad leadership, or even failed leadership. No, what Biden has done to this country is tantamount to criminal negligence. **[That's why I need your help to get my friend and American First conservative Captain Robert Cornicelli elected to Congress with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today. With Rob in Washington we'll be able to save our country from Grandpa Joe.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60512344:Js3x99oZN:m:1:3317145305:103CDFC0BA571CA8D528C55239014DB6:r "That’s why I need your help to get my friend and American
First conservative Captain Robert Cornicelli elected to Congress with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today. With Rob in Washington we’ll be
able to save our country from Grandpa Joe.")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60512344:Js3x99oZN:m:1:3317145305:103CDFC0BA571CA8D528C55239014DB6:r "CPT Robert
M. Cornicelli")Robert is exactly the leader we need in Congress to fight Pelosi, Biden, and The Squad. He served alongside America's bravest men and women for over 20 years in the U.S. Navy and later in the U.S. Army National Guard. I've got a special place in my heart for candidates like Robert who bravely served in the military. That's because Robert understands what it means to fight for freedom and support our brave men and women who put on the uniform to protect our country from enemies foreign and domestic. **[If we're going to stop Grandpa Joe from further damaging our homeland, then it's imperative we get men like Robert in Congress to fight back again Biden's dangerous policies. But that's only going to happen if you step up and donate $50, $100, or $250 to help Robert win his election.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60512344:Js3x99oZN:m:1:3317145305:103CDFC0BA571CA8D528C55239014DB6:r "If we’re going to stop
Grandpa Joe from further damaging our homeland, then it’s imperative we get men like Robert in Congress to fight back again Biden’s
dangerous policies. But that’s only going to happen if you step up and donate $50, $100, or $250 to help Robert win his election.")** Biden and his negligent leadership are pushing America into third-world status. How in God's name can a country as prosperous as ours be out of baby formula in almost half of the country? [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60512344:Js3x99oZN:m:1:3317145305:103CDFC0BA571CA8D528C55239014DB6:r "Video")These aren't gaffes, but intentional malfeasance to bring about radical Leftist change in our country. That's why it's imperative we get Robert elected to Congress to have any hope of finally stopping Biden's march into destruction. There's only one way to stop Biden and Pelosi and that's to take back Congress. Not just with those candidates who happen to have an "R" next to their name, but flag saluting, America First conservatives like Robert Cornicelli. Are you ready to battle for the heart of our country? **[If so, then it's time to get on the front lines with your donation of $100, $500, or $1,000 today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60512344:Js3x99oZN:m:1:3317145305:103CDFC0BA571CA8D528C55239014DB6:r "If so, then it’s time to get on the front
lines with your donation of $100, $500, or $1,000 today.")** Help me elect Captain Robert Cornicelli and finally stop Biden's destructive leadership that's pulling our country apart. **[Donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60512344:Js3x99oZN:m:1:3317145305:103CDFC0BA571CA8D528C55239014DB6:r "Donate
today.")** Welcome to the fight, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60512344:Js3x99oZN:m:1:3317145305:103CDFC0BA571CA8D528C55239014DB6:r "Lt. Gen.
Michael Flynn") Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn, U.S. Army (ret)
Former National Security Advisor

subject: Will you endorse Democrat Ruben Ramirez for Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ruben Ramirez for Congress
body:

subject: The final countdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=5e5489298a&e=f9133ea432)
---
|
Hi ,
As Primary Day approaches, I want to make it really simple for you:

A vote for me is a vote for making California affordable.

A vote for me is a vote for safer communities.

A vote for me is a vote to lower gas prices.

A vote for me is a vote to solve California’s water shortage.

A vote for me is a vote to properly steward our natural resources to mitigate devastating wildfires.

A vote for me is a vote for finding real solutions to the homelessness crisis.

A vote for me is a vote to keep your business in business.

A vote for me is a vote to transform our schools into the best in the nation.

A vote for me is a vote for bringing back integrity and transparency to Sacramento.

A vote for me is a vote for restoring the California Dream.

And this is the important part - I have the record to prove it.

My work in the Legislature speaks for itself, and when I bring my record to the Office of the Governor, California will truly change for the better.

[Come Tuesday, here is where you can find voting centers.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=e351b983aa&e=f9133ea432)

Thank you for your continued support!

\- Senator Brian Dahle

clean_body: | | | | Hi , As Primary Day approaches, I want to make it really simple for you: A vote for me is a vote for making California affordable. A vote for me is a vote for safer communities. A vote for me is a vote to lower gas prices. A vote for me is a vote to solve California’s water shortage. A vote for me is a vote to properly steward our natural resources to mitigate devastating wildfires. A vote for me is a vote for finding real solutions to the homelessness crisis. A vote for me is a vote to keep your business in business. A vote for me is a vote to transform our schools into the best in the nation. A vote for me is a vote for bringing back integrity and transparency to Sacramento. A vote for me is a vote for restoring the California Dream. And this is the important part - I have the record to prove it. My work in the Legislature speaks for itself, and when I bring my record to the Office of the Governor, California will truly change for the better. Thank you for your continued support! \- Senator Brian Dahle | | | | At Brian Dahle For Governor, we are strongly committed to protecting your privacy and providing a safe online experience for all of our visitors while offering a high-quality user experience here at . We know that you care about how the information you provide to us is used and shared. We have developed this Privacy Policy to inform you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of Information we receive from users of the Website. Brian Dahle For Governor owns & operates the Website. This Privacy Policy, along with our Term & Conditions, governs your use of this site. By using , or by accepting the Terms of Use (via opt-in, checkbox, pop-up, or clicking an email link confirming the same), you agree to be bound by our terms and this Privacy Policy. If you have provided personal, billing or other voluntarily provided information, you may access, review and make changes to it via instructions found on the Website or by emailing us at team@briandahle.com. To manage your receipt of marketing and non-transactional communications, you may unsubscribe by clicking the “unsubscribe” link located on the bottom of any related email from the Company. Emails related to the purchase or delivery of orders are provided automatically – Customers are not able to opt out of transactional emails. We will try to accommodate any requests related to the management of Personal Information in a timely manner. name: Peter Franchot
subject: A Make-or-Break Deadline for Our Team
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
As I continue to meet with Marylanders on the campaign trail, I’m often met with a similar refrain, whether I’m visiting a small local business, a city park, or a neighborhood main street: “We know you. We trust you. We’re with you.”
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603?amount=20.22]
As the Local Candidate for Governor, the people of Maryland know me, and I know them. I can’t wait to bring my trusted brand of proven, honest leadership to the Governor’s Office – so that we can make sure state government once again delivers the concrete results and bold solutions that we need now more than ever.
In case you don’t know, we are rapidly approaching a make-or-break fundraising deadline for our campaign. June 7 is the deadline ahead of our next Campaign Finance Report for the State of Maryland – and we need to do everything we can to make sure our fundraising numbers once again dominate the rest of the field. Will you chip in to help us reach our $20,000 fundraising goal by June 7?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603]
Thanks to our incredible supporters, we announced the largest Cash on Hand of any gubernatorial candidate when we published our last major report back in January. What was even more impressive about that number is that the overwhelming majority of our donations came from right here within the state of Maryland. We were the ONLY campaign with that distinction, and I am so proud of the local grassroots coalition we continue to build.
With your help, we’re going to deliver the concrete results that our families deserve. From combating the student debt crisis, to making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, to building a world-class public transit system, to leveling the playing field for Black Marylanders, we’re going to lift our communities into a higher quality of life in the years to come.
Enough talk – let’s get it done! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0603?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Councilman JB Smiley, Jr. - Democratic Candidate for Governor of Tennessee
subject: Trump to visit my hometown - I'm standing against it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn]
Hi Friend,
The former President is flying into the airport in my hometown of Memphis, Tennessee. There are billboards up and down the streets and highways stating that "Memphis Loves Trump". This is another one of the lies the former president is attempting to sell. To make matters worse, when he travels to cities, he uses the local police force to bolster his detail, but stiffs them when it comes time to pay. Read the full article here [https://www.newsweek.com/14-us-cities-still-waiting-trump-campaign-pay-nearly-2m-police-public-safety-bills-1525583] .
I'm not sitting on the sidelines and allowing our taxpayer dollars to be stolen by the former President. I'm standing up for the people who have elected me to represent them. It is not a prudent use of taxpayer dollars to follow the former president to another state knowing he will not pay his bill. I have sponsored a resolution to stop our police force from escorting the former President to the neighboring state. Watch one of the news story here [https://www.actionnews5.com/2022/06/02/memphis-city-councilmen-raise-concerns-about-trump-visit-security/] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abettertn]
I am standing up to Trump, but I need your help to stand up to Trump's endorsed minion, Bill Lee. We can return Bill Lee to life as a private citizen just like we did his boss. Chip in today so we can make Tennessee Trump-free.

body:

| Peter \-

| Every single member of the America First movement needs to come together to make June our strongest month yet this year.
Why is that? Because with the fundraising quarter ending on June 30, the D.C. Swamp Establishment is chomping at the bit to make this the time when their lobbyists and PACs overpower our grassroots conservative mission.
The Woketopians can't stand that we're poised to deliver a crushing blow to their agenda in November. So of course they're pulling out all the stops to desperately cling to power!
Well now is the time when we need to make it clear once and for all that their time forcing their globalist, America Last schemes down our throats is OVER.
In fact, this month just might have to be MAGA's strongest showing EVER if we're going to outlast these radicals and their powerful allies!
So I'm calling for every Trump supporter to take action to start the month on a high note.
There's no time to waste.
We are the one thing standing in the way of this administration and the rest of the Deep State permanently reshaping our America. I hope you'll help us get ready for the fight.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | | Peter \- | Every single member of the America First movement needs to come together to make June our strongest month yet this year. Why is that? Because with the fundraising quarter ending on June 30, the D.C. Swamp Establishment is chomping at the bit to make this the time when their lobbyists and PACs overpower our grassroots conservative mission. The Woketopians can't stand that we're poised to deliver a crushing blow to their agenda in November. So of course they're pulling out all the stops to desperately cling to power! Well now is the time when we need to make it clear once and for all that their time forcing their globalist, America Last schemes down our throats is OVER. In fact, this month just might have to be MAGA's strongest showing EVER if we're going to outlast these radicals and their powerful allies! So I'm calling for every Trump supporter to take action to start the month on a high note. There's no time to waste. We are the one thing standing in the way of this administration and the rest of the Deep State permanently reshaping our America. I hope you'll help us get ready for the fight. name: Maggie Hassan HQ
subject: 1,017 votes saved the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
1,017 votes saved health care for millions.
| | |
---
Hey team, we wanted to share a story with you:

In 2016, Maggie Hassan won her race in New Hampshire by just 1,017 votes – the tightest Senate race that year. We knew that her win was impactful, flipping NH from red to blue, but that became even clearer in 2017:

In 2017, the Senate voted on whether to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which provides health care to millions of Americans. The decision came down to just one vote – and Maggie Hassan was proud to cast her vote in favor of saving the ACA.

If Maggie had lost her election in 2016, a Republican would have been in her seat and millions of Americans would have lost their health care coverage.

**1,017 votes saved health care for millions. **

**Look, we have no doubt that Maggie's race will be close again this year. And with important issues like access to abortion, commonsense gun safety, and voting rights on the ballot, it's critical we keep Maggie's voice in the Senate.**
**[So please, will you rush a gift of $3 to secure Maggie's critical seat and protect health care for millions of Americans for years to come?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46073808/348722700/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk977-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTk4ZDI4OS00ZWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQugAY58cUExSL-TGhLEmdjiNBs8RvkQYnlFszxHMhw=)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The attacks have just escalated
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513290:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)

---
Peter,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. **[Without your support, winning will be much more difficult.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513290:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)**

[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $2 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513291:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)
[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $4 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513292:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)
Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - _I know what it's like to be in the big leagues._

Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me.

If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, **[then please consider helping us spread the message today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513290:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)**

[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $6 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513293:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)
[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $8 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513294:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)
Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, **[not a dog and pony show.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513290:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513290:JhRRX9oNq:m:1:3253819041:B0B64BE9968D80B81F3F467EBEF57C93:r)

clean_body: | Peter, Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia. Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination. That very night, Democrats officially began their barrage of attacks against me. We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues. This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track. Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - total spending will likely exceed $200 million. As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden. Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - I know what it's like to be in the big leagues. Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me. If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. On top of that, he voted AGAINST codifying abortion protections in New Jersey and AGAINST restoring funding for reproductive care clinics — and in 2017, he received an A+ rating from the NRA. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much! Brooke * | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district — which experts say could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. = = Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. **_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |
---
Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | [ Hello -- you are [1] of [28] Democrats from Cresco selected to participate in our Pres. Biden Approval Poll. We’re concerned that voters are starting to fall for Republicans’ attacks. We need to know whether you still support Biden. Your response is required by 11:59 PM for statistical purposes. ]() | | | Thanks for letting us know, \--Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? | | Hi,

In four days, New Jersey voters will head to the polls and cast their ballots in the primary election.

This primary is my first big test of the cycle. My race is **_absolutely key_** to holding the House majority — it’s vital that we have a strong showing of support on Tuesday to show my extremist opponents the true power of our bipartisan movement.

I’m extremely proud of my bipartisan record in Congress. I’ve fought hard to bring more resources and jobs to our state, and I’ve won. But now, **_the NRCC is pouring millions of dollars into this race to defeat me and tarnish my record._**

I’m facing multiple opponents in a district that Governor Phil Murphy won by _fewer than one point_. The _only_ way I can get through this challenge is with an outpouring of support from our strong bipartisan movement — that’s where you come in.

[This is our time to show what our bipartisan movement is made of. We need to show the power of our movement and fight back against the NRCC’s massive money machine. name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: First in Tallahassee, now in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Team —
Gun violence prevention has always been an important issue to me, and after my community experienced a school shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School, I made stopping gun violence my life’s mission.
As a State Representative, I fought to pass the most comprehensive gun violence prevention, mental health, and school safety bill in Florida history, and I will continue fighting to get it done at the federal level.
I’ve been proud to work alongside my friend Fred Guttenberg and other family members of those murdered at MSD to do everything we can to stop gun violence and keep schools safe. Moms Demand Action has awarded me the Gun Sense Candidate Distinction because they know how deeply I care about this issue.
On National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I’m proud to continue the legacy of Congressman Ted Deutch, who is fighting for critical legislation in the wake of Uvalde:
https://jaredforflorida.com/ [https://jaredforflorida.com/]
This legislation is partially based on the bill I championed in Florida.
If passed, the new federal legislation would raise the minimum age to purchase a semi-automatic weapon from 18 to 21, regulate high-capacity magazines, regulate the sale of “ghost guns,” and more.
I’m proud to stand with Congressman Deutch in this fight, and I’m more than ready to continue his leadership on gun violence prevention as your next Congressman — just like I did in Tallahassee as a State Representative.
Team, real reforms that will save lives and keep our communities safe require us all to fight together, and on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I hope you will join me in that fight.
I’ve already proven that no matter how much power Republicans may hold, Democrats can pass legislation to prevent gun violence. And I’m ready to do it again.
Thank you,
Jared
Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

body:
If I don't have the resources to reach Floridians, it could stall my momentum – just as The Miami Times is reporting that I'm closing the gap
| | |
---
Marco Rubio just unleashed a new attack ad in his campaign to defeat me, and it is a total distortion of who I am and what I stand for.

Unfortunately, Republican ads have a habit of resonating with the same voters I need to win. **And if I don't have the resources to reach more Floridians, it could stall my momentum – just as The Miami Times is reporting that I'm closing the gap. **

With polling already showing me just a few points behind Rubio, I cannot afford to miss my midnight fundraising goal. My team pulled your supporter record, so please take a look at where things stand:

**Senate control is on the line – and I can't win this race alone. body:
Maryland has one of the best chances in the country to flip a governor’s seat from red to blue.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46075765/348731109/-1166286532?source=email-ngp-20220603-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220603-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220603&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=136bbe21-54e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzZiYmUyMS01NGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JzAUxnmhcKrIg7STRxyiHjzJWyvrN14Mq0NW2Q5FQZY=) | Peter, we wanted to catch you before you log off for the weekend. Our fundraising deadline is coming up, and we need your help to reach our goal in time and set us up for a successful rest of the primary campaign. | | [DONATE HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46075767/348731110/-1166286532?source=email-ngp-20220603-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220603-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220603&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=136bbe21-54e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzZiYmUyMS01NGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JzAUxnmhcKrIg7STRxyiHjzJWyvrN14Mq0NW2Q5FQZY=)
---
This deadline is crucial to our campaign. If we don’t hit our goal, we won’t be prepared to level up and continue our momentum.
**Everything is on the line, from prioritizing racial justice and public safety, building a green economy that works for every family, and building a coalition of educators, parents, and students committed to building world-class public schools in every corner of the state.**
Maryland will be one of Democrats’ best chances in the country to flip a governor’s seat from red to blue, but we can’t take anything for granted. Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate has a real shot at winning the Republican primary, and if he does John is the only candidate in this race with the widespread support to beat him.
With your support fueling us, we can position John and our campaign to crush this deadline and continue spreading our message of progress far and wide.
[_**If you can, will you consider contributing to our campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46075768/348731111/-1166286532?source=email-ngp-20220603-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220603-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220603&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=136bbe21-54e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzZiYmUyMS01NGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JzAUxnmhcKrIg7STRxyiHjzJWyvrN14Mq0NW2Q5FQZY=) Every dollar makes a difference in a race this close.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

clean_body: Maryland has one of the best chances in the country to flip a governor’s seat from red to blue. = | Peter, we wanted to catch you before you log off for the weekend. Our fundraising deadline is coming up, and we need your help to reach our goal in time and set us up for a successful rest of the primary campaign. | | = This deadline is crucial to our campaign. If we don’t hit our goal, we won’t be prepared to level up and continue our momentum. Everything is on the line, from prioritizing racial justice and public safety, building a green economy that works for every family, and building a coalition of educators, parents, and students committed to building world-class public schools in every corner of the state. Maryland will be one of Democrats’ best chances in the country to flip a governor’s seat from red to blue, but we can’t take anything for granted. Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate has a real shot at winning the Republican primary, and if he does John is the only candidate in this race with the widespread support to beat him. With your support fueling us, we can position John and our campaign to crush this deadline and continue spreading our message of progress far and wide. = Every dollar makes a difference in a race this close. Hey Team,
You have probably heard us say that Maggie’s leadership has made New Mexico a national example for free and fair elections. Over this past week, I have seen so many examples of this that I just had to share it with you.

Maggie joined a bipartisan panel at the George W. Bush Presidential Center to discuss New Mexico's success delivering free, fair, and secure elections and the ongoing risks to Election Administration. She attended a Voter Protection Rally alongside Democratic Party of New Mexico officers, DNC voter protection officers, and county clerks to uphold the safety of our elections. Her office worked to ensure those displaced by fires could still make their voices heard.
[**_Actions like this are the reason I do this job. New Mexico needs a strong leader like Maggie making sure our election system works for all of us. With $2,351 left to raise before our primary election, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to make sure our campaign is ready to take on our anti-democracy opponent?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46076485/348735553/-532505380?refcode=EM_F_220602Primary2_E_DM_90DO180DC_6_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDYwYzkzOS01NmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYnPJCDvOjhSrQUCO6MEx-ZpoqJyhzTsjSQi99Bb6gg=)

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: There are no words, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I can't fathom the pain of dropping your child off at school – only to never be able to pick them up
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46077539/348739172/-1540418300?code=jtk1298-su-nd&refcode=jtk1298-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY1NzVlZC01NmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCXuoxXzASqgFyAEoXf9i2bre42po0uOzjD0SGMutzc=)
---
Peter,

There are truly no words to describe the **heartbreaking** tragedy in Uvalde, Texas.
I cannot fathom the pain of dropping your child off at elementary school – only to be told hours later that you will never pick them up, never hug them again, because they were gunned down by an active shooter.
Too many families have experienced the grief of losing a loved one to gun violence. That's why I signed commonsense gun safety policies into law in New Mexico, including a law that requires background checks for every person who purchases a weapon.
We lost 21 precious lives last week – and while no amount of thoughts and prayers can bring these children and teachers back to their families, there is one thing we can do: t _urn our grief into action._
**It's time for the U.S. to put an end to our gun violence epidemic. The first federal policy we need to pass is a universal background check on every single person who buys a gun – because we cannot let a weapon into dangerous hands again.**
_If you're with me, will you please respond to this one simple question before midnight? _
| | **Should the U.S. require background checks for all gun owners?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46077540/348739174/-1187746180?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1298-su-nd&refcode=jtk1298-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY1NzVlZC01NmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCXuoxXzASqgFyAEoXf9i2bre42po0uOzjD0SGMutzc=&emci=98c91d52-e5e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=796575ed-56e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24265352)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46077541/348739175/-1187746180?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1298-su-nd&refcode=jtk1298-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY1NzVlZC01NmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCXuoxXzASqgFyAEoXf9i2bre42po0uOzjD0SGMutzc=&emci=98c91d52-e5e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=796575ed-56e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24265352)
---
My heart goes out to all families who have been impacted by our country's gun violence epidemic.

Thank you for your advocacy,

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sfqyJbcdG0CqssOMlyXdkQ2?unsubscribedata=jgAJnm1HmRvLiST9SZzRiJF6uikzA%2ByH3ReK6rTdD1OUsNbMAhK9cpYbh4QvIPV9kEAAz6xnVM%2FEYek9yBRaVVvK%2BfNiXMPA%2FKTGqSYnKqhVE1TgIXK%2BJi%2FB4Lecd8gsSofBDwUnRzuM4eV%2Fr18wUVft%2FY3Q2ue9snrDtd3iDTZ1mj8b4Es81Yeh35%2BForMjDUjHMiKNxz0n2WpDFR8PPppXKergYnya%2BVWeW6kC53rj2aL%2BWcDLElUSZ6cnh4DlEhDqHQkD9coDy9hFoRYFBBmVvFOq1H%2FoFtjw6ez0fcaW30S0zvb8bpyAwyGBaxEbVQwZpbtteliUfN5UIGHnYhTR9CWLSl%2B0Q2kK982Qiy83D1Lc%2Bct9qHJNf3VnXCKFysj7c4lBz%2FfnwEJxnFAeGcf3yb19u%2FL%2FkB6GGLbEK5fT4A2GIiWnY%2B%2Fzxjk9K%2FEm) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: John Fetterman can win in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
CNN is calling Pennsylvania’s open Senate seat the most likely to flip in November — and while the Republican primary is still too close to call, we know John will be facing a far-right Republican pandering to Trump in November.

Please, friend, John can win this crucial pickup opportunity and save our Democratic majority, but not without a surge of grassroots support: Will you donate split between John Fetterman's campaign and mine — to flip Pennsylvania blue and defend the Senate for Democrats?

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between John Fetterman and Kirsten Gillibrand:

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fetterman?refcode=jtk3481-bu-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

There's no question the grassroots momentum is behind John. He's ahead in every public poll so far — and if he flips this seat blue, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold the Senate.

Pennsylvania had been named the most expensive race in the country — with millions of dollars flooding into the state from GOP super PACs. And Donald Trump himself has been campaigning in the state, holding a massive MAGA rally to rile up his base.

With so much at stake, from our most fundamental rights to our very democracy, there is zero room for error. That's why I'm asking you directly: Donate now to help John reach his $25,000 goal before midnight so he can fight back against the GOP's massive spending and flip this seat blue.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fetterman?refcode=jtk3481-bu-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Caitlin Handerhan
subject: It’s Pride Month, Derek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Here at Team Deluzio, we want to wish a very happy Pride Month to the LGBTQ+ community throughout Beaver and Allegheny Counties.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46078087/348741696/1383944506?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.03_b1_ch_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGZjNTM2Ni01OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2-SC2knAZjA3NP3qVLxmwiNYBGJLVLROSlGckNjZ8k=) Happy Pride Month, Derek!

Here at Team Deluzio, we want to wish a very happy Pride Month to the LGBTQ+ community throughout Beaver and Allegheny Counties.

**Pride is about freedom: The freedom to love who you love and to live as you are.** It’s also a celebration of the many LGBTQ+ activists throughout history who fought for those freedoms.

**Yet the fight for that freedom is far from over.** The radical right would be more than happy to take away those freedoms, punish transgender children and their parents who seek life-saving gender affirming care, and make LGBTQ+ folks like me live in fear. Chris’s right-wing opponent Jeremey Schaffer opposes the _Equality Act_ and wants our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors to have to live in the shadows.

**Chis often says that he got in this race to fight for our common good – and that means for _all of us_. Chris is committed to ensuring equal rights for all, and when he’s in Congress, I know he will never stop fighting for LGBTQ+ folks like me.**

**[We need to elect leaders like Chris who will fight for western Pennsylvania’s LGBTQ+ community in Congress. If you’re able, please chip in to Chris’s campaign today to show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46078089/348741697/1383944506?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.03_b1_ch_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGZjNTM2Ni01OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2-SC2knAZjA3NP3qVLxmwiNYBGJLVLROSlGckNjZ8k=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Here at Team Deluzio, we want to wish a very happy Pride Month to the LGBTQ+ community throughout Beaver and Allegheny Counties. | = Happy Pride Month, Derek! Here at Team Deluzio, we want to wish a very happy Pride Month to the LGBTQ+ community throughout Beaver and Allegheny Counties. Pride is about freedom: The freedom to love who you love and to live as you are. It’s also a celebration of the many LGBTQ+ activists throughout history who fought for those freedoms. Yet the fight for that freedom is far from over. The radical right would be more than happy to take away those freedoms, punish transgender children and their parents who seek life-saving gender affirming care, and make LGBTQ+ folks like me live in fear. Chris’s right-wing opponent Jeremey Schaffer opposes the Equality Act and wants our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors to have to live in the shadows. Chis often says that he got in this race to fight for our common good – and that means for all of us. Chris is committed to ensuring equal rights for all, and when he’s in Congress, I know he will never stop fighting for LGBTQ+ folks like me. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This Pride Month, let’s commit to that fight for equal rights and celebrate what Pride is all about. Thank you, and once again, Happy Pride Month! Caitlin Handerhan Campaign Manager Chris Deluzio for Congress | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. subject: We need you.

body:
In less than four days, we will be one step closer to making our vision for Los Angeles a reality.

Team —

I'm about to ask you to make your first contribution to support my campaign for Los Angeles mayor. I hope you will give me a moment to explain why this request is so important, especially now.

Since I first announced my campaign for L.A. mayor, people from all backgrounds and all walks of life have stepped up to support the movement we're building, and I couldn't be prouder.

This campaign is about building coalitions and working together to address the structural problems that our city is facing – from building healthy and resilient communities, to facing the crisis of unhoused Angelenos, to investing in jobs and industry in our city.

And in less than four days, we will be one step closer to making our vision for Los Angeles a reality. But I need your help in the final hour.

That's why I'm respectfully asking you to make your first contribution to my campaign because we can't leave the future of our city to chance.

**Here's your personal link to contribute:** **[https://act.karenbass.com/a/2022-2&refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46078208/348742047/-1030761386?ms=em22_220603_prim3_fndd_gq_nondnr___KB_ettx&refcode=em22_220603_prim3_fndd_gq_nondnr___KB_ettx&source=em22_220603_prim3_fndd_gq_nondnr___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220603_prim3_fndd_gq_nondnr___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2F9kJiihtDYwLWJf3eMu3qwI6RMCysLkqz2GO745c7fCK4rP4ygxLnFyqfC8XtvQjfy5ZaVaUCVVOo0sfXteP1K8qim0rZ7dXIMhVpLjp6ZYDaulQYlwqItyppyzSkVPj%2BPWkmLklz4%2BZQbit1LkMDA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQyMjc1Mi01OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR5an3JyFV_--pAe7jIcDJVwx7EZgABCZBnnKN7JWcQ=&emci=e6795427-95e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=45d22752-58e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

body:

Friend,

I have something special for you.

I came across three of my favorite photographs and immediately knew I wanted to send YOU a copy of one of them. The problem is... _**I can't decide WHICH photo I want to send you (they're all so spectacular).**_

So, I thought, why not let YOU, one of my BEST supporters, decide. But, I need you to know that these are not just any photos, Friend. **I plan to write you a personalized note and sign the photograph.**

Below are three of my favorite photos, and I want YOU to decide which you want ME to sign for YOU:

Below are three of my favorite photos, and I want YOU to decide which you want ME to sign for YOU: I really want to know which photo you want me to personalize for you. I'll look at ALL RESPONSES first thing TOMORROW , and I expect to see yours. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. body:
You're receiving this email because you're a top Democrat who believes Texas is worth fighting for. We're The Real Texas PAC, and we're working to fight back against the far-right takeover of our great state. We hope you'll join us. If you'd like to unsubscribe from these mailings, unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=MpiHKUh5zW6hf9RF72VUuf4tUpv08EzpUTXYEfvb8GBj9tYE%2FulmH%2FNWS3yXquRU4Dtnn91XyiR0b29gYyJAwKFcpumro8HcOOHZho7dHFL0DZY299y2KuZDv%2BHqNJXKXjWM0fCtOhDhck%2FLaDVdGsrndUpXP4gFFeTWY%2FmtMZqj4X%2BPEUoFv5JCXHYS5jXrXY0RNJCB613osFA9OmoEp0yZE7DzyCE%2BAke56dLzlzoNJ2z6F%2FUbpyp8GqYEfoBl%2BxNpsrvDAySc%2FsPTlXtN9In0NWBE6Xl%2FrWJCNIhiOtEZz%2B%2Bij4qAwJfvkyEj%2Bo7xBjYyTjB5ICdOuG5O6%2FeE4B508dE0Itj%2FLt%2B6z6drEna0A8Q1SBDt4vg2sZ1YgPGUlwuJHevNicSXEUSRmn5QJXpkx9SjUtOMa6UnVVeuQ0Q%3D
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=051622&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=051622&amount=25]
Peter, we wanted to reach out and thank you for being one of the first supporters of The Real Texas PAC.
The fight for Texas is just beginning. We are suffering under the leadership of Greg Abbott and his sycophantic followers. Power failures, empty shelves, mass shootings... he refuses to take action on ANY of it. And no one in the GOP is going to hold him accountable.
Well, we intend to.
But we can't do it alone. We need you in this with us from now until Election Day. Will you add your name if you're still all in? [https://secure.everyaction.com/CFuSePl2UkmeZMyJ7HpYog2]
I'm all in to fight for Texas >>> [https://secure.everyaction.com/CFuSePl2UkmeZMyJ7HpYog2]
We've said it before, and we'll say it again. Texas is not a red state. It's a gerrymandered and voter suppressed purple state. Folks like Ted Cruz, Greg Abbott, and Dan Patrick do not represent the majority of Texans. They're simply the loudest, most controversial voices.
We're done with them sucking up all the air in the room. We're fighting to be heard.
Because Texas is worth it.
We hope you'll continue to stand with us. Please add your name now to join the fight for Texas. [https://secure.everyaction.com/CFuSePl2UkmeZMyJ7HpYog2]
More soon,
The Real Texas PAC
Paid for by The Real Texas PAC

body:
There's so much positive change we can make for AD-80 at the state level. Can I count on you to support my campaign before Election Day?| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46078710/348744343/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODc5ZTE2Yy01YWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MJVzvIfN3gXjfP0HKbzT4kq87NZD0bOmCFVcwbUPY_g=&emci=b4396e2c-d9e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=2879e16c-5ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=8780864)

| | I'm proud of everything we accomplished on the San Diego City Council — from expanding public transportation to building more affordable housing and transitioning to clean energy. **In the State Assembly, I'll continue to fight for all these priorities — and more — while having an even bigger impact for AD-80 _AND_ leading the rest of the state in a more progressive direction. **Single-payer healthcare, big investments in our public education, and fighting climate change are all on the table. It's clear my opponent won't fight for any of those priorities, since he's already committed to Big Oil, corporate interests, and the Republican Party. **[We have FOUR DAYS before Election Day. With so much riding on this race, can I count on you to donate now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46078711/348744344/-1329068671?refcode=X_060222_FiveDays&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODc5ZTE2Yy01YWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MJVzvIfN3gXjfP0HKbzT4kq87NZD0bOmCFVcwbUPY_g=)**

Can I count on you to support my campaign before Election Day?| | | | | I'm proud of everything we accomplished on the San Diego City Council — from expanding public transportation to building more affordable housing and transitioning to clean energy. In the State Assembly, I'll continue to fight for all these priorities — and more — while having an even bigger impact for AD-80 AND leading the rest of the state in a more progressive direction. Single-payer healthcare, big investments in our public education, and fighting climate change are all on the table. name: Jill Vogel
subject: Budget Vote Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 332 West Lee Hwy PMB 312 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
Senator Jill H. Vogel Legislative Update 6-3-22 Budget Vote in Virginia
The General Assembly met in Richmond on Wednesday of this week to vote on a budget for Virginia. Although the regular session ended in March, gridlock on the budget caused negotiations to drag on months longer than usual. The House and Senate have also remained in special session since March, compressing the timeframe for us to act on the budget now that it has passed. The Governor would ordinarily have 30 days to review and amend the budget. Because of special session, he has 7 days after the budget is delivered to him, which should occur early next week. Every budget agreement is a compromise and this one is as well. The total budget for 2 years is $166 billion. Virginia has a budget surplus and remains balanced. Currently, this budget sets aside substantial savings in Virginia's Rainy Day Fund and also provides some tax relief. The budget includes a 78% increase in the standard deduction, meaning the standard deduction is $8,000 for individuals and $16,000 for married couples. This yields every Virginian an extra $3,500 in annual earnings that will be free from state income taxes. The grocery tax will also be reduced. Beginning in 2023, the grocery tax will be cut 60%, dropping to 1%. Military retirees age 55 and over will receive an income tax subtraction of $10,000 for the current year and $20,000 for tax year 2023. Virginians will also receive a one-time tax rebate of $250 for individuals and $500 for married couples later this year. We also voted in this budget to include pay increases for teachers, and for state and state-supported local employees (like sheriffs' deputies). They will receive a 5% increase, plus another 5% next year. The gas tax holiday asked for by the Governor is not in the budget, which remains a point of contention. I am relieved that so many budget requests to resolve issues in our district were included and I am hopeful that the Governor's amendments will improve what we have already done. This budget is still not the final budget. It now goes to Governor Youngkin's desk for his review - and his suggested changes. We will be returning to Richmond to consider his proposed changes in the next few weeks. In the meantime, legislators are back in their home districts. You can reach our office by calling (540) 270-7055. You can also email us at [district27@senate.virginia.gov](mailto:district27@senate.virginia.gov). As always, it is an honor to serve you in the Senate of Virginia.

---
| Sincerely,
---
| | |
---|---
|

Senator Jill Vogel

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Senator Jill H. Vogel Legislative Update 6-3-22 Budget Vote in Virginia The General Assembly met in Richmond on Wednesday of this week to vote on a budget for Virginia. Although the regular session ended in March, gridlock on the budget caused negotiations to drag on months longer than usual. The House and Senate have also remained in special session since March, compressing the timeframe for us to act on the budget now that it has passed. The Governor would ordinarily have 30 days to review and amend the budget. Because of special session, he has 7 days after the budget is delivered to him, which should occur early next week. Every budget agreement is a compromise and this one is as well. The total budget for 2 years is $166 billion. Virginia has a budget surplus and remains balanced. Currently, this budget sets aside substantial savings in Virginia's Rainy Day Fund and also provides some tax relief. The budget includes a 78% increase in the standard deduction, meaning the standard deduction is $8,000 for individuals and $16,000 for married couples. This yields every Virginian an extra $3,500 in annual earnings that will be free from state income taxes. The grocery tax will also be reduced. Beginning in 2023, the grocery tax will be cut 60%, dropping to 1%. Military retirees age 55 and over will receive an income tax subtraction of $10,000 for the current year and $20,000 for tax year 2023. Virginians will also receive a one-time tax rebate of $250 for individuals and $500 for married couples later this year. We also voted in this budget to include pay increases for teachers, and for state and state-supported local employees (like sheriffs' deputies). They will receive a 5% increase, plus another 5% next year. The gas tax holiday asked for by the Governor is not in the budget, which remains a point of contention. I am relieved that so many budget requests to resolve issues in our district were included and I am hopeful that the Governor's amendments will improve what we have already done. This budget is still not the final budget. It now goes to Governor Youngkin's desk for his review - and his suggested changes. We will be returning to Richmond to consider his proposed changes in the next few weeks. In the meantime, legislators are back in their home districts. You can reach our office by calling (540) 270-7055. You can also email us at mailto:district27@senate.virginia.gov. As always, it is an honor to serve you in the Senate of Virginia. | Sincerely, | | | ---|--- | Senator Jill Vogel | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 332 West Lee Hwy PMB 312 Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram Updates == == == | | Vogel for Senate | 332 West Lee Hwy, PMB 312, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@senatorjillvogel.com powered by

But in our campaign, I want you to know EXACTLY where your money is going, so let me break it down: $5 buys a case of water bottles for our volunteer door knockers. $25 is a pizza for volunteers who take time out of their busy schedules to turn our district red. $50 covers one block in street signs. $100 is 1,000 more voters contacted about our incredible campaign. Every dollar you pitch in fuels our campaign and gets us closer to a historical Republican victory, Peter. | | Thank you so much for your support. name: Team Benson
subject: Don't miss Jocelyn's interview last night
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

Jocelyn recently had an important interview on MSNBC about the latest organized attempt to sow mistrust and chaos in Michigan's elections.
According to a recent Politico report, RNC staffers are organizing thousands of election deniers to register as poll workers for the upcoming 2022 election. These individuals are trained to use a special live chat software that will bring any of their complaints to the attention of a party attorney, who will then work directly with "friendly" district attorneys to block precinct election results.

Watch Jocelyn's interview below, friend, this is an issue you need to know about in our fight to protect our elections.

Watch the video>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-msnbc?refcode=060322

-Team Benson

Peter, liberals have made it clear: the American people are the enemy. Their new bill proved it - that's why I stopped it in the Senate. **[FIGHT BACK: CHIP IN >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=80c4013058794576add4d9b63f39fbbd&_e=u4YwsxJ3yet1hk6siBowZSAKn-iJ0oYoJXrgeVV5O5kcilSN4FJjhfoyftkXYn8Flr7eO2PFE1ORvX2hi4MUuPIrkMi4yj51eVqC6oJ8zkhsUVxvRuO45cLKrko6a1b5AZ2ahAdnAUFrZvoUk7qUok3DIJMONEqRN1yhDoQJkJ7ep-IWWK2bNedZAykwn1-xdJwXA8EdvUDg_gLF5GYOY5xkZNSJpAm5dxOHNlhNBML4GtKHbdfH09xdyZGyr79-f3X6itbuwagNjG6hzx6t0R3Nm760XpaCYz52KlP9vj_bf3-PE53LTzKqFmjJQdg6yT8oFrimQg5HaDuyvB8kepmL7Wx8jkmRqWS9rmkky8CWRvBxHfBcbmiEth3SntwnHhgT62EDD5NrXha1DeSHPtO72-ZxHaSABfpnIwjM_pP2lR30y9zXYw1TVKBsypLs)** The "Domestic Terror" legislation should have been called by its more accurate name: the Democrat plan to brand our police and soldiers as white supremacists and neo-Nazis. _How insulting._ **The bill also created two other Thought Police offices at the Department of Justice and at the FBI.******_This seems like a self-defeating choice since elsewhere in the bill, we are told that federal law enforcement is shot through with White supremacists and neo-Nazis! _ You couldn't make this stuff up, Peter - but it tells you exactly how radical Democrats in Washington are getting. We literally just got done taking down the DHS Ministry of Truth, and just a day later, Democrats tried to create DHS Thought Police we had to take down too! Now don't get me wrong - I will never back down from this fight. But Peter, I could really use help to put an end to this radical reign and TAKE BACK THE SENATE. Please, join me now by making an immediate donation.__

clean_body: here come the thought police...| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, liberals have made it clear: the American people are the enemy. Their new bill proved it - that's why I stopped it in the Senate. The "Domestic Terror" legislation should have been called by its more accurate name: the Democrat plan to brand our police and soldiers as white supremacists and neo-Nazis. How insulting. The bill also created two other Thought Police offices at the Department of Justice and at the FBI.****This seems like a self-defeating choice since elsewhere in the bill, we are told that federal law enforcement is shot through with White supremacists and neo-Nazis! You couldn't make this stuff up, Peter - but it tells you exactly how radical Democrats in Washington are getting. We literally just got done taking down the DHS Ministry of Truth, and just a day later, Democrats tried to create DHS Thought Police we had to take down too! Now don't get me wrong - I will never back down from this fight. But Peter, I could really use help to put an end to this radical reign and TAKE BACK THE SENATE. body:
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46080088/348750005/-528360723?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_CHA_RES_AC_20220603_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWFiMmNlNy01ZWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LrZh-kmOOp_ADA4VZeqpN9LVLqJlF88FRQhlDOa3oOg=)

Folks,
Last night, Tucker Carlson devoted an entire segment to criticizing my efforts to ban assault weapons.
Unlike my Republican colleagues, I will not stand by as kids across this country are gunned down.
I’m being attacked by the GOP because I want to do everything in my power to stop children from being massacred by weapons of war.
Yesterday, I spoke forcefully during the House Judiciary Committee hearing in support of the _Protecting Our Kids Act,_ sweeping anti-gun violence legislation that would raise the age limit on the purchase of semiautomatic firearms, prevent gun trafficking, ban ghost guns, and require the safe storage of firearms.
Republicans in Congress refuse to take action. Time after time, they have put their right to kill over our right to live. And I’ve had enough.
Enough of them telling us that school shootings are a fact of life when every other country like ours has virtually ended it.
Enough of them blaming mental illness and then defunding mental health care in this country.
Enough of their thoughts and prayers.
Next week, the House will take a vote and I will fight like hell to advance the _Protecting Our Kids Act. _
If the filibuster obstructs us, we will abolish it. If the Supreme Court objects, we will expand it.
And we will not rest until we have taken weapons of war out of circulation in our communities.
Each and every day, we will do whatever it takes to end gun violence.
What we will not do is fail the children of this country the way the GOP has failed the generations of Columbine, Sandy Hook, Parkland, and Uvalde.
Now, I am going to need your support to get this done.
With your help we can save lives.
Thank you,
Mondaire Jones

| **Today is National Gun Violence Awareness Day. Can you please split a contribution – of whatever you can afford – between Gabby Giffords' gun violence prevention organization and Mondaire Jones’ re-election campaign? Together, we can keep Mondaire in Congress and make our communities safer from gun violence.** **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46080090/348750006/-437188591?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_CHA_RES_AC_20220603_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWFiMmNlNy01ZWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LrZh-kmOOp_ADA4VZeqpN9LVLqJlF88FRQhlDOa3oOg=)**

| Endorsement Alert! Morton Blackwell Endorses John McGuire For State Senator for Virginia's 10th District

---

---
| John is unwavering in his fight to protect the right to life, right to bear arms, school choice, religious freedom and individual liberties. We know how he will legislate as a senator based on his conservative voting record that includes a score of 100 from the Family Foundation. Please join me in sending the Senator that will return the majority to Republicans and ensure Governor Youngkin can pass his agenda! -Morton Blackwell, Founder & President of The Leadership Institute and National Committeeman on the Republican National Committee
I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023, stop the madness, and help pass Governor Glenn Youngkin's Agenda. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
D10 Counties: Hanover Powhatan Louisa Fluvanna Goochland Buckingham Appomattox Amelia Prince Edward Cumberland

Friend, as President Biden's press secretary, Jen Psaki has stood firm against Republican attacks on the Biden-Harris agenda, refuted dangerous misinformation from extremists and played a crucial role in communicating the administration's response to COVID-19.
**But Psaki stepped down as press secretary last month, and the GOP is ALREADY trying to cement a legacy for her based on lies and record-smearing. We need to show her that dedicated Democrats are on her side and grateful for all she's done. **
**We have to collect all our signatures before 11:59 p.m. tonight, but your response is still missing! We've handpicked you to sign, so please:**

name: Sarah Palin
subject: This is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | Peter,

I have a very blunt request, but I promise it's important.

Alaskans are voting by mail right now, and time is running out. I need your help.

_**[I'm humbly asking that you donate any amount - whether it's $1 or $1,000 - to help me cross the finish line and do something great here in Alaska.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513303:6VvRq9o_N:m:1:3253819041:62A92B4E146E5CD553B948CF3FF59283:r "I’m humbly asking that you
donate any amount – whether it’s $1 or $1,000 – to help me cross the finish line and do something great here in Alaska.")**_

I've seen the power of grassroots support, and I've never needed it more. I'm facing 47 other candidates... Yes, you read that right - 47!

_I want to let you know why it 's important that I win..._

I'm ready to roll up my sleeves on day one and get to work in Congress slashing budgets, cutting taxes, standing up to liberal special interests, and advocating for the American people. I'm not afraid to put up a fight, and I won't stop when the going gets tough.

However, I can't get there alone. **I need your help. **

_**[Peter, will you please join me and help me cross the finish line?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513303:6VvRq9o_N:m:1:3253819041:62A92B4E146E5CD553B948CF3FF59283:r "Peter, will you please join me and help me cross the finish line?")**_

Thank you, and God bless America,

Sarah Palin

name: Will Rollins
subject: I’m committed to ending gun violence.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46081383/348755115/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjhhMmM3Ny02MmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XlZwD8H9QX7Otubx3Y64a0LVJG13FontjoL3oPIzHc=)
Peter –

In the wake of multiple tragedies, the fight to end gun violence has never been more urgent. Which is why today on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I wear orange in solidarity with survivors and families of victims of the senseless epidemic taking our country by storm.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46081384/348755116/399785365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjhhMmM3Ny02MmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XlZwD8H9QX7Otubx3Y64a0LVJG13FontjoL3oPIzHc=&emci=2e3039f8-5de3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9b8a2c77-62e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=12636851)
These acts of violence are preventable and is why I’m more committed than ever to enact smarter gun control – Americans deserve better.

Gun safety laws don’t infringe on the rights of law-abiding folks, but they do help reduce gun violence. I, like most Americans and gun owners, believe in common sense safety rules that keep guns away from dangerous people, like violent history checks, safe storage, and red flag laws.

Unlike my opponent, I’ll never take a cent from the NRA or the gun lobby, much less **$166,116**. That’s why I was awarded the Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate distinction. I plan to bring back integrity and common sense to Congress and will accept nothing less than long-lasting gun safety reforms.

Will

clean_body: | = Peter – In the wake of multiple tragedies, the fight to end gun violence has never been more urgent. Which is why today on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I wear orange in solidarity with survivors and families of victims of the senseless epidemic taking our country by storm. These acts of violence are preventable and is why I’m more committed than ever to enact smarter gun control – Americans deserve better. Gun safety laws don’t infringe on the rights of law-abiding folks, but they do help reduce gun violence. I, like most Americans and gun owners, believe in common sense safety rules that keep guns away from dangerous people, like violent history checks, safe storage, and red flag laws. Unlike my opponent, I’ll never take a cent from the NRA or the gun lobby, much less $166,116. That’s why I was awarded the Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate distinction. I plan to bring back integrity and common sense to Congress and will accept nothing less than long-lasting gun safety reforms. Will | | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Herschel Walker
subject: The fight isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent’s campaign.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zliaadh75odn3jbljb615bnf5maonsknqr52ugi8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9jmeob6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t71e6q76crm6sr64tlkcopbfc37cdrb8sbjeppmepdgm5g76pdme5g61otie4o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phksaqradti6dj33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

| | | Friend,

**Great news! We won Georgia 's Republican primary for U.S. Senate.**

I'll be the Republican nominee to face Democrat Raphael Warnock in the Senate race in November, which means this fight is heating up.

It's no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent's campaign. In the first three months of the year, my opponent raised $13.6 MILLION - _that 's $151,000 per day or $105 per minute!_

Raphael Warnock has outraised EVERY candidate in the country, which is why I'm reaching out to you now. _**[Friend, I need your help now more than ever.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsnfsekl9e6b8ooj3js11kamc75pmlqtuigvpn2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9jmeob6clh2bs "Friend, I need your help now more than ever.")**_

_**[If you're able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it's $1 or $100, your help is critical.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi2htlucfmgt7u8cnchm19bs17ticcafpa8tpb20_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9jmeob6clh2bs "If you’re able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it’s $1 or $100, your help is critical.")**_

We must band together to flip this crucial Senate seat in Georgia. It's up to strong conservatives like us to win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track.

Thank you for your continued support.

On to victory,

Herschel Walker

---

A recent poll showed me down by 1% to a GOP opponent, but neither of my potential opponents have shown they have Colorado’s best interest in mind. In addition to the radical right-winger, my other opponent would rather buy this seat than listen to what Coloradans really want. This year I secured funding to help build affordable housing in Colorado, passed a bill to expand access to baby formula for those who rely on WIC, and banned emergency surprise medical bills. I’m continuing my fight to cap out-of-pocket insulin costs at $35 a month and renew the expanded Child Tax Credit thanks to feedback from working families. Unfortunately that makes me a top target for the National GOP. **Will you make a donation of $10 to my campaign to keep Colorado out of the hands of my opponents? I never expected this race to be easy, but I know Colorado’s families deserve a leader who will fight for them, not parade baseless conspiracies. I may have won my last midterm election race by just 1.7%, but that race made clear that every program, strategy, campaign staffer, and dollar can make a difference.
Supporters like you power the voter outreach, online ad strategy, and volunteer training it takes to win a heated race like mine. Every clipboard, button, and pen is funded by folks on this team, not corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. So, I’m personally asking:

clean_body: | = = The insurrectionist who tried to ban abortions in Colorado and continues to fan the flames around Trump’s Big Lie, won a straw poll following the last GOP primary debate. A recent poll showed me down by 1% to a GOP opponent, but neither of my potential opponents have shown they have Colorado’s best interest in mind. In addition to the radical right-winger, my other opponent would rather buy this seat than listen to what Coloradans really want. This year I secured funding to help build affordable housing in Colorado, passed a bill to expand access to baby formula for those who rely on WIC, and banned emergency surprise medical bills. I’m continuing my fight to cap out-of-pocket insulin costs at $35 a month and renew the expanded Child Tax Credit thanks to feedback from working families. Unfortunately that makes me a top target for the National GOP. Will you make a donation of $10 to my campaign to keep Colorado out of the hands of my opponents? Your support powers my work, so I can’t thank you enough. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= I never expected this race to be easy, but I know Colorado’s families deserve a leader who will fight for them, not parade baseless conspiracies. I may have won my last midterm election race by just 1.7%, but that race made clear that every program, strategy, campaign staffer, and dollar can make a difference. Supporters like you power the voter outreach, online ad strategy, and volunteer training it takes to win a heated race like mine. Every clipboard, button, and pen is funded by folks on this team, not corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. So, I’m personally asking: In a few weeks, I’ll be facing off against the GOP’s nominee, so your support will help us kick off the general election in a strong place. If you can, donate $10 to my campaign today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you, Michael P.S. In a few weeks the Colorado GOP will pick my final opponent, and starting the general election strong is critical. If everyone reading this message pitches in, we’ll start the month strong with the campaign infrastructure to fend off attacks. = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Morgan, Team Waltz
subject: I’ve seen a lot of fake leaders in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
During my time working in politics, I’ve seen a lot of so-called “leaders.”| | | Peter, During my time working in politics, I’ve seen a lot of so-called “leaders.”

Too many career politicians have completely lost touch with the American people. Their world revolves around Washington, not Main Street.

**But when I met Col. Mike Waltz, I knew that he was different than the rest.**

Mike served as a Green Beret and put his life on the line to defend your freedom.

That kind of experience makes a person _never_ take America for granted, and Mike will never stop defending your rights.

_But right now, this American hero needs your help._

Swamp Democrats hate to see a proud patriot lead in Congress, and they’re on Mike’s tail trying to attack him and his unapologetic love for America.

[**Will you help this American hero today and send him back to Washington to defend what makes America great?**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=ea2677cc4e5d47d48dbce322ebbafc19&_e=G3PFfLNpRXEJ85q5pHk3WiFPkr1QXZuandh-U24XKbFWGNWrWis9eexnWAi-6Jk19Ij5jiZmyNEipsEbMD_fglUrWIu7E8u2a25rAEXOnagByALgmb_xm8zeuD-m1Me3Urh2L2U7SZMBuSEydPisQtuxJzNLBf4WVwm5Pm8NL7O_e0TpaXenY1apyZ5Oj45F2GV-JTLL2t4kMpd5WBUqfw6ysSvjtODe8vD4NjDqn5uRLcL7XqjPq_nMAl_IxpeobPG-mheQ8Md3YKzKLIxNDAGFFZmdyUEDV5ZHgeRGLiy6XXBbX4VcEp8tmRGnkByAkfM6qWI4CjHrGRDtteyJSauMdlxrXOnzjhnSwqZQkRcZLuu8AB_okIFWGgsXDFy_cyXcpiZyEFopfYRj7NEsEVwstL43GL4PxKX5UoWGvAY%3D)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Our opponent wants to eliminate the right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We can’t allow Trump and his gang of MAGA Republicans to drag us back to the dark ages.
#

Friends —
The Supreme Court is preparing to make a decision on the protections guaranteed by _Roe v. Wade_. But right now, Mark Kelly represents Arizona in the Senate, and he’s fighting to write those protections into law.
Unfortunately, the MAGA Republican that Trump just endorsed in our race wants to go even further than the Supreme Court’s leaked decision would. Blake Masters supports a federal ban on abortion — in all cases. No exceptions. He even opposed the Supreme Court's decision that made birth control legal in this country.
We can’t allow Trump and his gang of MAGA Republicans to drag us back to the dark ages. And in times like these, we need more people like Mark Kelly in the Senate fighting for us and our families.
Which is why today, we have to ask:
[**Will you make your first donation to our people-powered campaign today? We can’t let extremists like Trump and Masters take back this seat and eliminate the right to choose for millions of Americans.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june22.PHGn67&refcode=em220603-1-subs-B&t=1&akid=2981%2E6688874%2EataWDe)
