name: Team Oakley
subject: Rep. Payne Jr. has some powerful anti-abortion friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter —
It’s simple: you can’t call yourself pro-choice if you take money from anti-choice corporations.
And Rep. Payne Jr. has been doing it for years.
One of Rep. Payne Jr.’s biggest corporate sponsors — Merck Pharmaceuticals — is one of the TOP pharmaceutical companies donating to politicians who’ve fought for full abortion bans at the state and federal level.
And, not to mention, one of Rep. Payne Jr.’s biggest establishment supporters — Congressman Jim Clyburn — endorsed Henry Cuellar, an openly anti-abortion “Democrat.”
Rep. Payne Jr. may say all the right things and put on a pro-choice show when it benefits him, but you are the company you keep, and Rep. Payne Jr. is making deals with some bad companies.
With Roe v. Wade all but overturned, we need a leader who will fight tooth and nail for abortion rights — not a do-nothing politician who takes money (and orders) from anti-choice corporations. If you agree, click here to chip in $27 and help Imani defeat Rep. Payne Jr. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=603roe]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Imani will ALWAYS stand up and fight for abortion rights. She’ll fight like hell to codify Roe , secure reproductive freedom, and make sure ALL women — particularly working class women of color — can get the reproductive care they need.
That’s the kind of leadership we need. And on June 7th, it’s the kind of leadership we can get. Click here to make a donation and help us win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=603roe]
Thank you for your support.

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: Debate Recap
body:
Highlights from the Mackinaw Island Debate

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mackinaw_debate_email&n=1)
---
## Recap of the Mackinaw Island Debate
Yesterday the Mackinaw Island debate took place where Ralph shared his ideas on issues such as abortion, election fraud, mental health, the second amendment, and others. Ralph stood firm in his conviction that we must bring God back into the classroom, culture, and the courtroom. If we do not get **God** right in this election, we will **lose everything**.
### **You can watch the entire debate here**
| [](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYV_ismSvRWuI_VdT7ozOA42PtoQ8lBMPvSd0tPH9fiFA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mackinaw_debate_email&n=2 "WATCH") [WATCH](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYV_ismSvRWuI_VdT7ozOA42PtoQ8lBMPvSd0tPH9fiFA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mackinaw_debate_email&n=2)

There are a lot of great and exciting things coming in the next few weeks as we are **Revving up** for August 2nd, and we need **your help.** Without your support we will be unable to repair our state.
### **SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN**
We are doing all we can to implement Ralph's vision of making **Michigan a Lighthouse to the Nation** ,**** and you can help us make that vision a reality. Our goal is to raise **$2,000** this weekend in honor of the new film 2,000 Mules. When Ralph is elected, he will make certain that no such fraud will **ever** occur again in our great state.
**Any amount you donate will help us spread Ralph's message around the state.**

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Ohio families are struggling. Mike DeWine isn’t helping.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
It’s not right – and Mike DeWine could do something about it.

Team,
In Ohio and across the country, families are struggling to make ends meet. Costs are going up. Gas prices have soared. Wages aren’t keeping pace, and it’s hurting Ohioans – and all the while, big corporations are raising prices and raking in record profits.
**It’s not right – and Mike DeWine could do something about it.**
That’s why this week, I proposed that we put money directly back into Ohioans’ pockets by issuing an inflation rebate of $350 per adult, and I’m calling on Mike DeWine directly to institute it.
**[As governor, I’ll prioritize Ohioans over corporations every time. Chip in right now to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46082090/348757928/-667179618?refcode=nw_email_220603_1_t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTZlOWMwMi02NmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrHefU03J9K54QZYg537Ea0nqHnOmJrGhn9HRGRTJUg=)**
This isn’t something that can wait – we should do it immediately. Families are struggling _right now_ , and that calls for action _right now_ – not in months.
There’s an easy way to do this. Ohio has received money from the American Rescue Plan to help people recover from the pandemic and get our state back on track.
By issuing a $350 rebate for every middle class adult in Ohio, we ensure that people can put that money towards what they need today – whether that’s rent, bills, groceries, medications, or something else entirely.
**[I’m calling on Mike DeWine to put Ohio families first and issue an inflation rebate right now – and then I’m running to defeat him and make sure that Ohio families are put first every single time. Please, donate $5 right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46082091/348757929/-667179618?refcode=nw_email_220603_1_t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTZlOWMwMi02NmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrHefU03J9K54QZYg537Ea0nqHnOmJrGhn9HRGRTJUg=)**
Onward,
Nan

clean_body: It’s not right – and Mike DeWine could do something about it. Team, In Ohio and across the country, families are struggling to make ends meet. Costs are going up. Gas prices have soared. Wages aren’t keeping pace, and it’s hurting Ohioans – and all the while, big corporations are raising prices and raking in record profits. It’s not right – and Mike DeWine could do something about it. That’s why this week, I proposed that we put money directly back into Ohioans’ pockets by issuing an inflation rebate of $350 per adult, and I’m calling on Mike DeWine directly to institute it. = This isn’t something that can wait – we should do it immediately. Families are struggling right now , and that calls for action right now – not in months. There’s an easy way to do this. Ohio has received money from the American Rescue Plan to help people recover from the pandemic and get our state back on track. By issuing a $350 rebate for every middle class adult in Ohio, we ensure that people can put that money towards what they need today – whether that’s rent, bills, groceries, medications, or something else entirely. = Onward, Nan **= Paid for by Whaley/Stephens PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401 This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, .

subject: Early Voting Has Started
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6de9f4a4e253/conforti-for-congress-7236343?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Early Voting has started here in Illinois. Below are some guidelines. No ID is required.

DuPage - Until June 11th you can vote at the DuPage County Fairgrounds (Building 2) from 8a-4p on weekdays, and 9a-noon on Saturday. Beginning June 13th more early voting sites will open. [DuPage County IL - Election Division - Early Voting](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=952bb974a9&e=25f4fa3311)

Cook - Early voting will take place June 13-27. You can register to vote at all early voting locations. [Early Voting Locations | Cook County Clerk (cookcountyclerkil.gov)](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=c55cb49ed8&e=25f4fa3311)

Here are some important dates:

June 12 - Last day to register online to vote in Illinois. You can register to vote in-person, up until and on election day.

June 23 - Last day for election officials to receive your mail-in ballot. It needs to be postmarked before this date.

June 28 - Election Day

If you want your US Congressional Representative to stand up for your rights and fight for policies that will benefit the American people - Be sure to vote Niki Conforti for Congressional District 6!!
Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=5fdfd2f6b5&e=25f4fa3311)
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---

name: Mo Brooks
subject: Washington Post attacks me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWGVch8hNK

Whenever there's a tragic shooting, the Left tries to use it to
smear Republicans.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWGVch8hNK

Friend,

I care a
lot about the 2nd Amendment. You could say it's very personal to
me. You see, in 2017, I was at a baseball field with other GOP
Congressman when a deranged Bernie Sanders supporter started
shooting at us. We would later find out that my name was at the
top of the gunman's kill list.

The
liberal media immediately stuck a camera in my face and asked me
if I still believed in the 2nd Amendment. I did not waver then,
nor will I ever! I believe the 2nd Amendment is the right that
secures all our other rights.

I'm Mo
Brooks, and I'm the conservative running for United States Senate
in Alabama. Now that I'm close to being in the Senate, the
Washington Post is attacking me for my conservative views.

According
to their "expert analysis," the only reason I could possibly win
the election is because I'm somehow an extremist when it comes to
gun rights.

DEFEND
THE 2A

Friend,
whenever the fake news smears me for being a fierce defender of
your Second Amendment rights, I wear that badge with honor.

After
all, this is what they always do: every time there is a shooting
like the tragedy we just saw in Texas, they rush to blame
conservatives for supporting the Constitution. The radical left
and the Liberal Media (but I repeat myself) always try to use the
deaths of children for political profit.

I think
it's disgusting.

PROTECT
THE SECOND AMENDMENT

My
position on the Second Amendment has never changed, not even
after the Congressional Baseball shooting.

The
Second Amendment helps ensure that we always have a republic. I'm
not changing my position on the Second Amendment despite being
targeted for assassination by a liberal.

FIGHT FOR
THE 2A WITH MO

That's
why I'm reaching out to you, Friend.

I
currently represent Alabama's 5th Congressional District and I'm
currently in a runoff election for the U.S. Senate.

I have a
proven track record of standing up and fighting for conservative
principles - and the accolades to back it up:

A+
national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List

100%
rating from the National Right to Life

A+
rating from NumbersUSA, an immigration watchdog group

98%
rating from Heritage Action for America

93%
rating from FreedomWorks

93%
rating from the NRA

91%
lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union

86%
rating from Club for Growth

U.S.
Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award

2018
American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

And I've
received endorsements from well-respected conservative
hard-hitters:

Sen.
Ted Cruz
Sen.
Rand Paul

Congressman Jim Jordan
House
Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry

Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene
Dr.
Kelli Ward
Mark
Levin

And
endorsements from organizations fighting for conservative
principles:

Alabama Republican Assembly
Eagle
Forum

FreedomWorks for America

Alabama Citizens for Life

National Rifle Association
Gun
Owners of America

National Association for Gun Rights

Senate Conservatives Fund

Americans for Legal Immigration PAC

JOIN THEM
SUPPORT MO BROOKS

The
countdown is on until the runoff election in a few weeks. We need
every grassroots conservative to chip in and help us counter
Mitch McConnell and the Swamp's attacks. It's the only way to
ensure our Second Amendment rights for generations to come.

Can I
count on support from 2A activists like you? >>

DONATE
$100

DONATE
$75

DONATE
$50

DONATE
$25

DONATE
ANY AMOUNT

Thank you
for your help,

Mo Brooks

Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How concerned are you about rising gas prices in America?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9q0ejkgiv00735otnfkd9a3s4f527tpb8vjnae8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpm0tb2mgonccbhmoob6pj56krm2sbhe5gbcthlepqn9d3mc9gj6sb5c9o72ttnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjbcb0e9omcs3imdijfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clgm4pr4spj6eoh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmn80b5ctncn1i24j5l1pv4cctsodolo6cf3bgl8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9jm9pj6cth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z41e42utnv8h6tn776mn8kahbq3b63mgb2fdjqh8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9jm9pj6cth2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt9ikmv8lb5dvjngmlvfu3nb7fj5touh62892bg0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9jm9pj6cth2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Peter,

Today on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, we wear orange to honor those we've lost to gun violence and recommit to the fight for common-sense gun safety reforms.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46085225/348765507/-720115778?ms=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&refcode=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&source=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=AQnCdF4VUzwfTf60Ha2LzgWRiZumizli9WkjwLFL5nhjTAkKdGyfSxMFMxOmSakEtN%2BgCTC3djKB6vYfqrVjTuvbss3VmcAJTT%2F9hiNFRpq15DCYcR%2FAYfJP2V6OB4yhuXWTLGVoSiISTFiGHinRARmgCmj3%2BbpMOawYfJlv4kU%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjc4YzUxOS02OWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DIW9bKw_muvYFo2XvH_IuSNZ3gcUed71mW_-JV8mSIA=&emci=36eb811f-65e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=b278c519-69e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)

Every year, tens of thousands of Americans lose their lives to gun violence. From schools to grocery stores to concerts and places of worship, it seems as though no place is safe from the threat of gun violence.

**We can and we must do better.**

As Rhode Island Treasurer, I've been working to restrict sales and purchases of firearm kits, components, and accessories used to assemble undetectable "ghost guns." And I've divested the state’s pension fund from companies that manufacture assault weapons for non-military use.

In Congress, I will continue fighting to end gun violence with the same common-sense approach that I've taken as Treasurer. I'll work to make sure the Bipartisan Background Checks Act is signed into law and support common-sense legislation like a ban on assault weapons and red flag laws. That's why I was named a Gun Sense Candidate by Moms Demand Action.

But now, I want to know if you're with me:

**[If you agree it's past time we took action to end the gun violence epidemic, add your name to join me in calling for common-sense gun safety legislation>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46085226/348765508/-720115778?ms=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&refcode=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&source=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=AQnCdF4VUzwfTf60Ha2LzgWRiZumizli9WkjwLFL5nhjTAkKdGyfSxMFMxOmSakEtN%2BgCTC3djKB6vYfqrVjTuvbss3VmcAJTT%2F9hiNFRpq15DCYcR%2FAYfJP2V6OB4yhuXWTLGVoSiISTFiGHinRARmgCmj3%2BbpMOawYfJlv4kU%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjc4YzUxOS02OWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DIW9bKw_muvYFo2XvH_IuSNZ3gcUed71mW_-JV8mSIA=&emci=36eb811f-65e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=b278c519-69e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)**

body:
One of our opponents is resorting to cheap insults... | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46084721/348765023/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjIzZGZhNC02OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vt0rcJ3ykfIQ5cYkekfTeHzM1xOczwXFRSYFrLwu2wI=) Friend, With **just 4 days** until ballots are counted in our primary election, I'm asking you to rush [**a contribution of $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46084722/348765032/-10092236?refcode=em-6.3.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjIzZGZhNC02OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vt0rcJ3ykfIQ5cYkekfTeHzM1xOczwXFRSYFrLwu2wI=) to bolster our final turnout efforts. We just got some disturbing news, so I hope you’ll let me explain why this request is so urgent: **A few days ago, one of my opponents launched a nasty TV attack ad to smear my record and spread lies about my background. Being on the receiving end of misleading attacks was expected, but we didn’t think one of our Democratic primary opponents would resort to cheap insults.** These types of attacks represent everything that’s wrong with Washington; more division, lies, and less time focused on the issues that actually matter. Attacking me isn’t helping anyone but Ryan Zinke.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Sign Giffords’ petition saying you support universal background checks, confirmation of Steve Dettelbach for ATF Director, and bold executive action on gun safety from the Biden Administration.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Many of you have asked: what are we hoping Congress will do in the wake of the massacre in Uvalde, Texas?
#

Friends -
Many of you have asked: what are we hoping Congress will do in the wake of the massacre in Uvalde, Texas?
We’ll share that below, and then we want to ask you to make your voices heard on these issues:
1\. **Pass universal background checks** : The Senate needs to pass gun background checks on all sales. This foundational gun safety policy is broadly popular and underpins many other gun safety laws. The House has passed this legislation, now it’s the Senate’s turn to do its job.
2\. **Confirm an ATF director** : The Senate must swiftly confirm Steve Dettelbach as the next director of the ATF so that the agency is better equipped to enforce our nation’s gun laws, combat illegal gun trafficking, and hold the gun industry accountable.
3\. **Keep moving forward with bold executive actions from the Biden Administration** : President Biden led the gun violence prevention efforts after the 2012 Sandy Hook shooting. He ran on gun safety. It’s time for the Administration to develop a comprehensive strategy for executive actions relating to gun violence and public safety.
Every day, we are in touch with members of Congress on these issues and more. And every day we are asked if the desire for change has waned since Uvalde and Buffalo the week before.
We want to tell them NO. People are demanding action because action means saving lives. So please:
[**Sign Giffords’ petition saying you support universal background checks, confirmation of Steve Dettelbach for ATF Director, and bold executive action on gun safety from the Biden Administration.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_ubc_jb_pet?source=em220603-1-15ns&t=1&akid=2107%2E3935704%2ESatRx1)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_ubc_jb_pet?source=em220603-1-15ns&t=2&akid=2107%2E3935704%2ESatRx1)**
We know that there are many evidence-based policies that can help prevent mass shootings and school shootings. It’s time to get them done.
The team at Giffords
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/atf_ubc_jb_pet?source=em220603-1-15ns&t=3&akid=2107%2E3935704%2ESatRx1)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2107%2E3935704%2ESatRx1) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: We have 25 days to bring change.
body:
There are just 25 days left before the election--can I count on you? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f878cc79840a/we-have-25-days-to-bring-change?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# We have 25 days to bring change.

Right now, we are down to the wire and I need your help in making sure we bring change to this district. We have to elect someone who is going to fight for us and bring resources back from D.C. I know that no one is going to fight harder than me. But to get there, I need your help.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=81d50ac1f0&e=339f142c50 "DONATE NOW")
---
| I have been in this race for a whole year, and I have spoken with people from across the district, hosted events to heal from trauma and taken time to dig into issues we care about. My team of volunteers has been canvassing since January when we started collecting votes, calling and texting voters since February. We have been putting in the work, and will continue to until the last vote is cast. **Right now, I'm asking you to join us because we need you.** Whether you [volunteer](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=c3f4028e54&e=339f142c50), [donate](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=20d53a2857&e=339f142c50), or tell 20 of your neighbors about this campaign--and when they go to the polls, vote for Jahmal Cole!--**you have the power to make a difference. Be #AboutThatAction!**

Yours in service,
Jahmal

clean_body: There are just 25 days left before the election--can I count on you? | | | | | | | | We have 25 days to bring change. Right now, we are down to the wire and I need your help in making sure we bring change to this district. We have to elect someone who is going to fight for us and bring resources back from D.C. I know that no one is going to fight harder than me. But to get there, I need your help. | "DONATE NOW" | I have been in this race for a whole year, and I have spoken with people from across the district, hosted events to heal from trauma and taken time to dig into issues we care about. My team of volunteers has been canvassing since January when we started collecting votes, calling and texting voters since February. We have been putting in the work, and will continue to until the last vote is cast. Right now, I'm asking you to join us because we need you. Whether you , , or tell 20 of your neighbors about this campaign--and when they go to the polls, vote for Jahmal Cole!--you have the power to make a difference. Be #AboutThatAction! body:
Help us reach voters across Washington state
#
Did you see this, Peter?
Patty has gone up with her first TV ad about building an economy that puts Washington state families and workers first – all while making sure those at the very top finally pay their share.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46087016/348767545/-1483391266?refcode=pm_em_220603_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU5YWMyNC02YmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Euf8fWE2er9drTeTAvX5EUHiBjOz8bPv3GI7y578hv8=)**
**[This team knows Patty is fighting for them each and every day–but it’s so important that every single voter from every corner of our state knows that too. Will you contribute $5 to help us get our message out far and wide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46087017/348767546/-1483391266?refcode=pm_em_220603_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU5YWMyNC02YmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Euf8fWE2er9drTeTAvX5EUHiBjOz8bPv3GI7y578hv8=)**
There is so much at stake in November. Republicans have made clear that if they take back the Senate, they want to raise taxes on workers and retirees, end essential programs like Social Security and Medicaid, and rip away fundamental rights for the people of Washington state and across the country.
**[Patty Murray is working hard to make sure that doesn’t happen – and she needs your help to make that clear to voters across the state. Please, chip in now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46087018/348767547/-1483391266?refcode=pm_em_220603_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU5YWMyNC02YmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Euf8fWE2er9drTeTAvX5EUHiBjOz8bPv3GI7y578hv8=)**

Thanks for all you do for this team,

Team Patty

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46087019/348767548/-1483391266?refcode=pm_em_220603_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDU5YWMyNC02YmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Euf8fWE2er9drTeTAvX5EUHiBjOz8bPv3GI7y578hv8=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl0qvu1ard81q27af5lslcv9jp1iq3754d0930oo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge0pr7c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp63dln6eoj1crnm3im9db3epg78cb16phbfd9jcgrm5cpjephmacjhc1gjeo9n6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjbcb7mtg6ccbimmp6fc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z261eedtjfeg4k5gl8he806gfchutnmk0t0pop50_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge0pr7c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2qqenf4h49p5rhso9dsueo9sck7dk3slnseqj68_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge0pr7c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo08snklb8lhfo2gke4t67gqh80ipivsq1b58o3g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge0pr7c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Peter,

In last month’s primary election, Trump-endorsed state senator Doug Mastriano was named the Republican nominee for governor of Pennsylvania. Just days after his election, he was already bragging about his ability, if elected, to appoint the PA Secretary of State and **decertify our free and fair elections.**

clean_body: Peter, will you join our movement? | = Peter, all I’m asking for is a few bucks and your support. = | = I know I’m being direct, Peter, but we are running out of time: I’m running to bring a progressive, Latino voice to Congress. It’s time we are represented by the working class, not by millionaire MAGA Republicans. The campaign arm of House Democrats declared CA‐13 a must‐win battleground. It’s clear that if we lose this race, we lose the House majority! My movement is for the people, not for corporations. That’s why I refuse to take corporate dark money — and why this is a 100% people‐powered campaign. The stakes are sky‐high, Peter. It’s time to stand together and secure our Democratic majority, bring people‐first representation to CA-13, and WIN! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Together, we can do this! — Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us defeat MAGA Republicans, make a=. Patriot,
This is critical.
As we've seen in the Pennsylvania Republican Senate Primary race - _it has STILL not been called_ \- the elections this November are going to BE CLOSE. That means Republicans nationwide MUST be ready for whatever dirty tricks the Left throws our way.
_In fact, the far-Left Democrats and their coastal elitist, billionaire donors are pouring HUNDREDS of MILLIONS of dollars into legal funds and radical Left candidates - and we have to fight back._
Out of the MILLIONS of Americans who voted for President Trump in 2020, our team identified you as one of our top supporters - and we're calling on you NOW to stand with us again by strengthening the _**[Official 2022 NRSC Legal Fund.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513726:6FedO9oiN:m:1:3299561967:93323181E6E64FE860028DBAD5371A1E:r)**_
Our _**[2022 NRSC Legal Fund](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513726:6FedO9oiN:m:1:3299561967:93323181E6E64FE860028DBAD5371A1E:r)**_ is essential to WINNING and restoring our Republican Majority in the United States Senate. We're counting on you to bolster it - don't let us down.
**[_Please contribute $35 OR MORE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to bolster our Official 2022 NRSC Legal Fund and so we can hinder the Mega-Left from INTERFERING in this election. >>_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513726:6FedO9oiN:m:1:3299561967:93323181E6E64FE860028DBAD5371A1E:r)**

With one of the most critical elections of our lifetimes RAPIDLY approaching, we must be prepared to fight.

YOUR support is the difference between WINNING and LOSING this November, Patriot. Don't be the patriot who let our country down.

**[_Donate $35 OR MORE RIGHT NOW and strengthen the Official 2022 NRSC Legal Fund._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60513726:6FedO9oiN:m:1:3299561967:93323181E6E64FE860028DBAD5371A1E:r)**

NRSC Election Legal Fund Team

**It’s Pride Month!**

Pride is a time to celebrate the beauty and diversity of the LGBTQI+ community, but it's also a time to reflect on what more we can do as allies to ensure they have the support needed.

Let's take a moment to appreciate the history of this celebration - we owe so much to Marsha P. Johnson, Sylvia Rivera, Harvey Milk, Audre Lorde, and so many more who fought tooth and nail for visibility, acceptance, and equality.

Today and every day, Ann and our campaign stand with every LGBTQI+ American in the ongoing struggle against intolerance, discrimination, and injustice.

name: Sen. Chuck Edwards
subject: News Out of Raleigh; Major Updates
body:
What's New in NC?
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Having Trouble Viewing This Email? [CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HGmsvVXf34_CTIVigi5qKzoC6ajxaTbZsJw3LLrqHZDU0WL8cJGQgKhRMje1UNr8y9yJipeRjnWHJpbucvM0-_Io5KqHOLBmuQ==&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==)
---
| | |
---
| Parents Rights, Healthcare, & More
---
| | |
---|---
|
FROM MY SENATE DESK

The NC Senate is back for our even-year "short session." While we have a consensus that we intend to hold this session to last only six weeks, we are engaged with some of the most consequential and potential beneficial debates in my six years of serving the people of North Carolina.

Following is a brief recap of some of the current goings-on from Raleigh.

To get legislative news closer to the time it's happening, be sure to follow me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HO9rhRvOF_cpQvzyvTKZBM6cH_nw6RBWLlvsXgh8CI-5Vv5CcEjyseCA0I_M8wDm2y--NXJTKj-IoU1h2-aQfOrlpSRXogliRjF__Hi5zSC6Wkbu1uFpE9A=&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==) or frequently visit my [website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HCclKQPYSVDQWyOjc872rAKnChIsfjWcS1XiPlN3d1yUjIzQEmVymLuEHAtys2fUN5WbDrVwoLaVPEKTxSaEtcc=&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==).
| | |
---|---
|

Chuck Edwards, Senator
NC District 48
| | |
---
| Protecting Parenting: The Parents' Bill of Rights
---
| | |
---|---
|
I voted YES for the Parents Bill of Rights. It passed the Senate almost strictly along party lines and now resides in the House.

The COVID-19 pandemic put a strain on many of North Carolina's economic drivers such as tourism, leisure activities, and the traditional day-to-day that many families were accustomed to. The pandemic positively provided parents with a glimpse into their child's education through virtual learning. Parents have grown concerned by the material and methods used to teach our young ones. This includes the use of critical race theory - denoting a child is worse or better than their peers based on their gender or the color of their skin due to the actions of distant ancestors - and sexualized or racist books. This eye-opening opportunity made parents realize their perceived rights to influence their child's education are being quickly eroded and there is a significant lack of transparency among administrators, teachers, and parents.

The [Parents' Bill of Rights](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HGmsvVXf34_Cl6sswKpi1RCyOSvfy_sZE6z3WfA2z2J_shUIv950qkZ_N8Z8zxyfdTmGI9CDSFqylOYyD_85chiY5YTmRCvjIveYmnqfHnUhbetqMqY0_K8=&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==) addresses these growing concerns by providing a pathway for parent involvement in the classroom. Parents who want to be involved in their child's curriculum will now have the ability to request materials related to in-class instruction. Public schools must adopt policies promoting parent involvement and empowerment, and overall transparency will increase.

This bill does not demonize teachers. It provides alternative pathways to increase parental confidence in the quality of education that will shape their child's future and life outside of the classroom.

The Parents' Bill of Rights further solidifies a parent's right to know about the mental or physical well-being of their child. Struggling children deserve to be supported and receive help. This is not possible if critical information on a child's mental or physical state is withheld from their parents, who are most adept to provide the resources necessary for their child to be happy and healthy. Through these enhanced notification standards - including informing parents of the health services offered at their child's school at the start of each school year - parents will be in a better position to decide what steps need to be taken when dealing with physical or mental tribulations involving their child.

The health and safety of children beyond parental knowledge were also considered, providing a caveat that eliminates the notification requirement in instances where a child's safety is at risk. Just as this bill does not demonize teachers, it does not seek to divide and jeopardize parent-child relationships. This bill increases the amount of support provided to children and their education.

Finally, the last few provisions establish a set of standards for K-3 students that have inaccurately earned this bill the "Don't Say Gay Bill" nickname. These standards only apply to Kindergarten through 3rd Grade classrooms and do not take away the rights of any LGBTQ children or adults. They guarantee age-appropriate instruction of our youngest, most impressionable students. The early years of a child's education should be focused on fundamentals that will be built on over their academic career and lead them to future success. Gender-identity and sexual orientation lessons have no place in fundamental lessons for kindergarteners, first graders, second graders, or third graders. Teachers are not the appropriate people to determine when it is acceptable to teach these topics to a child. This bill leaves that up to the parent and the parent alone.

It is worth noting that this section about age-appropriate curriculum is strictly about the curriculum \- nothing else. It does not restrict students or teachers from sharing about same-sex parents or spouses. Teachers are still able to talk about their personal lives, we just want to ensure our youngest students are receiving age-appropriate instruction in the curriculum.

To put it simply, the Parents' Bill of Rights returns the power back to parents, so they may raise their children as they see fit.
| | |
---
| Expanding Access to Healthcare
---
| | |
---|---
|
Due to the promise from our federal government for billions more in Medicaid payments, it is now fiscally irresponsible for NC to not consider the benefits. For the last six years, I've heard from constituents on both sides of this issue and until now I've resisted the deal Washington, DC has offered states to expand.

The Affordable Care Act has caused healthcare prices to sky-rocket making them unaffordable to many. A recent healthcare study across all 50 states and the District of Columbia ranked North Carolina 47th overall for cost, access, and outcomes. With high prices, poor access, and inefficient outcomes, it has become very evident that the time to act is now.

Since the beginning, Republican members of the General Assembly - including myself - have been opposed to Medicaid expansion because, unless enacted alongside additional reforms, Medicaid expansion is terrible federal policy. So I'm sure you're wondering, why now? The reality is: The Affordable Care Act is not going away. All legal and legislative attempts to overturn it have been exhausted. The federal government continues to offer up"sweeteners" to states that haven't expanded Medicaid under the ACA and, with an additional 5% federal cost-share for NC's traditional Medicaid enrollees upon expansion, it has become good state fiscal policy.

What this means to our state is a $1.5 billion cash injection into our general fund. Then about $4.8 billion more in Medicaid payments made annually to our state, plus another $3.2 billion annually for our struggling rural hospitals, and about $45 million annually for local governments.

Safeguards have been put in place in this bill. If the feds ever break their promise on the incentives, then NC will no longer participate. We've also added a work requirement for able-bodied participants to join the plan.

In the past, North Carolina's existing Medicaid program has been broken and mismanaged. It has regularly burdened taxpayers with billion-dollar shortfalls, but fortunately, over the past decade and during my last 6 years with the General Assembly, my Republican colleagues and I have turned Medicaid around in North Carolina. We have had eight straight years of solid Medicaid budgets without cost overturns and completely reformed the system by implementing Medicaid Transformation last year.

The new federal incentives coupled with North Carolina's strong financial management and completely reformed system have created the premier opportunity to expand Medicaid while addressing the supply-side issues wanted by Conservatives that have until now prevented further access to care and address the mental health crisis our citizens are facing.

I voted YES on [HB149](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HGmsvVXf34_CqJfZhNzQz4CUXjf6cqUFAMixOIxHctASHhyVaGebgE9XWDgscXn4_ZH09bIiH9N0OD5WNVzKfXfOjlcVnD4st6ZN-12_-WwRdNyXAk0KCik=&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==), our bill to expand access to healthcare. This bill creates the Healthcare Access and Stabilization Program. This program will serve as a lifeline to NC hospitals, especially our rural hospitals. The program will ensure that hospitals are funded, healthcare workers are paid, and both the economy and jobs are secured. The bill also targets outdated restrictions on Advanced Practice Registered Nurses (APRN) and their full practice authority, saving taxpayer money and allowing registered nurses to supply medical care to the best of their abilities. We also included medical billing transparency that will protect patients from surprise medical bills.

This bill expands access to health insurance while addressing regulations that prevent providers from practicing and removing barriers that drive up costs. Because of the expansion of Medicaid, our state budget will be stronger and the longevity of our rural hospitals will be better protected. Now is the time to make this change, before we are forced to do it in the future.
| | |
---
| Supporting Employment of Our Veterans
---
| | |
---|---
|
Veteran friendliness is an ever-moving target that we must continuously strive to achieve. The selfless men and women our veteran community is composed of make extreme sacrifices to defend our freedoms and the safety of our nation, and I believe it is our duty to take care of them in return.

Across the US, over 765,000 veterans are either unemployed or underemployed. This statistic is unacceptable. This week, we took further steps to support our veterans, increase veteran friendliness, and reduce the rate of unemployment among veterans through [H370, ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HGmsvVXf34_COEsUm7cxIhIjh93yM1VbvDP7NQDQJXUefGzjUDYsT1nKTnCIA6TboDhJa-8xGtJPUp1TtZO9RBFLzXI7Da0DuUcbT5qxGr9Fhqf-pbLOZ-E=&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==)[Veterans Employment Act](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HGmsvVXf34_COEsUm7cxIhIjh93yM1VbvDP7NQDQJXUefGzjUDYsT1nKTnCIA6TboDhJa-8xGtJPUp1TtZO9RBFLzXI7Da0DuUcbT5qxGr9Fhqf-pbLOZ-E=&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==). I voted YES on this Act.

Most notably, this bill expands employment preferences for veterans by broadening the definition of veteran. A decrease in authorized wars has resulted in an influx of veterans who have not served on campaigns, expeditions, or engagements where a campaign badge or medal was authorized by the United States Department of Defense. Those are the current requirements to be eligible for veteran employment preference in the State of North Carolina. Under H370, veteran preference in North Carolina is no longer limited to those heroes who served in authorized periods of war. Today, all veterans who dedicated their lives to protecting you and your neighbor are honored, whether they were involved in an authorized period of war or not. Furthermore, the same privilege is extended to surviving spouses of veterans who did not serve in an authorized period of war, and spouses of veterans with service-related disabilities.

This expansion of the definition of 'veteran' will drastically open a narrow corridor that previously excluded thousands of veterans in North Carolina alone, and will assist in making North Carolina the most military-friendly state in the nation.
| | |
---
| Regulatory Reform Act of 2022: H.B. 911
---
| | |
---|---
|
The most comprehensive bill passed this week was the Regulatory Reform Act of 2022, [HB 911](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HGmsvVXf34_CDRmhgJC63_92f71GSobV2yKoghbGwUP0yVom4F5S1plUay98PhqIbGQ0KZU_Snwi7l2fw2pnHe-3gNvzMV2MR6GJVHaDck6-jiTpqYM5xNs=&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==). This bill addresses numerous gaps in previous regulation legislation providing additional regulatory relief to organizations, businesses, and the citizens of North Carolina.

Among the many provisions, HB 911 addresses a shortfall that has previously prevented charter schools from requesting Residency Licenses (RL) on behalf of their qualified teachers. The previous licensing language required that the local board of education submit a request for residency licenses; but, due to the fact that charter schools operate independently of traditional public schools, they are not governed by the same local board of education. This new language now allows any governing body of a public school unit, including a Board of Directors, a local board of education, etc, to request a residency license on behalf of their educator.

Furthermore, it allows sanitary districts such as the Woodfin Sanitary Water and Sewer District to create, maintain, and operate recreation programs, parks, and facilities for use by the general public in the city, county, or surrounding community. This provision opens the door to new outdoor facilities for use by community members and will seek to host additional recreational activities for children and adults to participate in. It provides a fun twist to the current abilities of sanitary districts!

Finally, the bill exempts alternative homes, such as shipping containers, from North Carolina's modular home regulations, among so much more. If you're interested in learning more about the regulatory changes made in HB 911, [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pTYuJOjHbfdYLbAxSbx54JQeSrycQKPKu5U5MpGFz6WJ7D1RhJP0HGmsvVXf34_C4HALAfIvEDlWOObRQpC6PLFDD0ZbEwVBy8ULMhNggccVZqdEfBJxwiV7qJLcN1E3IhG89PX4Y684jrAF5rhxVePwLKtsa7N4AAKYPHCyVH89S39xsSBouhUuMl7uFi4UU_IOA2Wnpi8qalT-W5dpIw==&c=Eyghua27UdUI3bXHj905pCN121q4BJXnLmFwN2hV2joE_CTAMINnHw==&ch=daLRQ7OnFyOQv1UNq-EkH-mbD0KIvqobtMW7TjCeKqBEgZBC3eHZfA==) to read all about it.
| | |
---
| Cannabis for Medicinal Use
---
| | |
---|---
|
I voted NO to the NC Compassionate Care Act. Its name is commendable to the bill's intent - the bill sponsors and my fellow legislators who supported it simply want to help people through the legalization of marijuana for medical use. But I feel their efforts are misguided, as the FDA and scientific studies all indicate there may be harmful effects from the use of marijuana that outweigh the perceived benefit discussed in anecdotal evidence by marijuana users.

These effects include but are not limited to:
* Drug abuse and addiction
* Lung disease
* Impaired driving
* Change in brain function and impaired cognition
* Cardiovascular abnormalities
* Cancer
* Among so much more.

So while people may feel like marijuana is helping to relieve the symptoms of an illness - it is merely masking that illness and adding additional deleterious side effects further harming the human body.

For me, it all comes down to this: marijuana is not a medicine. It has not gone through the same controlled-study process and been approved by the FDA just as every other medicine has. Until that takes place and all adverse impacts are understood to a point where the benefits outweigh the costs, I can not comfortably support endorsing medical marijuana for my constituents. Using a high as a band-aid does not replace scientifically approved medicines.

Not to mention, it has become my understanding through feedback from across the State and Nation that this bill seeks to be the first step in legalizing recreational marijuana. The NC Compassionate Care Act begins to carve a slippery slope to recreational drug use across the State.

Without further clinical trials to establish a safe route of administration for marijuana, its medical legalization will only exacerbate our state's drug problems and leave medical professionals to gatekeep who gets access to the substance and who doesn't. A state should not be responsible for determining what qualifies as a medicinal remedy. And legalization of this substance will only cause additional problems for those who seek to use it.
| | |
---
| Meet Lauren Radford, My New Summer Clerk
---
| | |
---|---
|
I am pleased to announce that Lauren Radford has joined the District 48 team here in Raleigh as our 2022 Summer Clerk!

Lauren is originally from Wilson, North Carolina, and graduated from Campbell University in May 2022 with a Bachelor of Arts in Political Science.

Lauren has experience working with the Harnett County District Attorney's office, but this is her first role in state government. She is very excited to be working in my office and we are thrilled to have her on our team. Her work ethic and problem-solving skills have already proved valuable.

Everybody give a warm welcome to Lauren!
| | |

While we have a consensus that we intend to hold this session to last only six weeks, we are engaged with some of the most consequential and potential beneficial debates in my six years of serving the people of North Carolina. Following is a brief recap of some of the current goings-on from Raleigh. To get legislative news closer to the time it's happening, be sure to follow me on == or frequently visit my ==. | | | ---|--- | Chuck Edwards, Senator NC District 48 | | | | Protecting Parenting: The Parents' Bill of Rights | | | ---|--- | I voted YES for the Parents Bill of Rights. It passed the Senate almost strictly along party lines and now resides in the House. The COVID-19 pandemic put a strain on many of North Carolina's economic drivers such as tourism, leisure activities, and the traditional day-to-day that many families were accustomed to. The pandemic positively provided parents with a glimpse into their child's education through virtual learning. Parents have grown concerned by the material and methods used to teach our young ones. This includes the use of critical race theory - denoting a child is worse or better than their peers based on their gender or the color of their skin due to the actions of distant ancestors - and sexualized or racist books. This eye-opening opportunity made parents realize their perceived rights to influence their child's education are being quickly eroded and there is a significant lack of transparency among administrators, teachers, and parents. The == addresses these growing concerns by providing a pathway for parent involvement in the classroom. Parents who want to be involved in their child's curriculum will now have the ability to request materials related to in-class instruction. Public schools must adopt policies promoting parent involvement and empowerment, and overall transparency will increase. This bill does not demonize teachers. It provides alternative pathways to increase parental confidence in the quality of education that will shape their child's future and life outside of the classroom. The Parents' Bill of Rights further solidifies a parent's right to know about the mental or physical well-being of their child. Struggling children deserve to be supported and receive help. This is not possible if critical information on a child's mental or physical state is withheld from their parents, who are most adept to provide the resources necessary for their child to be happy and healthy. Through these enhanced notification standards - including informing parents of the health services offered at their child's school at the start of each school year - parents will be in a better position to decide what steps need to be taken when dealing with physical or mental tribulations involving their child. The health and safety of children beyond parental knowledge were also considered, providing a caveat that eliminates the notification requirement in instances where a child's safety is at risk. Just as this bill does not demonize teachers, it does not seek to divide and jeopardize parent-child relationships. This bill increases the amount of support provided to children and their education. Finally, the last few provisions establish a set of standards for K-3 students that have inaccurately earned this bill the "Don't Say Gay Bill" nickname. These standards only apply to Kindergarten through 3rd Grade classrooms and do not take away the rights of any LGBTQ children or adults. They guarantee age-appropriate instruction of our youngest, most impressionable students. The early years of a child's education should be focused on fundamentals that will be built on over their academic career and lead them to future success. Gender-identity and sexual orientation lessons have no place in fundamental lessons for kindergarteners, first graders, second graders, or third graders. Teachers are not the appropriate people to determine when it is acceptable to teach these topics to a child. This bill leaves that up to the parent and the parent alone. It is worth noting that this section about age-appropriate curriculum is strictly about the curriculum \- nothing else. Lauren has experience working with the Harnett County District Attorney's office, but this is her first role in state government. She is very excited to be working in my office and we are thrilled to have her on our team. Her work ethic and problem-solving skills have already proved valuable. Everybody give a warm welcome to Lauren! | | | | | | | | Follow me on Facebook & Twitter and visit my == for the most current legislative updates | == == == == | | | Sen. Chuck Edwards, District 48 | 300 N. Salisbury St. #628 , Raleigh, NC 27603 | | Sent by mailto:chuck.edwards@ncleg.gov powered by

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Thank you for your activism & support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Let’s win big this November & RESTORE the Trump agenda!
| | | Peter,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Everywhere we look, things are a mess.

The Biden-Democrat agenda, from socialist spending sprees to borders chaos to their endless assault against our rights and our conservative values, is destroying our nation... **this November is our chance to win big and _RESTORE THE TRUMP AGENDA_ in Washington, and we have just months to go!**

Thank you so much for all of your activism and support. I’m grateful beyond words to have you on our fight-to-win grassroots team.

The busy summer campaign season is now here – with our Alabama primary runoff less than three weeks away now – and we’re kicking our efforts into high gear.

We can’t do this without you, Peter.

We need your help to **KEEP ALABAMA RED** and **DEFEAT THE LEFT**!

The End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline is also coming up fast, on June 30th. This is our most important deadline yet this year, and we’re going to be setting a big goal in order to fund our efforts this summer.

Today, I’m asking top supporters to step up help us get a solid head start.

[**Will you pitch in a special contribution?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/802b93c586d91f77/3f729925d5c53ea1c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

Thank you, again, for being part of the team. And thank you in advance for any donation you can send at this critical time.

Together, I know we can get the job done to STOP this far-left lunacy in Washington.

\- Coach

name: Send Corey 2022
subject: REMINDER: Free Event Saturday night in Yakima!
body:
Join us for live music, drinks, hors d'oeuvres, and speakers as we celebrate our farmers and ranchers!
| | | |
---
You are invited
---
|
---
A Celebration & Agriculture Policy Announcement!
---
|
---
Congressional candidate Corey Gibson is the founder and president of the America First P.A.C.T., a national alliance of America First candidates dedicated to fighting the swamp and enacting America First policy in congress. Corey will announce the P.A.C.T. 's America First agriculture platform and outline their plan to secure food independence and fight for America's farmers and ranchers.
---

Join us for live music, drinks, hors d'oeuvres, and speakers as we celebrate our farmers and ranchers!
---
Guest Speakers include:
\- Congressional Candidate, Corey Gibson - - America First P.A.C.T. member and congressional candidate, Leif Johnson - - Animal sciences and land management expert, Frank Hendrix - - Grower and owner of Valicoff Estates, Rob Valicoff - - Musical Guest/Fiddle Player, Kelly Iverson -

When: Saturday, June 4th | 6:30 pm - 10:00 pm
Where: Valicoff Estates, 3081 Konnowac Pass Wapato, WA 98951

Suggested donation of $100 - $2,900 to help send Corey to congress

---
Patriotic to the core,
Corey Gibson

subject: Don’t let Sisolak’s DC allies buy this election…
body:
It’s bad enough that elections in Nevada are currently controlled by single-party Democrat rule...

| Peter,
It's bad enough that elections in Nevada are currently controlled by single-party Democrat rule...
But thanks to a big spend from Sisolak's allies in DC, this next election is going to have millions of dollars of Democrat influence in it as well.
When I'm Governor of this great state, I'm going to make sure our elections are secure by putting forward a reform package that ends ballot harvesting, requires Voter ID, and puts an end to universal mail voting. But first, to compete with millions of dollars being spent by national Democrats against me, can you rush in towards our campaign so they don't BUY this critical election? Every bit helps!

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I’m behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
I’m worried we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority.
Hey Fellow American,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=972407b8d86244a3b3fba4b2b3506063&_e=FA3ettJhVsEwYSIi8M52M5sl2Q80ibI9KndFd6GFjiN-OmuduMSBjaAFs3YbBXNhvVSp3JjBIkAT91oaZ4FrKpDOHTqSrN6io0Aok9LftFGQ73Y6y6ykmK_nxZCbBCcjZ0apMOiC4afp57BUiFKamg-3U_dmJYp6-_T80wWIrwgmjBcULbuwmJ2flZY9NHUo8C279MZ4HRqkBqsXR_17hRl2-GwMiYKdBillMYI-NvziPCwKk-p18JDcTF2ydOCORd-XrCZgKg3zEaEMt_tuBLtx2qxKBqxc8BnO1FRYWCfn9zhYIW6gIkm18Xkp9E0J3sdskCLNCbnL6_PGhnHL1-shw5_bfixPxSkXTLgw5O1geEPedgMUhXbr7BZnyoN-)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=972407b8d86244a3b3fba4b2b3506063&_e=FA3ettJhVsEwYSIi8M52M5sl2Q80ibI9KndFd6GFjiN-OmuduMSBjaAFs3YbBXNhvVSp3JjBIkAT91oaZ4FrKpDOHTqSrN6io0Aok9LftFGQ73Y6y6ykmK_nxZCbBCcjZ0apMOiC4afp57BUiFKamvQ3O-6K3XJqFfpV3rpBRtNUTS2ZqRPW0N6_iQ_6cKoCxaYphqZ2dFjWZlxtuL_BF5eplk1Jzzz_kCBhFRhoMrsOVBP_lmHGw-zMgVIjKhHnPzm3pEvk1txcFGuRE_EuldFS3w-cmomxnFC7_w3YRdZfr5myFMjKhVoQ-Ry9aql283DLgxRoGGjDEVAzaqpEJ5S6QXNfnBU3FOXnYE8uqzGY2MatIr5KWHhoHCcfvYVx)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=972407b8d86244a3b3fba4b2b3506063&_e=FA3ettJhVsEwYSIi8M52M5sl2Q80ibI9KndFd6GFjiN-OmuduMSBjaAFs3YbBXNhvVSp3JjBIkAT91oaZ4FrKpDOHTqSrN6io0Aok9LftFGQ73Y6y6ykmK_nxZCbBCcjZ0apMOiC4afp57BUiFKamlnSUuAnsHsqU2UCXiEE61gmA5F-jSxFYd_f3Y_fr9_XzQKdgLIL3Gaaf_zjiG5iMf5XFRVhytEVbyoGni_B9MpdgeSMrJgunybSTNdxh7E-QD27si-k8NK4uvQg908SvyTzafee-1gsOVEN1wftYg_EuK2UbUJiAANK2KCFFK1dCB5VMQYB_BW2iY0Brc2FIv1xWD7z3yd3WMYoA9ekGk7d4Xd4t8uksbUIfUR5Zxou)
It’s not just me, Fellow American, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. [**Will you give $5 or $10 and be one of the 250 donors I need to win?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=972407b8d86244a3b3fba4b2b3506063&_e=FA3ettJhVsEwYSIi8M52M5sl2Q80ibI9KndFd6GFjiN-OmuduMSBjaAFs3YbBXNhvVSp3JjBIkAT91oaZ4FrKpDOHTqSrN6io0Aok9LftFGQ73Y6y6ykmK_nxZCbBCcjZ0apMOiC4afp57BUiFKamgxM6bUnrnPSVYhIOjzc1h0ulAKQoaIy8GH9Tj580eVpxRoadblFfHUntVu-KJL01kMYQZ-UphcQ0iJ1wenWRwXh_WjBZj4w0wGdg0RGBUcwNhe2rwp6Pu3RLz9NSXiZbB2Vz5JFoeDx5tTG-MKgMM9pSZ5Wr8QV1QpbE0deZIz2nUe9ln0LuJA6LCaaL8q-i5KFpNSuOL3W-4CO6jK_4tHDVC_H5LzqiV7VRxRmsVFz)

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=972407b8d86244a3b3fba4b2b3506063&_e=FA3ettJhVsEwYSIi8M52M5sl2Q80ibI9KndFd6GFjiN-OmuduMSBjaAFs3YbBXNhvVSp3JjBIkAT91oaZ4FrKpDOHTqSrN6io0Aok9LftFGQ73Y6y6ykmK_nxZCbBCcjZ0apMOiC4afp57BUiFKamkExGx-M26K7j_Jgyv6mYb7FUB7r4hJqBY1h2ihd9e2quIYA_RPhVFbJnfGtObPC89tFgTsj2Jn5kG6zGsOhSK-Th8RQ3O08jBKlqSDme9Pc2FQvxKwddpNBjIuSJ4Co3EwnRlB9405f5G0rMhgej7NGoQbevRj_OTfAzIruJDapypsqfjWASsatCm3SH2U_S7WIQNfRiRx0kFkQIA_ZTMPgH-fBIBJ1SZ6MNcy2Kjzg)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Will you invest in this movement?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

When someone donates to Justice Democrats, they usually give around $18 —
our 2022 average is $18.43, to be exact.

That’s not normal for most Democrats or Democratic organizations. While
they’re willing to take money from corporations and GOP mega-donors, we
rely 100% on grassroots support.

With your help, we’ve built an organization dedicated to electing
working-class progressive leaders. Justice Democrats in Congress, like
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman, are carrying on
the work of the political revolution, and we’re dedicated to electing more
people to Congress who are running on many of the transformative policies
Bernie Sanders made popular in 2016.

We’ve done it without massive corporations and wealthy conservative
donors. The average donor to Justice Democrats looks a whole lot more like
the average American than donors to most other political organizations —
because together, we’re fighting for an economy that works for all of us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110175?refcode=em20220603-23672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=23672%2E1203867%2EAJvXGM ]That’s why we’re writing today — will you be one of those supporters,
and help us keep up the fight for the ideals that unite us by making
your first
contribution today? Whether it’s $3, $18.43, or $50, each contribution
helps us elect more progressive fighters to Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110175?refcode=em20220603-23672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23672%2E1203867%2EAJvXGM ]Contribute

Right now is the best time to make your first contribution to Justice
Democrats. Last month we faced attacks from corporate-funded right-wing
Super PACs. But we can’t just out-organize the corporate interests. We
need to outraise them.

We’re proud of how many people have chosen to invest in our movement. The
more money we’re able to raise, the more races we can compete in — because
the Democratic establishment has unlimited campaign money, we can only
realistically run campaigns in a handful of districts. The more resources
we have, the more corporate Democrats we’re able to take on.

We can only make critical strategic calls when we have resources in hand —
we’ll never take the millions from Wall Street, Big Oil, or Silicon Valley
billionaires like the Democratic establishment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110175?refcode=em20220603-23672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23672%2E1203867%2EAJvXGM ]That’s why we’re asking, can you donate your first $3 or
whatever you can right now, so we can build on our wins this year, keep
winning, and expand our reach?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110175?refcode=em20220603-23672&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23672%2E1203867%2EAJvXGM ]Contribute

Together we can win the battle to transform our democracy into something
that truly fights for the people — not powerful corporate interests, not
fossil fuel barons, and not the billionaires.

We’re lucky to have you with us in this fight,

Team JD

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220603-23672-footer&t=1024&refcode2=23672_1203867_AJvXGM&akid=23672%2E1203867%2EAJvXGM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=23672%2E1203867%2EAJvXGM

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Friend, liberals have made it clear: the American people are the enemy. Their new bill proved it - that's why I stopped it in the Senate. **[FIGHT BACK: CHIP IN >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhrs0pohuap046ufb9der1e8sjqbnv6iojv41bl8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge2or4c3h2bs)** The "Domestic Terror" legislation should have been called by its more accurate name: the Democrat plan to brand our police and soldiers as white supremacists and neo-Nazis. _How insulting._ **The bill also created two other Thought Police offices at the Department of Justice and at the FBI.******_This seems like a self-defeating choice since elsewhere in the bill, we are told that federal law enforcement is shot through with White supremacists and neo-Nazis! _ You couldn't make this stuff up, Friend - but it tells you exactly how radical Democrats in Washington are getting. We literally just got done taking down the DHS Ministry of Truth, and just a day later, Democrats tried to create DHS Thought Police we had to take down too! Now don't get me wrong - I will never back down from this fight. But Friend, I could really use help to put an end to this radical reign and TAKE BACK THE SENATE. Please, join me now by making an immediate donation.__
