name: Ben Carson
subject: Get your free copy of 5 Answers to Critical Race Theory
body:
Racial tensions have certainly been on the rise in recent years. And unfortunately, it has led to a growing divide in America.

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=2ecc8032ba924f338ac6f5f55b077379&_t=qHYKzKR9jw1EZ2jCSqz5Pj8YX3AsQAsIUw70IGBaXw4ZlVSQH0ETAI-8vN5LeNCGKd5lqrM050Jichp6A16fx3Nt3z3CWlfq8A197wi7yPTKdkv4P5sw2WwlU_YCR7LRKIbkRA7M5y3PQNRF4xccomkLrE7fJ_i4iSTLK8k-Y2sj8DUaHdNGtsMyr-GRpkTpdscWzB3as6aMl_y2TuTYlyugCKI26dZEy1RWC0riLZA%3D)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, Racial tensions have certainly been on the rise in recent years. And unfortunately, it has led to a growing divide in America.

But it doesn't have to be this way.

Many of the arguments made in support of ideas like Critical Race Theory (CRT) ignore reality. They promote victimhood and perpetuate the divide that has already gripped our nation. We all need to push back against these divisive and harmful beliefs.

To better equip you, we've created a new eBook that provides answers to many of the "questions" that those promoting CRT like to use. Please get your copy of _5 Answers to Critical Race Theory._

I'm emailing because I really want to make sure that you get your free copy today. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=2ecc8032ba924f338ac6f5f55b077379&_e=wuhi8R7sPT9edCmEGw_YJnUH4y_h4w3Zi-lfr1fIac81jahKISNqf0K7dDkwg6wUs_bRCIf1gM23d8uJYrYV6c1BaeNVrujKEQm0M1loV_NoG3KM1IO-1IjUm9uVWyw_CcBy9tRgUsFvlYIxDWkt4x9JSWDOFhy_2__NkhEA6Y6M--WNOENJKAgayeYqC_M9tkX3zPdGBh1XssL0IhDmr8a9v-nH3usxoqrMOhcNhFWf1mQZiJlCpOH_Kw-s6M9UrqjP3FhkltX6lHkxOA-TSuwcUnNLdPQIg0hWPpmW73RTaw7Ij6894pJkHGgetWxzXQF-O0P0CSzucMBc_bOG_8ybZhyMZ-CFpaBucu6ip87mgNHGW-vtf2qkKF6-gty5CTvcG67QzsWcq8MtanDGCaX4JV9g4yyefQKnqz7R8PEZXcH72x69yugxPxjWqzXgJzmUMCOyc2P8Bf-FQ9zapA%3D%3D) Inside, you'll learn some of the history and solutions to
* Racial disparities of the wealth gap
* Criminal justice biases
* And housing issues

We also take some time to provide common sense, conservative solutions to many of the issues related to the racial divide in America.

Please be sure to get your free copy of this important eBook right now. I really think you'll find the information valuable. You can access it using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/5-answers-to-crt/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=2ecc8032ba924f338ac6f5f55b077379&_e=wuhi8R7sPT9edCmEGw_YJnUH4y_h4w3Zi-lfr1fIac81jahKISNqf0K7dDkwg6wUs_bRCIf1gM23d8uJYrYV6c1BaeNVrujKEQm0M1loV_NoG3KM1IO-1IjUm9uVWyw_CcBy9tRgUsFvlYIxDWkt4x9JSWDOFhy_2__NkhEA6Y6M--WNOENJKAgayeYqC_M9tkX3zPdGBh1XssL0IhDmr8a9v-nH3usxoqrMOhcNhFWf1mQZiJlCpOH_Kw-s6M9UtPApo2-hlqcViTG51cGtHfb9WGjYGJ6_BP94AFSCHfTf3DFcbLr4zOZVqBJFmKl_Vv36rNgQx8ddIY4OXJWE37G46YEelzMWdum3BXC7aQiG4NKLAIbDjhzb06MapCKT8MDkuQmOHWat05ZAGxtH_PwQO5Ph2arjvfTWM6vzKHvdEgQyv4R5qCAF6hEspruvOkL0Ofm1YYoBmd6leNIdSQ%3D%3D) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Here’s your founding donor link, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The support we get from founding donors right now is even more critical because we know fundraising can slow down over the summer, even during an election year.
#
Peter,
Two weeks ago, Pramila launched her re-election campaign for Washington’s 7th Congressional District. And she re-doubled her commitment to protect our Democratic majorities in Washington and elect more people-first progressives.
Pramila relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you, and not a cent in corporate PAC money. According to our records, you’ve not yet responded to our founding donor emails, so we wanted to give you one last chance!
**Whether you’ve given in the past or haven’t donated yet, please use this link to become an official founding donor of Pramila’s 2022 re-election campaign:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-founding-donor-2022?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20220603**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13975?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20220603&amount=3&t=1&akid=1317%2E420207%2Ejg-ZJ2)
**[Become a founding donor](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13975?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20220603&amount=3&t=2&akid=1317%2E420207%2Ejg-ZJ2)**
The support we get from founding donors right now is even more critical because we know fundraising can slow down over the summer, even during an election year. What grassroots folks can give right now can help us plan out our campaign strategy for these important next few months — that includes helping people-first progressives win their primaries.
When Pramila is talking to voters in our district or out campaigning for one of the progressives she’s endorsed, she’s always thinking about how we can deliver for the people. That means policies like Medicare for All, the PRO Act, the Women’s Health Protection Act, bold action on climate change, and canceling student debt. It also means pushing our Democratic majority to take important steps towards these goals — by lowering health care costs for working families, protecting workers, securing strong environmental regulations, and more.
The only way we can achieve these things in 2023 and beyond is if we hold our Democratic majority and grow our Congressional Progressive Caucus. Your support right now as a founding donor will help us do the critical electoral work in WA-7 and beyond.
**Become a founding donor to Pramila’s re-election campaign by donating to this link:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-founding-donor-2022?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20220603**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13975?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20220603&amount=3&t=3&akid=1317%2E420207%2Ejg-ZJ2)
**[Become a founding donor](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13975?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20220603&amount=3&t=4&akid=1317%2E420207%2Ejg-ZJ2)**
Thank you for being with us in this work.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220603-1317-footer&t=5&refcode2=1317_420207_jg-ZJ2&akid=1317%2E420207%2Ejg-ZJ2)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: The support we get from founding donors right now is even more critical because we know fundraising can slow down over the summer, even during an election year. Peter, Two weeks ago, Pramila launched her re-election campaign for Washington’s 7th Congressional District. And she re-doubled her commitment to protect our Democratic majorities in Washington and elect more people-first progressives. Pramila relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you, and not a cent in corporate PAC money. According to our records, you’ve not yet responded to our founding donor emails, so we wanted to give you one last chance! Whether you’ve given in the past or haven’t donated yet, please use this link to become an official founding donor of Pramila’s 2022 re-election campaign: The support we get from founding donors right now is even more critical because we know fundraising can slow down over the summer, even during an election year. What grassroots folks can give right now can help us plan out our campaign strategy for these important next few months — that includes helping people-first progressives win their primaries. When Pramila is talking to voters in our district or out campaigning for one of the progressives she’s endorsed, she’s always thinking about how we can deliver for the people. That means policies like Medicare for All, the PRO Act, the Women’s Health Protection Act, bold action on climate change, and canceling student debt. It also means pushing our Democratic majority to take important steps towards these goals — by lowering health care costs for working families, protecting workers, securing strong environmental regulations, and more. The only way we can achieve these things in 2023 and beyond is if we hold our Democratic majority and grow our Congressional Progressive Caucus. Your support right now as a founding donor will help us do the critical electoral work in WA-7 and beyond. Become a founding donor to Pramila’s re-election campaign by donating to this link: Thank you for being with us in this work. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Official Trump Alerts
subject: June 3rd Update
body:
Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
| |
---|---|---
|
# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump June 2nd, 2022 Endorsement of Tim Michels Tim Michels is a very successful businessman running for Governor of the Great State of Wisconsin. During my Administration, Tim served on my infrastructure task force, and helped us plan and start building the Keystone XL Pipeline before Joe Biden launched his assault on American Energy production. The current Governor, Tony Evers, has been an abject failure for the people of Wisconsin, from his abysmal handling of the China Virus, where his lockdowns were unprecedented, to rampant crime across the State. Wisconsin needs a Governor who will Stop Inflation, Uphold the Rule of Law, strengthen our Borders (we had the strongest borders in history just two years ago, now we have the weakest!) and End the well-documented Fraud in our Elections. Tim Michels is the best candidate to deliver meaningful solutions to these problems, and he will produce jobs like no one else can even imagine. Tim is an America First Conservative who Supports our Second Amendment, Honors our Brave Law Enforcement and First Responders, and Stands Strongly against the Woke Mob trying to destroy our Country. Tim Michels has my Complete and Total Endorsement. If Wisconsin has the wisdom to make Tim their next governor, it will have unprecedented success! | [View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkMtugzAQRb_G7EDGNg8vWOShRKoiVe0qO-QwdmKEDQETSr--JiVdVLJs-Z6Zq7kDRQZUQBzogmBCcIppnDBO00jlTKUJSwhcVBJLihiuWjvI_iGcfshhtNpJiKo2uBUQM6UwU5xzyiTOY8VpXMmLyJMkhpwETXFzrhsQ3SBy8GeapghaKxqoXT-aztsYL1s5DesT1rw2gk_z5YERPYzOlEaCHg2ie2mEbhBJF3Fox76SXrRVUwrTNVrNK6r8V-ir9fCVLaxHK0vaQzl2IJx8VbbWSet-XcL66-24pTM_M49L22jw4J940-DT7GFz2vHTMegL6CbdNHpIM7-o6zLgkilYJypQtkWEPLsIea6BkPOHqrP7ld5D9vkdsndsF0Z2_nZzJ_8KV49ojU1Qtv8B2KmK0w)
---
Donald J. Trump June 2nd, 2022
Endorsement of Blake Masters
Blake Masters is one of the most successful businessmen and investors in the Country, having led a multibillion-dollar firm that invests in new technology and many other emerging companies. In addition, he runs a nonprofit foundation that promotes science and innovation. In other words, he is a great modern-day thinker! A graduate of Stanford University and Stanford University Law School, a fantastic student, Blake is also the author of The New York Times bestseller, “Zero to One.”

Despite having such an amazing business career and wonderful family, Blake has decided that he wants to make a difference for the people of our Country, and is therefore running for the United States Senate from the Great State of Arizona.

Blake is Strong on Border Security, in particular, the disastrous Southern Border where people are pouring into the U.S. by the millions, and destroying our Country. Just two years ago, with the help of the Wall, we had the Strongest Border in the history of our Country, and now we have the weakest—Blake will turn that around quickly.

Additionally, he will Cut Taxes and Regulations, be Tough on Crime, and Support our Military and our Vets. Blake will fight for our totally under-siege Second Amendment, and WIN!

Mark Brnovich is such a disappointment to me. He is the current Arizona Attorney General, and while he understands what took place in the 2020 Presidential Election, and that it was Rigged and Stolen, he only views it as something he would like not to see happen again. The Arizona State Senate gave him overwhelming evidence of fraud and irregularities, issued a report which was damning, and he did nothing about it. In other words, all talk and no action! As an example, hundreds of “mules” trafficked ballots in the 2020 Election in Arizona, and Brnovich has refused to hold them accountable. The Maricopa County Board of Supervisors refused to comply with a lawful Arizona Senate subpoena, and Brnovich failed to use his authority to compel the County to turn the information over. He didn’t want to make “waves.” Brnovich, therefore, does not support clean and fair elections, or law and order, and could not properly represent the people of Arizona in the United States Senate.

Arizona is a State where the 2020 Election was Rigged and Stolen, and a very thorough audit proved it. Blake knows that the “Crime of the Century” took place, he will expose it and also, never let it happen again.

It is my great honor to give Blake Masters my Complete and Total Endorsement!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxVUE1vgzAM_TXhBgpJIOPAoWvVXSpN22k3FHDShoXwlZS1v36hY5MmWbb8nv3kZyg5UAFppEuCCcE5pmnGCpon6ompPGMZgVplqaSI4aa3s5yuwumrnL3VTkLS9NGlzDBQVqRc1ZzLlDWYFk2dgapVkeacisiUF-eGGdEdIscQy7Ik0FthoHWT74Yg0wXYymXeStwqfm_Hz2m-YkSP3nVVJ0H7DtGD7IQ2iOQrOPd-amQAbWMq0Q1Gq9tGNaEV-mwD-estbr2VFZ2g8gMIJ38ne-ukdT8qMWnbMbtnzH8FurJGw6rwH7xoCG4OsDvti9NLNJUwLNoYPec8POq8Hrh6iraLSsSfESGPLUIebyDk4021fDzTMWbv95i9YrtyZB-yuw3yb3DTSDbbBPHDN7dli-4)
---
[Unsubscribe](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJytj81uwjAMx58mvVElztd6yIGB4IKEttOuaT5oprSUJmViT79QdXuCSZZl_23_bFslLdWWVEEBBsACU8JZQ0XtX5gXnHGwrefEUcSwuQ7JTXedw92leQjZ2dpcq05py6iQmPOmxV4SMIIUjGgdbTRmmldRdTmPCdEtgkMxY3I9zCa6Obleh1gwfZF1P8bgHyVKc5vMFMYcys6Sz8OqtO7_SIgeumALa2-3p11zOlaTsuNXiDEkIcvDl19itfIUkq8IYJkCWI4A-Hjzn_J2obcNe__esDMenjXYFZ8fo_trXBn1cudTlfsfcUZ6Xg)

name: Charlie Crist (personal inbox)
subject: Look at this guy …
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46092129/348778988/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220603_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjlhMjI1Yy03NmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=28TPiUs3znfG34SZ3nTogCL-pXQO-P81HyMRf2mHu4Y=)
---
Look at this guy, folks.

Ron DeSantis has bullied kids for wearing masks. He’s signed abhorrent anti-choice legislation into law that strips women across Florida of their reproductive freedom. He’s for eliminating common sense gun safety measures, attacked voting rights and silenced LGBTQ+ voices.

And now, he’s got all the momentum for the 2024 Republican presidential nomination.

He really is the _worst_ of the Republican Party.

_**So folks, I’m shocked that more people aren’t stepping up to stop him in his tracks right now!**_

If we can defeat him in November, we’ll be able to repeal his horrible legislation and block his path to the presidency ... it’s that simple.

**_[But right now, we’re not doing enough to defeat him. So I need your help. Donald J. Trump June 2nd, 2022
Endorsement of Tim Michels
Tim Michels is a very successful businessman running for Governor of the Great State of Wisconsin.

During my Administration, Tim served on my infrastructure task force, and helped us plan and start building the Keystone XL Pipeline before Joe Biden launched his assault on American Energy production.

The current Governor, Tony Evers, has been an abject failure for the people of Wisconsin, from his abysmal handling of the China Virus, where his lockdowns were unprecedented, to rampant crime across the State.

Wisconsin needs a Governor who will Stop Inflation, Uphold the Rule of Law, strengthen our Borders (we had the strongest borders in history just two years ago, now we have the weakest!) and End the well-documented Fraud in our Elections. Tim Michels is the best candidate to deliver meaningful solutions to these problems, and he will produce jobs like no one else can even imagine. Tim is an America First Conservative who Supports our Second Amendment, Honors our Brave Law Enforcement and First Responders, and Stands Strongly against the Woke Mob trying to destroy our Country.

Tim Michels has my Complete and Total Endorsement. If Wisconsin has the wisdom to make Tim their next governor, it will have unprecedented success!

Donald J. Trump June 2nd, 2022
Endorsement of Blake Masters
Blake Masters is one of the most successful businessmen and investors in the Country, having led a multibillion-dollar firm that invests in new technology and many other emerging companies. In addition, he runs a nonprofit foundation that promotes science and innovation. In other words, he is a great modern-day thinker! A graduate of Stanford University and Stanford University Law School, a fantastic student, Blake is also the author of The New York Times bestseller, “Zero to One.”

Despite having such an amazing business career and wonderful family, Blake has decided that he wants to make a difference for the people of our Country, and is therefore running for the United States Senate from the Great State of Arizona.

Blake is Strong on Border Security, in particular, the disastrous Southern Border where people are pouring into the U.S. by the millions, and destroying our Country. Just two years ago, with the help of the Wall, we had the Strongest Border in the history of our Country, and now we have the weakest—Blake will turn that around quickly.

Additionally, he will Cut Taxes and Regulations, be Tough on Crime, and Support our Military and our Vets. Blake will fight for our totally under-siege Second Amendment, and WIN!

Mark Brnovich is such a disappointment to me. He is the current Arizona Attorney General, and while he understands what took place in the 2020 Presidential Election, and that it was Rigged and Stolen, he only views it as something he would like not to see happen again. The Arizona State Senate gave him overwhelming evidence of fraud and irregularities, issued a report which was damning, and he did nothing about it. In other words, all talk and no action! As an example, hundreds of “mules” trafficked ballots in the 2020 Election in Arizona, and Brnovich has refused to hold them accountable. The Maricopa County Board of Supervisors refused to comply with a lawful Arizona Senate subpoena, and Brnovich failed to use his authority to compel the County to turn the information over. He didn’t want to make “waves.” Brnovich, therefore, does not support clean and fair elections, or law and order, and could not properly represent the people of Arizona in the United States Senate.

Arizona is a State where the 2020 Election was Rigged and Stolen, and a very thorough audit proved it. Blake knows that the “Crime of the Century” took place, he will expose it and also, never let it happen again.

It is my great honor to give Blake Masters my Complete and Total Endorsement!

He is the current Arizona Attorney General, and while he understands what took place in the 2020 Presidential Election, and that it was Rigged and Stolen, he only views it as something he would like not to see happen again. The Arizona State Senate gave him overwhelming evidence of fraud and irregularities, issued a report which was damning, and he did nothing about it. In other words, all talk and no action! As an example, hundreds of “mules” trafficked ballots in the 2020 Election in Arizona, and Brnovich has refused to hold them accountable. The Maricopa County Board of Supervisors refused to comply with a lawful Arizona Senate subpoena, and Brnovich failed to use his authority to compel the County to turn the information over. He didn’t want to make “waves.” Brnovich, therefore, does not support clean and fair elections, or law and order, and could not properly represent the people of Arizona in the United States Senate. Arizona is a State where the 2020 Election was Rigged and Stolen, and a very thorough audit proved it. Blake knows that the “Crime of the Century” took place, he will expose it and also, never let it happen again. It is my great honor to give Blake Masters my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 |

BREAKING NEWS: Biden supports banning assault weapons as an option for gun control

15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign Now to urge Congress to Ban Assault Weapons >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons]
Sign the Petition → [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons]

This petition is for dpwillis67@gmail.com.

When America had an assault weapons ban from 1994-2004, mass shootings were down by over 40%.

This year alone, there have been over 230 mass shootings.

We need Congress to act immediately to pass an assault weapons ban.

Our nation is in the midst of a gun violence crisis. Every day, more than 110 Americans die from gun violence. We don’t have to be numb to this. We don’t have to live like this. We don’t have to die like this.

But without enough public support, Congress may not take this critical action on gun safety. So we’re gathering 15,000 Democrats to pressure Congress to Ban Assault Weapons. The petition closes at midnight. Please sign the petition immediately: [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Adam=20Schindler?=
subject: We Need Change in Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5dd883e3ae22/we-need-change-in-congress-9250971?e=e1c04ba93f)
---
| | _If you would prefer to be removed from this list, please click to [unsubscribe](https://schindler4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=26f52603239d4d900dd89d343&id=ad3bcefc65&e=e1c04ba93f). _
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# I Will Work to Change Government** **
Dear San Diego Voter,

I am running for Congress because we need change in our government. The incumbent in District 50 is part of the problem, a career politician who takes money from corporations. I am a scientist, and I'm motivated to produce results. I'll challenge the status quo in Washington and bring new ideas to solve problems. I am asking for your help to continue my fight. **Please** **vote for Adam Schindler in the June 7 th primary**. I firmly believe that **a** **better future is possible** for our country once we change our government and get better people to lead us. If you would like to know more about me, please visit [www.schindler4congress.com](https://schindler4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=26f52603239d4d900dd89d343&id=367fa70387&e=e1c04ba93f) or reply to this email. Information on how to vote in the June 7th primary is provided below. Kindly,

Adam Schindler
Candidate for US Congress, California’s 50th District
---
|
---
|
---
| All active registered California voters have been sent a vote-by-mail ballot with a prepaid, first-class postage return envelope for the June 7, 2022, Primary Election. You have multiple safe, secure, and reliable options for returning your ballot. Whichever option you choose to return your ballot, _remember to sign the envelope in the space provided_.
* **Mail** – No stamp is required to return your ballot through the US Postal Service. Make sure your ballot is postmarked by June 7, 2022, and arrives no later than 7 days after the election.
* **Drop box** – Counties offer secure drop boxes to return your ballot. Make sure your ballot is deposited by 8:00 p.m. on June 7, 2022.
* **In person** – You can return your ballot to a polling place, vote center, or your county elections office by 8:00 p.m. on June 7, 2022. One or more voting locations in many counties will be open prior to Election Day. Voting locations will offer voter registration, replacement ballots, accessible voting machines, and language assistance.

Sign up at [WheresMyBallot.sos.ca.gov](https://schindler4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=26f52603239d4d900dd89d343&id=7be0a85b1a&e=e1c04ba93f) to receive updates on your vote-by-mail ballot via text (SMS), email, or voice call. Remember to make a plan to vote! For more information on casting your ballot, go to [vote.ca.gov](https://schindler4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=26f52603239d4d900dd89d343&id=bb200edfe5&e=e1c04ba93f).
---
|
---

Adam Schindler for Congress4231 Balboa Ave # 1193San Diego, CA 92117-5504

subject: Freedom is not conditional
body:

Peter,

“Your rights or your freedoms should not be circumscribed by your decision to take or not take a COVID vaccine.” — Governor Ron DeSantis

Governor DeSantis said this today, Peter, and his decisive leadership has proved it.

During the last three and a half years, Governor DeSantis stood strong in the face of heavy-handed mandates from Washington, leaning on freedom and personal liberty as his guiding principles.

In Florida, we will always defend the right of each and every Floridian to make their own decisions and ensure Florida remains a beachhead of freedom.

| Friend,
Rob just wrapped up another week of traveling across the state. He visited Broome, Chemung, Yates, Tioga, Schuyler, Ontario, Monroe, Genesee, Wyoming, Erie, Onondaga, Oneida, Albany, and Dutchess Counties in just 4 days.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| One thing I know about Rob is that he's a hard worker and he truly cares about the issues that are facing all New Yorkers - not just the issues that make headlines.
We need to work together to bring real leadership to Albany. I know you agree that things have gone off the rails. And I know Rob has what it takes to turn this state around and get New York back on the right track - he's done it before as the Westchester County Executive.
Rob is a man of his word, and he's the only candidate running who has a plan to fix the economic mess that Andrew Cuomo and Kathy Hochul have gotten us into.

name: Organizing Team at Beto for Texas
subject: Writing no one off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We have more than 70,000 volunteers who are giving their time to support
this campaign because they believe in Beto’s positive vision for Texas. We
will win this election by taking no one for granted and writing no one
off.

But here’s the deal: In order to compete with the $100,000,000 that Abbott
plans on spending against us, we need the resources to support — and even
expand — our grassroots organizing volunteer team.

Opening organizing offices, printing literature, buying clipboards, and
hiring staff to recruit and manage volunteers across Texas is a major
expense for us.

The Organizing Team at Beto for Texas

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: What I'm doing in Kansas City today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
Peter, we need to have an honest conversation about the toll opioids have on our community:
| | |
---
Peter, we need to have an honest conversation about the toll opioids have on our community: in our state, drug overdoses are now the leading cause of death amongst our young people. **This epidemic is tearing apart our communities, our homes, and our families in the most painful ways – and Washington is letting us down.** I know that first hand – as a nurse, as a Missourian, and as a mom.

I've put ending the opioid epidemic at the absolute heart of my campaign. **That's why I'm in Kansas City today, meeting with experts and discussing solutions to this public health emergency.** This city is one of the most impacted by opioids – especially fentanyl – in the entire United States. From 2019 to 2020, opioid deaths in Kansas City have skyrocketed by 150%.
For me, the opioid epidemic isn't some far-off concept – it's viscerally real. After a years-long battle with addiction and nearly 500 days of sobriety, I lost my beautiful son, Matt, to opioids. This issue is deeply, painfully personal to me, but – tragically – my family's story is only one out of thousands.
I care fiercely about this issue, and **that's why I released a comprehensive plan that would expand treatment options and give our communities the funding and resources they need to finally end this terrible crisis****.** **[_Could you take a moment right now to read my plan over on my website? This is incredibly important to me, so I would really appreciate just a couple of minutes of your time._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46092994/348784964/-683821599?refcode=jtk39-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGM0NWU3NS03OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qsj8077QP6WvCBCRK8viLh5kPmO5z_75pgSbyyD35fs=&emci=afb2022b-cee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=68c45e75-78e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4450063)**
| | [Read my plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46092995/348784965/-683821599?refcode=jtk39-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGM0NWU3NS03OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qsj8077QP6WvCBCRK8viLh5kPmO5z_75pgSbyyD35fs=&emci=afb2022b-cee2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=68c45e75-78e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4450063)
---
**Families, healthcare providers, and even our kids are crying out for help, but there simply aren't enough accessible, effective treatment options.** At the same time, undue shame and stigma prevent too many of us from receiving the help we need when struggling with addiction and mental health issues.
As your senator, I'll champion individuals and families struggling with addiction. I will invest in recovery. I will hold the pharmaceutical industry responsible for its role in the opioid crisis. And I'll make sure that Washington makes a real, meaningful investment in ending this crisis so that communities and treatment centers have the funding they need.
I promise you I'm working hard every day to win this campaign and end the opioid epidemic. But we'll only accomplish real change together. _[**If you're ready to help me take this work to Washington, can you pitch in a donation of $5 right now? We're going up against powerful forces, so I'm really counting on your partnership to win this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46092996/348784966/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk39-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGM0NWU3NS03OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qsj8077QP6WvCBCRK8viLh5kPmO5z_75pgSbyyD35fs=)_
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46092997/348784967/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk39-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGM0NWU3NS03OGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qsj8077QP6WvCBCRK8viLh5kPmO5z_75pgSbyyD35fs=)
---
Thank you for standing with me,

Trudy Busch Valentine
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Mr. Rod =?UTF-8?Q?Doril=C3=A1s?=
subject: “I went as a beautiful African woman.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
The ladies of "The View" are at it again. now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4q26d0d3eb2apg2cgmqp7u0emgp1v2lp96mfo8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0s766gq62ohlepj60tpkc5qm1obm6jircsr5e1gb1p5kmpir8cblchgb6c3gesrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8q6cd776kpmfchicoqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
|

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z66c854jo0at7cb2a6oggc8ndmgvnm833su4l0ig_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)

---
Fellow American,

You may or may not watch “**The View** ,” but undoubtedly, you’ve heard of the daytime talk show owing to the many outrageous things their hosts have said throughout the years. Let me remind you of a few examples:

“ _**If you kick out all of the Latinos who’s going to clean your toilets?**_ ” – Kelly Osbourn on illegal immigration

“ _**It was a Halloween party. I went as a beautiful African woman.**_ ” – Joy Behar on wearing blackface to a Halloween party

Or when Whoopie Goldberg last year had this to say when talking about the Holocaust: “ _**Well, this is white people doing it to white people. So, this is y’all go fight amongst yourselves.**_ ”

Well, now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air that she “ _**doesn’t understand black Republicans,**_ ” and that a black Republican is “ _**an oxymoron**_.”

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmh4h246mk892huja67a96o27bbr1is1p7ptd5e0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)
[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE
TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd7j7h9in686bmli3egvu759faiede9te7ibl2fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)

Fellow American, my name is Rod Dorilás and I’m not an oxymoron. I’m a trained lawyer, military veteran, 1st generation American and **proud Black Republican**. I’m a free thinker and advocate for smaller government, a robust judicial system and free and fair elections. **I believe that everyone should have the opportunity to hear the arguments both sides make to win over votes and that no one’s support** – regardless of race – should be assumed by Democrats or Republicans.

Fellow American, it’s impossible to deny that there isn’t enough African American representation in the modern Republican Party. **[That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress for a House seat representing Florida](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zddjd1vsu78i3ee74q6hhp48tmctqlka8c0ilpj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)**. I know money is tight for a lot of folks right now, but today I’m writing to see if you’d **[help me send a message to the ladies of “The View”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z32tl118miq49l1kak16mhim1u75c0ns30flgbso_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)** that there are a lot of Black Republicans in the U.S. – and we’re not an oxymoron.

[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE
TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfpfa0adntmupseip69decj5rvectjndql104438_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhg97el8c3cbji47ic7dlir1d49krn5nd15gop8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)
I believe that if voters are able to be reached equally by Democrat and Republican campaigns, Republicans would win every time. I won’t deny that my opponent is much more well-funded than I, which is why I’m making this special ask of you today.**[If you could find it in your budget to send $2](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z08c0va1kemg6d3lqdkvcj5qjc8mb38s1qplo4j0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)** to my campaign today, I’m certain I can flip this South Florida House seat on behalf of our party.

Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** CHIP IN $2 >> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd7s9avl39ncmt9d8dackjiop8b3bkskq5njtmug_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zelci006fa845evo5ifgnubqc853a620tprd1teo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c9ge6ob2c9h2bs)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

clean_body: The ladies of "The View" are at it again. now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air | Fellow American, You may or may not watch “The View ,” but undoubtedly, you’ve heard of the daytime talk show owing to the many outrageous things their hosts have said throughout the years. Let me remind you of a few examples: “ If you kick out all of the Latinos who’s going to clean your toilets? ” – Kelly Osbourn on illegal immigration “ It was a Halloween party. I went as a beautiful African woman. ” – Joy Behar on wearing blackface to a Halloween party Or when Whoopie Goldberg last year had this to say when talking about the Holocaust: “ Well, this is white people doing it to white people. So, this is y’all go fight amongst yourselves. ” Well, now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air that she “ doesn’t understand black Republicans, ” and that a black Republican is “ an oxymoron.” Fellow American, my name is Rod Dorilás and I’m not an oxymoron. I’m a trained lawyer, military veteran, 1st generation American and proud Black Republican. I’m a free thinker and advocate for smaller government, a robust judicial system and free and fair elections. I believe that everyone should have the opportunity to hear the arguments both sides make to win over votes and that no one’s support – regardless of race – should be assumed by Democrats or Republicans. Fellow American, it’s impossible to deny that there isn’t enough African American representation in the modern Republican Party. . I know money is tight for a lot of folks right now, but today I’m writing to see if you’d that there are a lot of Black Republicans in the U.S. – and we’re not an oxymoron. I believe that if voters are able to be reached equally by Democrat and Republican campaigns, Republicans would win every time. I won’t deny that my opponent is much more well-funded than I, which is why I’m making this special ask of you today. to my campaign today, I’m certain I can flip this South Florida House seat on behalf of our party. Though Maggie thought she'd become a doctor, in college she found herself pulled in the direction of social services. And after she became a mom to two children, Ben and Meg, she felt called to run for office to ensure that every family has the resources and support they need to succeed.

Since taking office, Maggie has worked to protect health care, take on corporate special interests, and lower costs for Granite State families.

clean_body: Thank you for your unwavering support of this campaign. = Team – I am so grateful for you and your unwavering support of this campaign. I want to make sure you know that your grassroots donations made a big impact – I have only gotten this far because of you. Now, our primary election day is in 4 days. We are almost at the finish line and we can’t slow down for a second. With less than a week until election day, I’m going to need all the help I can get to make it to this next benchmark. = | ****=** We can do this! One Team. One Fight. – QQ | Retired Naval Commander John Quaye Quartey II felt a call to serve his country once again after he watched extremists carry out a Trump-fueled insurrection at our nation’s Capitol. subject: Is this foreshadowing?
body:
| |

| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=7f5e45870b&e=4712f71bea)

| [Give Today!](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=de5780e3a9&e=4712f71bea "Give Today!")
---
| _“Flamboyantly vile, reckless, incendiary...he has been accused of sexual misconduct by multiple women...he has brazenly lied.”_

Every one of these descriptions is about Madison Cawthorn, the North Carolina Congressional Candidate.

But you thought I was talking about Ronny Jackson didn’t you? Well they’re two peas in a pod, and **Ronny Jackson didn’t hesitate to throw his whole-hearted support behind Cawthorn’s despicable campaign. See below!**

We must do everything in our power to prevent the women-hating, law-breaking “Conservative Coalition” from gaining power.

[**Help me keep men like these out of office by supporting my campaign, and sending an honest, hard-working candidate to DC.**](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=b24bf04c37&e=4712f71bea)
---
| [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=87c9ec3a2f&e=4712f71bea)
---
| [Donate to My Campaign Today](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=0a3e2f0b9c&e=4712f71bea "Donate to My Campaign Today")
---
| The good news is that **Madison Cawthorn ultimately lost his North Carolina primary bid. It gives me even more hope that Ronny Jackson will face the same fate here in Texas in November.**

It will take a lot of work to beat Ronny, but [**with your help I know we can do it.**](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=ee4a88d49c&e=4712f71bea)

Friends,

It’s clear as day.

**Mike Collins is a WOLF in SHEEP’s CLOTHING.**

I have been truly honored, since Day 1, to have gained President Donald J. Trump’s endorsement. Supporting the President from the start of his campaign was always the right decision and something I will always remember.

What’s truly disappointing is when folks like Mike Collins come out of the woodwork trying to embrace the President after the fact.
**Let’s get one thing straight here - I am the ONLY Trump-endorsed candidate in this race, and that’s for a very simple reason.**

I support **America-First, Georgia-First** policies that will HELP our economy, SUPPORT the working class, and EMBRACE families across the district.

That’s it - plain and simple.

[**I’m asking you TODAY to chip in and support my campaign during this runoff election.** ](http://links.vernonjonesga.com/u/click?_t=92291ee2d5f7431cae0af25302f4b82e&_m=885bdc6f5e7049439ba1d4e517713856&_e=EuuC0KcCgbWRIuSbieBmJlQrBOFKuZUtXOM4EpbIHiqn4yghZOVs3xBAIHbPWP7IsXyDOPy7oCtGHUs9mW4ucASc75UDtbni_cChJDUKCyjqJAD7dzTDpTsCWEoWjDHBDO5ri7DDHQPgxJoeblaZeSl6zI8-h_pv0cdAQh2kGywA6AGTd4IqisSkn_H_WentDHiou1msWSvXnENdeMrPW1Kd9X-5lMWw2W1Tvw1yis-yqBRNEYKhqneQqayXfaNeymNyncj5soodfWj1YJwW03Cc0mFalSOppgb1JKiy2jbGrhE9PWLvd-niXMg1rw1jljJsq80FY0d_je7H6qKUoIbY5kCwPHVs7j0ywIdmUyg_2GHjAq4VcjeH_OD2dfrdztSvKB03MchODUxtTnr2wtYQV5ILJavITpFwusb-UNdsTdAj6lxSeO67XSif8ombxbfAX9-KKXzFYm59rQYE7RPAatXBqoMkLFlHyH-ZKUF6qWUgDbQDKnMFEkKA0V9zrfMexk9Od6eoJKfXmONDsIX8ep658eqWZpbf36trwaZOa_cotwkuDLcQb51AwJ2C) June 21 is coming quickly, and I need your support to ensure that President Trump’s agenda makes it this November!

[**Can you donate $5 today to go towards costs of the runoff election?** ](http://links.vernonjonesga.com/u/click?_t=92291ee2d5f7431cae0af25302f4b82e&_m=885bdc6f5e7049439ba1d4e517713856&_e=EuuC0KcCgbWRIuSbieBmJlQrBOFKuZUtXOM4EpbIHiqn4yghZOVs3xBAIHbPWP7IsXyDOPy7oCtGHUs9mW4ucASc75UDtbni_cChJDUKCyjqJAD7dzTDpTsCWEoWjDHBDO5ri7DDHQPgxJoeblaZeSl6zI8-h_pv0cdAQh2kGywA6AGTd4IqisSkn_H_WentDHiou1msWSvXnENdeMrPW1Kd9X-5lMWw2W1Tvw1yis-yqBRNEYKhqneQqayXfaNeymNyncj5soodfWj1YJwW03Cc0mFalSOppgb1JKiy2jbGrhE9PWLvd-niXMg1rw1jljJsq80FY0d_je7H6qKUoIbY5kCwPHVs7j0ywIdmUyjH6z7l6TLbTallaOSb6S1WEHphrj2Yth6Sl_6fiouM6rDyo37A3bH3_BcR2PmI2UfK4GB4xWMGIpk3upgdlhd8jofDp874cqRGeiQ1NkhN5OmxlqDc_DTMXxY4WUYw2a_ggcu4DmDZlB2sbSwt8DqvoD4aiUCHDThqEZntfy6Sa56S6hjiuV7HEqrdMDay8ctyMu7EGeCtrIqzpuOW56i6)

Thank you for your support.

Vernon Jones

Representative Jones is an America- First candidate and one of the most visible and impassioned supporters of President Trump.
Vernon Jones is the only Trump-endorsed candidate in his race.

name: John Lira
subject: Celebrating our first year
body:
Peter,

One year ago, I established Texans for John Lira and began my campaign to serve and represent the people of TX-23.

When I launched this campaign, I never imagined we would see violence and grief on the level we have experienced this week.
In light of all that has occurred, I know it is more important than ever to fight for this district — to protect and serve by taking the fight into the halls of Congress.

Will you contribute today to make sure that one year from now, TX-23 has real leadership and true representation that will put our families’ needs and safety first?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220602?refcode=20220602]

Throughout the past year, this campaign has accomplished and seen so much.

We won our primary in March and advanced to the general election. We launched our “Boots on the Ground Tour” to visit all 29 counties in the district. We have seen devastating tragedy and loss.

Through it all, I have met and spoken with thousands of people across Texas to hear your concerns and learn more about what matters to you. I have met some wonderful and dedicated people along the way and you have inspired me to continue doing what I am doing. Thank you for that.

I have been humbled, inspired, and honored by what I have seen on the ground. Being able to speak with so many people of all different backgrounds and walks of life has taught me so much about our district and about what it means to be a representative for the people.

I will be the Congressman in TX-23 who will represent all the needs of Texans from every political persuasion.

Peter, now more than ever it is crucial that we have representatives in Texas who will fight to protect the rights and the lives of our families.

After spending the past year building relationships and laying the groundwork, I feel confident that I can bring the type of leadership Texans are asking for and I am ready to take on this challenge.

The people of TX-23 deserve more — this past year has shown me how we can get there together. I’m ready to get to Washington and continue serving. Will you chip in to power this campaign and make sure I can spend the next year doing just that?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220602?refcode=20220602]

Let’s keep it up,
John Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.

name: Patty Pansing Brooks
subject: Supporting life includes the right to choose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
When parents have to worry about whether their children are safe at school, we are not supporting life.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093358/348787300/333259033?refcode=em_220603_supportfamily&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220603_supportfamily&refcode2=e0bd6a1e-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJkNmExZS03YWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dh1qEGj6wh6mKNag8G3j2nRDMPpdEPUgvo-IvKf3b-U=)
---
| | Dear friend, **My opponent wants to make this election about abortion.** He’s been endorsed by anti-choice PACs and wants to roll back our rights to bodily autonomy, and he has promised to be a vote against Americans’ access to lifesaving health care if he wins the Special Election this month. **Like the majority of Nebraskans, I support the right to access abortion.** I believe that we support the lives of families and communities when we ensure that the people who create life have the _freedom to decide_ when and whether to bring a child into this world. _[Pitch in $25 to help me get to Congress this month →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093359/348787303/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220603_supportfamily&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220603_supportfamily&refcode2=e0bd6a1e-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJkNmExZS03YWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dh1qEGj6wh6mKNag8G3j2nRDMPpdEPUgvo-IvKf3b-U=)_ Empowering people with their own life decisions includes access to abortion care, and I will always fight to defend that right. _But it does not end there._ Supporting life includes the full spectrum of family planning, like IVF, contraception, and age-appropriate sex education. Supporting life includes crucial support for children and parents, so families can rest assured that they’ll have access to formula their babies need, and that they can take paid family leave without losing their home. Supporting life includes a promise that parents can send their children to school without worrying whether they will make it home at the end of the day. **I am fighting for a future that uplifts the lives of families and communities.** **My opponent wants to send us back to the Dark Ages.** **[If you stand with me, please consider contributing to my campaign for Congress. The Special Election is less than one month away and the stakes have never been higher:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093360/348787305/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220603_supportfamily&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220603_supportfamily&refcode2=e0bd6a1e-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJkNmExZS03YWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dh1qEGj6wh6mKNag8G3j2nRDMPpdEPUgvo-IvKf3b-U=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed instantly._ | | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093362/348787306/333259033?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_220603_supportfamily&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220603_supportfamily&refcode2=e0bd6a1e-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGJkNmExZS03YWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dh1qEGj6wh6mKNag8G3j2nRDMPpdEPUgvo-IvKf3b-U=)

clean_body: When parents have to worry about whether their children are safe at school, we are not supporting life. | = | | Dear friend, My opponent wants to make this election about abortion. He’s been endorsed by anti-choice PACs and wants to roll back our rights to bodily autonomy, and he has promised to be a vote against Americans’ access to lifesaving health care if he wins the Special Election this month. Like the majority of Nebraskans, I support the right to access abortion. I believe that we support the lives of families and communities when we ensure that the people who create life have the freedom to decide when and whether to bring a child into this world. = Empowering people with their own life decisions includes access to abortion care, and I will always fight to defend that right. But it does not end there. Supporting life includes the full spectrum of family planning, like IVF, contraception, and age-appropriate sex education. Supporting life includes crucial support for children and parents, so families can rest assured that they’ll have access to formula their babies need, and that they can take paid family leave without losing their home. Supporting life includes a promise that parents can send their children to school without worrying whether they will make it home at the end of the day. I am fighting for a future that uplifts the lives of families and communities. My opponent wants to send us back to the Dark Ages. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed instantly. | | = = | = = | = = All my best, Patty Pansing Brooks | | | | | ---|---|---|--- = Emails like this are the best way for us to reach supporters. name: Doug White
subject: Enough, enough, enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
Last week, 19 children and 2 teachers were murdered in a devastating shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas. And since then, we’ve seen a wave of mass shootings, including an attack on a hospital complex in Tulsa this week.

**Enough is enough – we cannot let this violence continue.**

In the wake of the massacre in Uvalde, our own Congressman said, “There are no words” – and he’s right.

Our children don’t need words, they need action.

Last night, ahead of National Gun Violence Awareness Day and Wear Orange Weekend, President Biden called on Congress to take real action to curb gun violence – but Dan Newhouse refuses to even discuss gun violence. He won’t consider addressing responsible gun ownership, mental health or background checks. We deserve so much better than this. It's time for a change.

[We can’t afford to do nothing in the face of gun violence – we must act now. Will you add your name to demand our leaders work together to solve the gun violence epidemic?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093523/348787903/-219500870?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220603_1_1&refcode2=2cd95ffb-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&contactdata=wGingH883EnClJ4xK8tcbYW2gySKuy8xEiupzlqQWctNYpQo9f4AzDdChNCmKWdQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Q5NWZmYi03YWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5NGTfeHZq5q-6LQWOl7FEL_sxORyOWn9G4PlHr6Chvw=&emci=ad8d814c-6be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=2cd95ffb-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=7651992) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093524/348787904/-219500870?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220603_1_1&refcode2=2cd95ffb-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&contactdata=wGingH883EnClJ4xK8tcbYW2gySKuy8xEiupzlqQWctNYpQo9f4AzDdChNCmKWdQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Q5NWZmYi03YWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5NGTfeHZq5q-6LQWOl7FEL_sxORyOWn9G4PlHr6Chvw=&emci=ad8d814c-6be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=2cd95ffb-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)**
---
As your next Congressman, I promise to be an independent leader for Central Washington. I’m not afraid to stand up to the NRA, the gun lobby, or any of the special interests in D.C. I’m ready to work together and find solutions to keep our communities safe.

Thank you, as always, for standing with me.

– Doug

clean_body: | | Last week, 19 children and 2 teachers were murdered in a devastating shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas. And since then, we’ve seen a wave of mass shootings, including an attack on a hospital complex in Tulsa this week. Enough is enough – we cannot let this violence continue. In the wake of the massacre in Uvalde, our own Congressman said, “There are no words” – and he’s right. Our children don’t need words, they need action. Last night, ahead of National Gun Violence Awareness Day and Wear Orange Weekend, President Biden called on Congress to take real action to curb gun violence – but Dan Newhouse refuses to even discuss gun violence. He won’t consider addressing responsible gun ownership, mental health or background checks. We deserve so much better than this. It's time for a change. | | As your next Congressman, I promise to be an independent leader for Central Washington. I’m not afraid to stand up to the NRA, the gun lobby, or any of the special interests in D.C. I’m ready to work together and find solutions to keep our communities safe. Thank you, as always, for standing with me. – Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093544/348788121/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjZjc0Zi03YmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N2M-5McXsG3hLVt5ssaEVwoMCweq-zQjI_B7xiWZdGc=&emci=6503346d-6ee3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=b86cf74f-7be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Last week, I found out I was banned from Russia. It’s true. Vladimir Putin doesn’t like anyone who stands up to him, and because I am resolute in my opposition to his egregious and illegal action, he has permanently banned me from entering the country. I accept my ban with honor. It only makes me want to work harder to ensure the United States and our allies remain unified against him. It’s hard to pinpoint the exact reason why Putin banned me. It could have been my visit to Europe prior to his illegal and unprovoked invasion of Ukraine that helped ensure our NATO allies would be unified in opposition to him. Or it may have been my strong support for sanctions and other measures that have imposed serious costs on the Russian government and its economy since the invasion started. Or perhaps it was my work to prevent Putin and his cronies from spreading their misinformation and propaganda online, and launching cyberattacks against the United States and our allies. Here’s one thing I know for sure — **I will always fight for the cause of democracy, and do everything I can to thwart the power of dictators, and protect us from their attempts to harm our way of life. ** Thank you, Mark **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093545/348788122/-1955050351?refcode=mw_em_220603_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODZjZjc0Zi03YmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N2M-5McXsG3hLVt5ssaEVwoMCweq-zQjI_B7xiWZdGc=)**

name: VoteVets
subject: Tom Cotton
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
VoteVets is a critical piece of progressive infrastructure.
#
Derek —
VoteVets is a critical piece of progressive infrastructure.
Our work electing progressive veterans and making the voices of veterans heard in tough races is unrivaled.
But the right has tried.
The Koch brothers tried to fund a similar effort on the right, and they aren’t the only right-leaning organization to try.
Earlier this week, Tom Cotton — preparing for a run for president — launched his “Veterans to Victory” operation.
Here is the truth:
The right consistently tries to copy VoteVets because they know our work is meaningful, and it gets results.
But the reason they’ve been unsuccessful time and time again is because we have something they don’t: grassroots support.
Now we know you probably didn’t wake up thinking you were going to make a donation to VoteVets today, but we need your help. We’ll put it right to work helping elect progressive veterans and running our ads in tough races.
Please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We’ll put your donation to work in an effort to hold the House, Senate, and elect progressive veterans this November. We cannot do this alone.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-vet.Nug-aJ&refcode=em220603-1-15&t=1&akid=5899%2E3013755%2ETWzqSb)

A woman’s right to choose should be unabridged and unimpeded, and yet the Republican Party simply will not allow that to happen. The Supreme Court is set to make a decision this summer on Roe v. Wade, and when it likely gets struck down, we will need strong fighters in Congress to prevent further infringement on the rights and privacy of women in this country. Hi folks—I want to flag two polls that came out this week
showing Tim Ryan and JD Vance statistically tied in the Ohio Senate race.

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Recent Polling | Tim Ryan (D) | JD Vance (R) | Difference |
|--------------------+-----------------+-----------------+---------------|
| Poll #1 | 43% | 41% | +2% |
|--------------------+-----------------+-----------------+---------------|
| Poll #2 | 39% | 41% | -2% |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

Both polls are within the margin of error, so this race truly is as close
as can be—[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14154?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4025%2E3611125%2Egjrb8F ]meaning if you chip in $25 right now, your donation would
have a HUGE impact on our ability to elect Tim and flip Ohio blue.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

But folks, this is just a fancy way of saying this: the more
voters learn about Tim, the more they like him. And as voters learn about
JD Vance, they see he’s a fraud more interested in his own celebrity
status than helping Ohioans.

Tim Ryan has spent his career delivering for Ohio, and he’s ready to fight
for working families in the Senate. We just NEED to get our ads in front
of people so they can learn just what Tim’s all about.

This race couldn’t be any closer, which means this thing will come down to

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: attacked for serving in the Navy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093904/348789527/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWVjZTQ0Zi03Y2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2VIm8g55ei8sdadBQN9FSiXlo5NBik4nhuN42DcMkcQ=&emci=3263a9a7-78e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=21ece44f-7ce3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)

Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $100,000 before our critical fundraising deadline, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46093906/348789529/-42398318?refcode=em20220603pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWVjZTQ0Zi03Y2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2VIm8g55ei8sdadBQN9FSiXlo5NBik4nhuN42DcMkcQ=)

Trump took credit for Walker’s victory in the Georgia Republican Senate Primary, which Walker refutes. Just another example that Republicans can't get along or put the country first even after their party's nomination process.

Unlike Walker, Sen. Reverend Warnock has a proven record of fighting for the issues most important to Georgians. We need to re-elect Warnock to ensure the past year of progress wasn’t for nothing.

name: Wade Herring
subject: Unions are the backbone of our workforce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0603 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0603]
Peter –
In between canvassing and phone banking, I’ve had the chance to visit some of our district’s labor unions and learn more about the impact unions have not only on their members, but also on our community.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0603 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0603]
Visiting International Longshoremen's Association Local 1423, the International Union Of Operating Engineers Local 474 Training Center, and United Association of Plumbers & Pipefitters Local Union 188.
In Pooler, I met with members of the United Association of Plumbers & Pipefitters Local Union 188. Through this trip, I learned about their apprentice programs, which are incredibly important for job training and workplace safety. I also learned about the life-changing Helmets to Hardhats Program, which helps our district’s honorable military veterans to find quality training and careers in the construction industry.
In Brunswick I visited the International Longshoremen's Association Local 1423, and in Savannah I toured the International Union of Operating Engineers Local 474 Training Center.
Labor unions help our community strive toward both social and economic justice, and they play a critical role in the lives of many Georgians.
I’m proud to be endorsed by the Georgia AFL-CIO, and I will always fight to allow workers to protect themselves from potentially exploitative employers and give folks an upper hand in ensuring they receive the benefits, compensation, and workplace environment they deserve.
I am grateful for the work labor unions do to protect our district’s workers, and I will do everything to empower them when in office.
Thank you,
Wade Herring

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: The NRSC was caught lying
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
TV stations across North Carolina pulled down their attack ad against me.
#

Huge newsThe NRSC was just caught lying about my record on the air, and in response, TV stations across North Carolina pulled down their attack ad against me.
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=1&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)
This is extremely rare in campaigns, but it speaks to how dirty the NRSC is going to play to try to win this seat. So we must continue to fight back.
[**Please make a $3 donation to our campaign right away to fight back against our opponents’ misleading smears and make sure voters know the truth.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=2&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)
We said from the start that these attacks were false and that we would not stand down and allow them to lie about me or my record of upholding our Constitution and keeping North Carolinians safe.
Fortunately, in this case, the TV stations agreed and pulled the ad for having “false statement and language about North Carolina Democratic candidate Cheri Beasley.”
We are the only Senate challenger they are attacking, and they’ve already crossed the line with these false attacks about my record.
Truthfully, this will not stop the NRSC. Another misleading attack ad is undoubtedly in the works — with a real chance they try to attack me even harder.
But let me be clear: We are going to fight harder than you’ve ever seen from a Senate campaign in North Carolina. I’ve never backed down just because the challenges are steep or hard.
We’re going to need you to have our back every step of the way. So I urgently need to ask for your help to make sure we’re ready to fight against whatever Republicans throw at us next.
[**Please rush a $3 donation to our campaign today to make sure we can fight back and set the record straight.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=3&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2574?c0=cb-em-june22.k8UGZr&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=22&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2575?c0=cb-em-june22.3JVybC&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=23&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2576?c0=cb-em-june22.76_gl_&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=24&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-june22.j6DaSN&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=25&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2570?c0=cb-em-june22.f1GelR&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=26&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-june22.kRUvwA&refcode=em220603-1-ma&refcode2=993.357359.kYwRu1&t=27&akid=993%2E357359%2EkYwRu1)**
---
****
We have Republicans scared. That’s why they’re coming at us so hard and so early. Their super PACs are willing to say WHATEVER it takes to try to defeat us.
Thank you so much for standing with us.
\- Cheri Beasley

subject: Urgent Support Needed Before Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=8ef134fe45&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,

If we haven’t had the chance to meet yet, my name is Scott Baugh. I’m the Republican running to defeat far-left activist and Progressive Caucus leader Katie Porter. She is the protege of Elizabeth Warren who suggested the solution to inflation was to have an abortion.

Yeah, seriously.

Our election is on Tuesday, and [I urgently need your help.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=9256d25d5e&e=8a657725d1) You see, the Republican Party has identified this race as one of 5 that we absolutely must win to take back the House. I’ve been endorsed by Ted Cruz, Kevin McCarthy, and many others for that exact reason**. **
---
| [DONATE NOW TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=fa83dff060&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE NOW TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE")
---
| With just days left to go, though, we are short of funds to turn out voters in Orange County, and Katie Porter has more than $10 million in the bank from special interests and liberal California mega-donors.

Here’s the truth: I will never raise as much as her because I won’t capitulate to the demands of the swamp, but I am counting on a huge swell of grassroots support from emails like this one to raise just enough for us to win.

And we must win because our country can’t afford another two years of sky-high inflation, open border policies, and foreign policy disasters. And we certainly aren’t going to fix any of these problems by encouraging more abortions.

So, please, will you rush in [$10](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=1ecc5473b8&e=8a657725d1), [$20,](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=e1a57d6a79&e=8a657725d1) or [$50](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=9096937054&e=8a657725d1) to help us turn out as many voters as possible before it’s too late?
---
| [GET OUT THE VOTE TO DEFEAT KATIE PORTER!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=76b875db28&e=8a657725d1 "GET OUT THE VOTE TO DEFEAT KATIE PORTER!")
---
| This is it - crunch time! Thank you for having my back!

Sincerely,
Scott Baugh

Friend, Last week, nineteen children were killed during a mass shooting in their own elementary school. We've seen these kinds of mass shootings happen consistently throughout America without any serious effort by our elected officials to put an end to them. ** ** Politicians in Congress today have the ability to enact legislation that would reduce the out of control level of gun violence in our country today. Instead, many republicans choose to do nothing about the problem, merely sending out empty statements like "thoughts and prayers." I'm proud to say I have an "F" rating from the NRA, and I will stand up to the gun lobby and protect our children.

We need a fighter in Congress who will consistently advocate for what's right. I'm not afraid to take on elites in both parties when they're failing the people. My team and I have been hard at work over the past few months, but due to my injury I am unable to reach out to the community, so I need your support more than ever.

clean_body: In Congress, I’ll stand up for you | | Friend, Last week, nineteen children were killed during a mass shooting in their own elementary school. We've seen these kinds of mass shootings happen consistently throughout America without any serious effort by our elected officials to put an end to them. Politicians in Congress today have the ability to enact legislation that would reduce the out of control level of gun violence in our country today. Instead, many republicans choose to do nothing about the problem, merely sending out empty statements like "thoughts and prayers." I'm proud to say I have an "F" rating from the NRA, and I will stand up to the gun lobby and protect our children. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In Congress, I'll stand up for you. During this time when democracy is under attack, women's reproductive rights are on the chopping block, and our planet is dying, we can't continue with politics as usual. We need a fighter in Congress who will consistently advocate for what's right. I'm not afraid to take on elites in both parties when they're failing the people. I recently broke my leg saving my youngest child from being pulled under a boat. My team and I have been hard at work over the past few months, but due to my injury I am unable to reach out to the community, so I need your support more than ever. We now must rely on your assistance to get elected. If you are unable to donate, can you support our movement by ? Thank you for your continued support of our people-powered campaign. Sincerely, Dr. Cindy Banyai Democrat for Congress, FL-19 | Friends of Cindy Banyai PO Box 2923 Fort Myers, FL 33902 | | | Sent via .
