**\- Happy Pride Month! - ** _“Happy Pride Month! The celebration of equal love is year-round for Indiana Stonewall Democrats, but this month we express extra advocacy for our LGBTQ+ Hoosiers and those all around the world.” -[Indiana Stonewall Democrats](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094594/348792709/-1989681094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)_ In collaboration with the Indiana Stonewall Democrats, the Indiana Democratic Party will march in this year's Indy Pride Parade. We encourage you to join us next Saturday, June 11th! **Email instonewall@gmail.com to secure your spot in the march for LGBTQ acceptance across Indiana.**
**\- It’s that time again: #BigDemWeekend - ** Big Dem Weekend is getting closer! Between the Hoosier Hospitality Dinner on June 17 and the State Convention on June 18, Democrats from across the state will meet in Indianapolis to celebrate the brighter future leaders like André Carson and Frank Mrvan have created for Hoosier families. **Here are our special guests for Big Dem Weekend:** Snag your tickets here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094597/348792712/-1823536925?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=)
**\- Be a Part of Hoosier History as a State Convention Delegate - ** The State Convention is where delegates get to vote on the party platform, offer resolutions, and nominate our candidates for Secretary of State, State Auditor, and State Treasurer. Delegates will also attend a congressional district meeting, hear from candidates, meet other democrats from around the state, and have the chance to attend constituency caucus meetings. If you are interested in learning more about being a state convention delegate you can register here for training: [https://www.mobilize.us/indems/event/454732/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094600/348792715/1905785337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) The next training date is: Tue, Jun 7, 6:00pm–7:00pm EDT Please reach out to your [Democratic County Chair](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094603/348792718/532796064?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) to inquire about being one of your county’s delegates.

**\- Indiana Democrats Call on Indiana GOP to Issue Another Tax Refund for Hoosiers -** This week, Indiana Democratic State Representatives [Terri Austin](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094609/348792724/-324664516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535),[ Renee Pack](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094612/348792727/1891551419?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), and [Greg Porter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094615/348792730/-1658185866?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) called on Governor Eric Holcomb and Statehouse Republicans to issue another tax refund for Hoosiers. The state could tap into the state’s $6 billion surplus to fund this win-win project that would help families combat global inflation. Democrats’ plan follows a similar effort to help Hoosiers make ends meet. Last month, Democrats like [Mike Andrade](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094618/348792733/184853316?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), [Mitch Gore](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094621/348792736/1955756536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), [Rita Fleming](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094624/348792739/-719532819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), and [Tonya Pfaff](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094633/348792743/-103158042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) asked Holcomb to pause the state’s gas tax which would lower costs at the pump. The Indiana GOP ignored these calls to action – proving again they have no plans for Indiana’s future, just partisanship.
**- How the American Rescue Plan Delivered for Hoosiers This Week -**
* President Joe Biden’s American Rescue Plan funding is completing the [Mishawaka Riverwalk](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094641/348792756/-1666703222?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535). The COVID-19 Relief delivered yet another quality of life enhancement that will connect Mishawaka's parks to the downtown area.

* Families in Zionsville are set to have new ways to enjoy the outdoors. Democratic Mayor Emily Styron this week [announced](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094644/348792761/-653760973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) the completion of Zionsville’s Big-4 Rail Trail. This investment will transform the community - and it’s largely Democrats ([thanks American Rescue Plan!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094647/348792791/-1265023162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)) who got it done.

**\- Hypocrisy Alert: Jennifer-Ruth Green Touts Steel Industry Despite Calling Frank Mrvan’s Steel Investments “Failed Economic Policies” -** U.S Congressman Frank Mrvan’s Republican opponent in the first district, Jennifer-Ruth Green, is trying to have it both ways on Indiana’s Steel Industry. Green [touted her support for the industry](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094650/348792794/2053145740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), however, she’s described (repeatedly) Frank Mrvan’s record - where he’s delivered for U.S. Steel - as “[failed economic policies](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094652/348792796/-964215595?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535#tracking-source=most-popular-homepage)”. Hoosiers in IN-01 are still waiting on Green to clarify whether she supports [project labor agreements](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094654/348792800/361395013?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) (PLAs) and the [Protect the Right to Organize (PRO) Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094656/348792802/1564974805?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535). Jennifer-Ruth Green has also failed to specify whether she supports President Joe Biden’s [requirement to have American steel take priority](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094659/348792805/-247513833?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) for all projects associated with The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act ([The Jobs Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094662/348792808/2091091387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)). It’s time Green goes on the record about a kitchen-table issue most important to Hoosiers in Northwest Indiana.
**\- Join Us in Veedersburg, Danville, and Evansville for Indiana Democrats’ Town Hall Series - ** Democrats are continuing its “2022 Town Hall Series”, an effort by the Indiana Democratic Party and the Libertarian Party of Indiana to hear from all voters about the top issues facing Hoosier families ahead of the 2022 state and federal elections. Democrats believe it’s imperative for voters to hear from all major political parties, and this fact is why the tour will be held in about 15 communities - big and small - across Indiana. Join us on the road! Here is next week’s town halls: _NOTE: The Indiana Republican Party has been invited to participate in these town hall events. Unfortunately, the organization declined this invitation. _ You can read more about the Town Hall Series in local newspapers, like the [New Albany News and Tribune](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094665/348792811/814327854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), [Greenfield Reporter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094668/348792814/-1657981647?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) or [New Castle Courier Times](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094671/348792817/-1971073989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535).
**\- Future Events and Opportunities - ** **\- Saturday June 17, 2022: Indiana Young Democrats bring back their traditional HH Dinner After Party - ** Full details here: [https://www.facebook.com/events/1037741727169082](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46094673/348792821/1983519416?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDcyYjkyOC04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxs7QgXSwUsZTGhVjYi0KFK_xozdfzkB5WDxmePKv4U=&emci=24692818-76e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8d72b928-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)

Jennifer-Ruth Green has also failed to specify whether she supports President Joe Biden’s for all projects associated with The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (). It’s time Green goes on the record about a kitchen-table issue most important to Hoosiers in Northwest Indiana. \- Join Us in Veedersburg, Danville, and Evansville for Indiana Democrats’ Town Hall Series - Democrats are continuing its “2022 Town Hall Series”, an effort by the Indiana Democratic Party and the Libertarian Party of Indiana to hear from all voters about the top issues facing Hoosier families ahead of the 2022 state and federal elections. Democrats believe it’s imperative for voters to hear from all major political parties, and this fact is why the tour will be held in about 15 communities - big and small - across Indiana. Join us on the road! Here is next week’s town halls: NOTE: The Indiana Republican Party has been invited to participate in these town hall events. Unfortunately, the organization declined this invitation. You can read more about the Town Hall Series in local newspapers, like the , or . \- Future Events and Opportunities - \- Saturday June 17, 2022: Indiana Young Democrats bring back their traditional HH Dinner After Party - Full details here: \- Saturday, June 18, 2022: Party Pride with Special Guest: Andrea Jenkins - [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
“Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5150e96b47934859b05cb640539b0ea0&_e=q1zEPeANXoGsTSEl6N_lvDOWkIQlJIrwUoyeuBikKPlYdfb2BVsIwsksKT-uJqew0fHP42nqLi-1NWM548JBx3fajR2kWQ34m1lVQx-KMO_sA14x0dELwcfWolOxOYr6haPhM7j75-uhgVj_bW7JWDKZwbI_JdPMro-CUR64GkMpSO3Do9Cy6zdQcyMemdT9ndohgFyAUhgvrAL6gvgZv3YdJsQp7Zf7NWRSPYeCdIniRYeGvfz7fI2a2C1warfI7Y4KYn9qjw9FjHzpD4YUm_T37IBHZdwXFzXole3ihUTds2RuCiEq8BlFTR0RU-LCvV8_FNz_s5JRSk86MvezlhqSgbAKJRHmDWOtuUfBFhLGGiypR1B1eSSmCSc1Z4t4vyy5W4vRq_4CASNpNZjOTUoCimzA2qy5LOBf7CrFGA51UmPuDxDWAyVYffu5DUPKDBjYC_Qqyi4B-0gUZ7jaVR98gm2-APxZVJ5tC_teJTdMA15NLdUKdzEXlLW7QFtW)

---
Fellow American,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Fellow American, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

clean_body: “Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” | Fellow American, Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia. Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination. That very night, Democrats officially began their barrage of attacks against me. We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues. This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track. Fellow American, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - total spending will likely exceed $200 million. As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden. Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - I know what it's like to be in the big leagues. Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me. If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
The time is now. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095056/348794090/-272948131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY3NjhiYi04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFoHgiT0vFCpfOkHsaizmupczKu2zwRW3FEXPCpMcQ0=&emci=03ff2198-6ce3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7b6768bb-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=252045)

Friends, We can’t sit by and watch as gun violence tears apart families and makes our public spaces feel less safe. There have been hundreds of mass shootings just this year — and at least 20 mass shooting events since the tragedy in Uvalde, Texas. Gun homicides have spiked to the highest levels in decades during the pandemic. And we simply don’t have strong enough laws to keep firearms out of the wrong hands. **This shouldn’t be a partisan issue, folks. We need to come together.** As a father of two sons and a responsible gun owner, I’m ready to pass bipartisan solutions to protect both constitutional rights and innocent lives. That’s why I’m working with a bipartisan group of senators to get this done. [**Will you help us build momentum? Add your name next to mine to support taking action on gun violence:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095057/348794091/-643045995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY3NjhiYi04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFoHgiT0vFCpfOkHsaizmupczKu2zwRW3FEXPCpMcQ0=&emci=03ff2198-6ce3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7b6768bb-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095058/348794092/-643045995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY3NjhiYi04MGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFoHgiT0vFCpfOkHsaizmupczKu2zwRW3FEXPCpMcQ0=&emci=03ff2198-6ce3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7b6768bb-80e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=252045)

clean_body: The time is now. Friends, We can’t sit by and watch as gun violence tears apart families and makes our public spaces feel less safe. There have been hundreds of mass shootings just this year — and at least 20 mass shooting events since the tragedy in Uvalde, Texas. Gun homicides have spiked to the highest levels in decades during the pandemic. And we simply don’t have strong enough laws to keep firearms out of the wrong hands. This shouldn’t be a partisan issue, folks. We need to come together. As a father of two sons and a responsible gun owner, I’m ready to pass bipartisan solutions to protect both constitutional rights and innocent lives. That’s why I’m working with a bipartisan group of senators to get this done. | I refuse to be cynical. That’s why I am in the room helping negotiate these policies. I will do everything I can to push the Senate to act on gun violence. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. # [SIGN YOUR NAME: Fire Trump’s Postmaster General Louis DeJoy >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0181c90-2374-419e-a4f0-06ff16d441e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73a46484-a584-4977-939d-7518be617b02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump has been out of office for nearly a year and a half, but his hand-picked Postmaster General (and top donor) is STILL in power – and he’s on a mission to run the U.S. Postal Service into the ground. Louis DeJoy was responsible for severe cuts that delayed mail delivery ahead of the November 2020 election, undermining confidence in vote-by-mail and attempting to help Trump steal the election. President Biden didn’t have the ability to fire DeJoy – only the Postal Service’s Board of Governors can do that. But Biden’s board nominees were just confirmed by the Senate! They can finally get rid of DeJoy! If DeJoy is left in charge of the USPS, it will spell disaster for this crucial institution. We cannot allow him to continue to sabotage this essential service that millions of Americans rely on every day. [Sign now to demand Louis DeJoy be fired IMMEDIATELY >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T318c8254-dc6d-41c3-a612-ac79dd142b07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: [Important announcement enclosed]
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

I am truly honored to announce today that I have been endorsed by Giffords PAC, the gun safety organization founded by former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords.
# [#]
I am abundantly proud to have received the endorsement of such an organization working to bring awareness to desperately needed gun violence prevention measures, especially in the wake of recent tragedies in Uvalde and Buffalo.

As a responsible gun owner and Chairman of the House Gun Violence Prevention Task Force, I understand that passing gun violence prevention laws and protecting the constitutional rights of Americans can go hand in hand. That is why I spearheaded the Bipartisan Background Checks Act, and am actively working with the Biden administration to increase funding for violence intervention programs.

I am humbled that Giffords PAC recognizes my commitment to advancing legislation that will end this epidemic of gun violence once and for all.

Thank you,

Mike

clean_body: [#] Peter, I am truly honored to announce today that I have been endorsed by Giffords PAC, the gun safety organization founded by former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords. [#] I am abundantly proud to have received the endorsement of such an organization working to bring awareness to desperately needed gun violence prevention measures, especially in the wake of recent tragedies in Uvalde and Buffalo. As a responsible gun owner and Chairman of the House Gun Violence Prevention Task Force, I understand that passing gun violence prevention laws and protecting the constitutional rights of Americans can go hand in hand. That is why I spearheaded the Bipartisan Background Checks Act, and am actively working with the Biden administration to increase funding for violence intervention programs. I am humbled that Giffords PAC recognizes my commitment to advancing legislation that will end this epidemic of gun violence once and for all. Thank you, Mike Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

body:
52% of Democrats just responded to a poll saying that they would surrender to the enemy rather than fight if the U.S. were invaded. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0ec1134f2d4648f8b0518a5a8a85d56c&_e=Uy54G1Lu5m33t9U0GWUZ_jaKbupHMSuo8BC4EsZofdmkpG49vEtLzpVX_VnX5bVmBsUDodptQHzCFXbtMf3431oQXjMc_zkiBZ0IfP3vXei-USNPldbMcs9XAdOoWy5it4mwR-9bPO5n9Khpd2rYV4tBvfZXl3MsxaGDk7F616kliFQoUdx1CsQ2mLy5ANX-VH6-kZmvrE1M5DBCwdbm11HX2Xtt53zpblu6qTMcyDcvchhtsFi_MOEg2sr8tjjYVL6cwH2sahwjitcfnVpn-36bfB5Dw_SP5pLtM3uqhWgJfpCfKUOpyQanV31DNdnBkzVxL81qexRvWwWILHrnYFL3recuff6aPKA6v5lUOAuDS723kjV28BO93sd2XIXVMZjB2ZqDzT8xr0pNORIf5GIF5qd1vllpX9nIiVfux1Wi_-sRpaDYbLjWhrMgMcb265yAZ2Rz1_xfAYx4DIy3vlflNKljLLOATV31iOP_wDU%3D)

_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Fellow Conservative,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; **my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | “I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.” - Matthew Hennessey Fellow Conservative, Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. # **Weekly Recap:
****_June 3, 2022_**
---
| | Hi Team, This week has been another one for the books. Our campaign was just endorsed by Pro-Choice Maryland Action, one of the best organizations in the state advocating for reproductive freedom and accessible abortion care! **This endorsement makes it clear: John King and Michelle Siri are the reproductive rights ticket in this race. ** And just last week, a new poll showed John surging in this race and trailing just 1-POINT behind the frontrunner. Our campaign is gaining momentum, and we're excited to keep it up as we go into the final stretch before Election Day. However, we need supporters like you to fuel our efforts by making it possible for us to hire hardworking organizers, print campaign materials, and launch cutting-edge digital ads. Before our June 7th public fundraising deadline, [_**can we count on you to contribute $55, $15, or even $5 now to help John take the lead in this competitive race?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095419/348795582/1974957641?refcode=newsletter&amount=25&refcode2=78e9a639-82e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_medium=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGU5YTYzOS04MmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhRyetC0_mFkadSRFaOg4sEk10TAynpHQbjpEJX34qM=)

clean_body: Team King's Weekly Recap: June 3rd. Our campaign was just endorsed by Pro-Choice Maryland Action, one of the best organizations in the state advocating for reproductive freedom and accessible abortion care!| | | = | | | | | | = | "YARD SIGN" | | | Weekly Recap: June 3, 2022 | | Hi Team, This week has been another one for the books. Our campaign was just endorsed by Pro-Choice Maryland Action, one of the best organizations in the state advocating for reproductive freedom and accessible abortion care! This endorsement makes it clear: John King and Michelle Siri are the reproductive rights ticket in this race. And just last week, a new poll showed John surging in this race and trailing just 1-POINT behind the frontrunner. Our campaign is gaining momentum, and we're excited to keep it up as we go into the final stretch before Election Day. However, we need supporters like you to fuel our efforts by making it possible for us to hire hardworking organizers, print campaign materials, and launch cutting-edge digital ads. Before our June 7th public fundraising deadline, = Thank you again for your continued support — keep scrolling to find out what we're up to. We can't wait to elect John King and Michelle Siri as Maryland's next Democratic ticket with you by our side. — Team King | | | In the News | | MARYLAND MATTERS "Pro-Choice Maryland, which was formerly affiliated with NARAL, also announced endorsements of Democratic gubernatorial candidate John King and his running mate, Michelle Siri." MARYLAND MATTERS: Democratic Candidates for Governor Tout Electability at Mecca of Voter Turnout "During a discussion on abortion rights and the importance of judicial appointments, King recalled that Gansler had supported Justice Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to the U.S. Supreme Court." name: John Fetterman
subject: Gonna need your help with this one
disclaimer_text: paid for by YOU
body:
All to drag *yours truly* through the mud
#
**So... the Republicans just launched TV attack ads on me + our campaign.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47562?refcode=em20220603-6086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6086%2E434096%2EcyX2Gg)
This is the very first Republican attack ad of the General Election. 😱
They’re spending literally $2.3 MILLION out the gate — all to try and drag *yours truly* through the mud.
**You’ve had my back in a big way over the last few weeks, Derek. And if I’ve ever needed your support again, it’s now.**
[**_Rush $5 or anything you can spare now to help fight back against the GOP »_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47562?refcode=em20220603-6086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=6086%2E434096%2EcyX2Gg)
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47562?refcode=em20220603-6086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=6086%2E434096%2EcyX2Gg)**
There’s pretty much only one grassroots team out there that can go head-on against the Republican money flooding Pennsylvania. That’s us, Derek. 💪
Over 200,000 grassroots donors have come together to build our campaign. And Fun FactTM️: Team Fetterman donors come from all 67 counties of the Commonwealth + over 50% of United States zip codes!!
So yeah, Republicans might have dark money groups. **But I am bought and paid for by YOU.** Every donation you make to this campaign comes with a promise. I’m going to fight like hell for you when I get to the U.S. Senate.
With your help, we can go up against the GOP, flip this seat, and ensure Senate Democrats have the 51 votes they need to get actual sh*t done for working people in this country, starting with scrapping the filibuster.
[**_But first we’ve got to be able to ensure we can stand up to the GOP’s onslaught of attacks + dark money across Pennsylvania. Please kick in $5 or whatever your best donation is today._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47562?refcode=em20220603-6086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=6086%2E434096%2EcyX2Gg)
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47562?refcode=em20220603-6086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=6086%2E434096%2EcyX2Gg)**
Listen, I really hate how much money is in our politics these days. But in order to win on the issues we care about, I need to be able to respond to the millions of dollars being against us.
Thank you for sticking by me,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220603-6086-footer&t=24&refcode2=6086_434096_cyX2Gg&akid=6086%2E434096%2EcyX2Gg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=6086%2E434096%2EcyX2Gg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=6086%2E434096%2EcyX2Gg)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

I’m counting on your support, team:

|

Friend,

It’s Ron Kind, and I’m counting on your support, team:

WisDems set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 by the end of the week to re-elect Governor Evers, oust Ron Johnson, and support down-ballot Democrats all across Wisconsin. Can you help me out? **[Rush in $10 to help us meet our one-week-only Cheddar Storm goal! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095708/348796783/940476353?refcode=digital-email_kind&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODYyMzYyYi04NGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bg3rorwJYmOZqSo6OZ1WkGekY0jWfaTTBaQL4R_twJA=)** | [Contribute Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095709/348796784/940476353?refcode=digital-email_kind&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODYyMzYyYi04NGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bg3rorwJYmOZqSo6OZ1WkGekY0jWfaTTBaQL4R_twJA=)
---
**In Wisconsin, we have a series of critical races we need to win.** We need to make sure we re-elect Governor Tony Evers and protect his veto pen, because that’s the only thing stopping radical Republicans like Rebecca Kleefisch from rolling back our progress with an extreme and divisive agenda.

Meanwhile, out of touch millionaire Ron Johnson is wrong for Wisconsin, and our voters know it - he’s one of the most unpopular sitting Senators.

We deserve a Governor like Tony Evers, who will defend voting rights, improve education, and protect our health care. We deserve a Senator who will represent working families across Wisconsin, not billionaires and his own self-serving agenda.

But to make sure we can win in Wisconsin, we need your help to mobilize early - _and often._ **[I’m personally asking for Democrats around Wisconsin - and the nation! - to come together for a one-week-only Cheddar Storm to help re-elect Governor Evers and beat Ron Johnson. Give any amount (even just $1 would go so far!) to help in this critical moment! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095711/348796786/940476353?refcode=digital-email_kind&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODYyMzYyYi04NGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bg3rorwJYmOZqSo6OZ1WkGekY0jWfaTTBaQL4R_twJA=)**

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Alex is on the ballot twice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hey team,
With Alex Padilla’s primary just _4 days_ away, we wanted to reach out and explain why your support — particularly right now — is so important.
When we elected Kamala Harris as our Vice President, Governor Gavin Newsom appointed Alex to fill her vacant Senate seat. Alex is running to finish Vice President Harris’ term, _and_ in a separate election for a new full term.
Here’s what that means in practical terms: Alex is going to be on the ballot twice on Tuesday, which is why we’re doing everything we can to get the word out across California to vote for Alex twice.
But California is a big state, and there are almost 25 MILLION registered voters here. So we are asking for your help:
[**Please make a donation — of any amount you can afford — to help get the word out to vote for Alex in BOTH elections so he can stay in the Senate, fighting to defend democracy.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june22.3xful1&refcode=em220603-1-subs&t=1&akid=833%2E159979%2ECqW_rk)
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june22.3xful1&refcode=em220603-1-subs&t=2&akid=833%2E159979%2ECqW_rk)**
Thank you!
\- Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=833%2E159979%2ECqW_rk)

body:

| | Peter, We knew that we'd built a strong, people-powered campaign this spring. Still, when the press called our race within 15 minutes of returns being released, it was a surreal experience. Since then, it's been a _whirlwind_. We've brought thousands more folks into our movement. Oregonians are stepping forward to fight for commonsense, progressive leadership in Washington: our phones are ringing, folks are showing up at the office to volunteer, and we're growing by the day. **But, Peter, we've got to get _bigger still_.** This is going to be one of the toughest races in the country. We need to be prepared, and that means building up our numbers _now_. **[We've got a big summer ahead, Peter. Please chip in now to keep bringing people into this grassroots movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46096132/348798597/-1599294071?refcode=2022-06-03-whirlwind&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ecdc5714-86e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2RjNTcxNC04NmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_1yv7smxQLjIPo1SopBnSbODf8lvY8K_nAOMeX0MYM=)** Unfortunately, working Oregonians aren't the only people who've shown up. **MAGA Republicans have already started sniffing around southwest Oregon, deciding how much money they should dump into attacking me and boosting union-buster (and climate-change-denier, and Big-Lie-believer) Alek Skarlatos.** Kevin McCarthy and the Republicans know what we know: the path to the House majority runs through Oregon and through this seat. Two years ago, they dropped _millions_ into our state and gave Peter DeFazio the toughest race of his career – and the most expensive in Oregon history. They're not going to back down now. You helped us make history in the primary, and our campaign is counting on you to make history again. **[Please, donate $3 now, and let's show Alek Skarlatos and his friends that Oregon _still_ clean_body: | | | | Peter, We knew that we'd built a strong, people-powered campaign this spring. Still, when the press called our race within 15 minutes of returns being released, it was a surreal experience. Since then, it's been a whirlwind. We've brought thousands more folks into our movement. Oregonians are stepping forward to fight for commonsense, progressive leadership in Washington: our phones are ringing, folks are showing up at the office to volunteer, and we're growing by the day. But, Peter, we've got to get bigger still. This is going to be one of the toughest races in the country. We need to be prepared, and that means building up our numbers now. = Unfortunately, working Oregonians aren't the only people who've shown up. MAGA Republicans have already started sniffing around southwest Oregon, deciding how much money they should dump into attacking me and boosting union-buster (and climate-change-denier, and Big-Lie-believer) Alek Skarlatos. Kevin McCarthy and the Republicans know what we know: the path to the House majority runs through Oregon and through this seat. Two years ago, they dropped millions into our state and gave Peter DeFazio the toughest race of his career – and the most expensive in Oregon history. They're not going to back down now. You helped us make history in the primary, and our campaign is counting on you to make history again. = For Oregon, Val Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It has begun
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514856:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)

---
Peter,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. **[Without your support, winning will be much more difficult.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514856:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)**

[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $2 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514857:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)
[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $4 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514858:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)
Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - _I know what it's like to be in the big leagues._

Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me.

If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, **[then please consider helping us spread the message today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514856:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)**

[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $6 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514859:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)
[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $8 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514860:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)
Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, **[not a dog and pony show.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514856:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514856:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)

Herschel Walker
Republican Nominee for Senate

[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $10 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514861:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)
[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $22 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60514862:6rbPQtomN:m:1:3317145305:5F3A041DB7C5A82E221A07B3F67408C4:r)

Ben Jealous is one of the most prominent civil rights leaders in the country and was the youngest national leader of the NAACP in the organization's history. I am honored and humbled to have his support. **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESxWGQQpYjvB6XPno-qfH6S0GN1O_pAnxOfTRoo0P1OlPNJK_RYEoTww9P34YlNH5XwB9Uchag4RdioqyUVi0a1qh0gdHmSRX6yPrw5wabtZhaYR-MTUjzSCgH4Ws8NGbE8UdGhq0avpNri33xrwCtiYpHT-LsHKlVG_9N7L-pmR38lZlV_zA9w1avVbDJ3J1eoGv9ZTXzXhya3VN0XvLYAsr2IxWiI2SQBxcJPF1-3EbH1MctGnx63yqg83Cvz6NQAHsqTs_Kl28g7SmK2A6uyGvyaX_2lkgTE3ps7eUzrEOZ2zcVF65nLwl8CnoX0M2GM1YonlaIEPFg-_9Nj9v76A/3ml/NsRK6HEUSk2XVJqFWelyMQ/h1/sy0YX7nKg-6nr6bN9vBhifptdH1AXqGpC8ke0w9GBa4)**Ben knows now, more than ever, we need gun violence prevention survivors and advocates leading the Congressional conversation to end our country’s gun violence epidemic. clean_body: Ben Jealous is one of the most prominent civil rights leaders in the country. | | | Team, I’m proud to share that Ben Jealous, the former president and CEO of the NAACP and current president of People for the American Way , has endorsed our campaign for Congress. Ben Jealous is one of the most prominent civil rights leaders in the country and was the youngest national leader of the NAACP in the organization's history. I am honored and humbled to have his support. knows now, more than ever, we need gun violence prevention survivors and advocates leading the Congressional conversation to end our country’s gun violence epidemic. This endorsement is further proof of what we already knew: we have formed a multigenerational, multiracial coalition to demand advocacy, representation, and investment for our community. And together, we are going to get it. Hear from Ben himself about why he’s supporting our movement to bring new leadership to IL-7: "I am proud to support Kina Collins for Congress. She has long been a tireless advocate for gun safety reforms at home and across the country, and her strong leadership is needed now more than ever. I share her vision for an America free from gun violence in our homes, our streets, and our schools. Kina also understands that our healthcare system is flawed to its very core, and is committed to making it work for everyone, not just the wealthy and for-profit corporations. We need Kina in Congress, and I urge every Chicagoan to get out and vote." Team, we are 25 days away from election day. 25 days to show this district everything they deserve, everything they must demand. 25 days to knock on every door. 25 days to win. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Tom Pyle, AEA
subject: Tell Biden to Open New Oil Leases and Unleash American Energy!
body:
Within his first week in office, President Biden signed an executive order temporarily suspending new oil and gas leases on federal lands — Now they’ve taken anti-oil to the next level. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6018%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=IbQnZ6lTpxr533q2F8ukcw&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62005%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YWIYSc0qTTrC1ypXHEMjw&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Within his first week in office, President Biden signed an executive order temporarily suspending new oil and gas leases on federal lands -- _Now they’ve taken anti-oil to the next level._ Biden’s Interior Department just **_canceled_** a ONE MILLION ACRE OIL LEASE SALE**** in Alaska, along with TWO MORE OIL LEASE SALES in the Gulf of Mexico as Americans face painfully high prices at the pump. **America is experiencing the highest gas prices ever in history. Gas prices have soared by 50% nationwide over the past year. The American Energy Alliance (AEA) has drafted a petition in response to this attack on American energy prices.** [**Please Sign our UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY Petition:**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62006%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8LxDVTpU0ALLdDvXLfn9mw&sysid=1)
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62007%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mhTI9ZnavFKxgcqvaQgY2A&sysid=1)
---
Average gas prices in the U.S. have reached new record-highs thanks to policies enacted by the Biden administration. The national average price of regular gasoline hit a new record of $4.60 on Thursday. Former Trump EPA advisor Steve Milloy said: _"I blame Biden for all lack of production ...**They will find any excuse to not drill**.”_ **The price you are paying at the pump is a direct result of restrictions placed on energy producers. Not allowing them to produce enough energy needed to keep our economy moving has resulted in this skyrocketing of prices for all consumers.** Together, we must send an urgent message to the Biden administration, letting them know we will not stand for this any longer. That is why AEA has drafted this petition to end the gas price crisis. **_AEA is on the frontlines fighting everyday for an abundant, reliable and affordable energy future._**_We are asking for your support now to help bring gas prices down_** _ -- Please sign the UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY petition today._** [**Tell****Joe Biden how we, the American people, feel about his administration’s direct assault on energy prices by signing our UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY Petition now.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62008%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LJXhpSlQAl4myS96M8DQQQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62007%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mhTI9ZnavFKxgcqvaQgY2A&sysid=1)
---
With your support, we will keep fighting against the politicians and special interests intent on implementing a never-ending list of federal fees, taxes, and barriers to entry that will lead to further continuation of record-high fuel prices. **[Please sign the petition now.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62009%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GcuyH%2b0PWPjEX4eKWnPJag&sysid=1)** Thank You, Tom Pyle
President American Energy Alliance
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62007%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mhTI9ZnavFKxgcqvaQgY2A&sysid=1)
---
Copyright (C) American Energy Alliance
American Energy Alliance
1155 15th Street NW, Suite 900
Washington, DC 20005
Phone: 202.621.2940
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6018%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=IbQnZ6lTpxr533q2F8ukcw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6018%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=IbQnZ6lTpxr533q2F8ukcw&sysid=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily=20Beach?=
subject: DO SOMETHING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
Send a gun safety message #WearOrange 🧡 | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=b3d1349cf3&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

I’m proud to be the only **Moms Demand Action 2022 Gun Sense Candidate** in this Congressional race.
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=827f0de552&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| I wish we didn’t need an organization like Moms Demand Action, but tragically we do, now more than ever. The loss of innocent lives won’t stop until we have real, meaningful gun safety laws in our country. We must elect people to Congress who will work relentlessly until these laws are passed.

Now is not the time to hope someone else will DO SOMETHING. Help stand up to the powerful gun lobby by taking action. We need YOU now.
* **#WearOrange today for National Gun Violence Awareness Weekend.** It may seem a small or inconsequential action to take, but we MUST keep up the awareness of this national crisis. As President Biden said yesterday, guns kill more children in America than car accidents or cancer.

* **Help elect me to Congress:** roll up your sleeves this weekend and [sign up for a volunteer shift](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=01ebcc7b0c&e=de8b2615ea) to remind your neighbors to vote Emily Beach for Congress, the only Moms Demand Action 2022 Gun Sense Candidate in this Congressional race. If you prefer to make calls instead, email [hello@emilybeachforcongress.com](mailto:hello@emilybeachforcongress.com) and we’ll set you up with everything you need. Our grass-roots campaign will succeed because of volunteers like YOU.

* **Send a gun safety message on Primary Election Day, this Tuesday, 6/7.** Our vote is our voice. Find information about voting locations throughout the 15th Congressional District at [San Mateo County](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=d48ddbc882&e=de8b2615ea) and [San Francisco County](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=1a995dcf5e&e=de8b2615ea) election office links.

Keep going, never let up. Our country, and our children’s safety, is worth it.
---
| Sincerely,

Emily Beach
---
| P.S. I hope to see you tomorrow for Saturday’s mobilization! [Sign up here for a shift.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=104a36973d&e=de8b2615ea)

name: Congressman Matt Gaetz
subject: A vote for Red Flag laws is betrayal
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKX0j9UPTndjfY7BTw2ZlXIbOJW4Dgu0RyRGyutJz4qrCVzW79ekFDCwylnAXT92uhk-vfTOsiJm6ah9cgM5q_QOWzX_dYfYDVEHA9A6FX6faZHc11hyqS_Wn_bWrNixf3J6sAwIBhvTTzgmewQ9j6PKNy2JNrTlYAqd5Yn7XtujAEcOPZfU-YbJWODrqzaS9B1SliRmshM=&c=uNukNUVyi9Z4wzuMVp_KVYBsYYQMC3mluwoAdWgHGXmcvZ2bMAhrQg==&ch=Um8ygBt6BpWbtviw6YBqcGzrsx2TjUYW1fSh5JnBxoxJWOjKg1TnwA==)
---
| |
---
| Peter \-
---
| Let me make it clear to any of my "Republican" colleagues in the Swamp who are considering joining with the Democrats in passing sweeping, authoritarian Red Flag gun laws based on some emotion they had...
THIS WOULD BE A BETRAYAL TO YOUR VOTERS, A BETRAYAL TO THE CONSTITUTION, AND WOULD ONLY PUT A TARGET ON THE BACKS OF YOUR CONSTITUENTS!!!
---
| | | [JOIN ME: SAY "NO" TO RED FLAG LAWS!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKX0j9UPTndjfY7BTw2ZlXIbOJW4Dgu0RyRGyutJz4qrCVzW79ekFDCwylnAXT92uhk-vfTOsiJm6ah9cgM5q_QOWzX_dYfYDVEHA9A6FX6faZHc11hyqS_Wn_bWrNixf3J6sAwIBhvTTzgmewQ9j6PKNy2JNrTlYAqd5Yn7XtujAEcOPZfU-YbJWODrqzaS9B1SliRmshM=&c=uNukNUVyi9Z4wzuMVp_KVYBsYYQMC3mluwoAdWgHGXmcvZ2bMAhrQg==&ch=Um8ygBt6BpWbtviw6YBqcGzrsx2TjUYW1fSh5JnBxoxJWOjKg1TnwA==)
---
| Make no mistake. These laws WILL be abused. In fact, they're being abused RIGHT NOW.
Because this isn't about guns. This is about power. The same politicians who cheered on violent mobs while they burned down our cities now want to DISARM US without due process.
I'm not letting it slide. I'm fighting this disgraceful assault on our rights and liberties. And I need you to join me to keep the pressure on before the RINOs cave to this Democrat stunt and betray the Constitution!
---
| | | [DON'T LET THEM TAKE OUR GUNS >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKX0j9UPTndjfY7BTw2ZlXIbOJW4Dgu0RyRGyutJz4qrCVzW79ekFDCwylnAXT92uhk-vfTOsiJm6ah9cgM5q_QOWzX_dYfYDVEHA9A6FX6faZHc11hyqS_Wn_bWrNixf3J6sAwIBhvTTzgmewQ9j6PKNy2JNrTlYAqd5Yn7XtujAEcOPZfU-YbJWODrqzaS9B1SliRmshM=&c=uNukNUVyi9Z4wzuMVp_KVYBsYYQMC3mluwoAdWgHGXmcvZ2bMAhrQg==&ch=Um8ygBt6BpWbtviw6YBqcGzrsx2TjUYW1fSh5JnBxoxJWOjKg1TnwA==)
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKX0j9UPTndjfY7BTw2ZlXIbOJW4Dgu0RyRGyutJz4qrCVzW79ekFDCwylnAXT92DeoT8vzIdR4vDf39FMUCxUMB8Wy0agl90dwjQI-n5HdcV0RmFpeBsTIy0ZVw7EIyS4WMalugyam2wffHu7BIGlLWRKYi4OtkfqQFfUf-OaS_M1tLmMnrKpjgr7WC_9lHBFSupqb1QBtr_zh9f0puyj6cE6HTeLbpY8SRcYDsw14mP0C-X7g3Cw==&c=uNukNUVyi9Z4wzuMVp_KVYBsYYQMC3mluwoAdWgHGXmcvZ2bMAhrQg==&ch=Um8ygBt6BpWbtviw6YBqcGzrsx2TjUYW1fSh5JnBxoxJWOjKg1TnwA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKX0j9UPTndjfY7BTw2ZlXIbOJW4Dgu0RyRGyutJz4qrCVzW79ekFDCwylnAXT92DeoT8vzIdR4vDf39FMUCxUMB8Wy0agl90dwjQI-n5HdcV0RmFpeBsTIy0ZVw7EIyS4WMalugyam2wffHu7BIGlLWRKYi4OtkfqQFfUf-OaS_M1tLmMnrKpjgr7WC_9lHBFSupqb1QBtr_zh9f0puyj6cE6HTeLbpY8SRcYDsw14mP0C-X7g3Cw==&c=uNukNUVyi9Z4wzuMVp_KVYBsYYQMC3mluwoAdWgHGXmcvZ2bMAhrQg==&ch=Um8ygBt6BpWbtviw6YBqcGzrsx2TjUYW1fSh5JnBxoxJWOjKg1TnwA==)
---
| | |

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: At the end of this long week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220603?refcode=lpfe220603_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220603?refcode=lpfe220603_nd]
Team,
This has been another hard week, at home and across the country. The pain, the heartbreak, and the anger arising from the senseless gun violence all around and so much else can feel like too much to bear. I have spent this week at home in Houston talking to so many people who have shared with me their feelings about the gravity of the moment we are living in. I feel it, too.
In the few days since the tragedy in Uvalde, we have seen news of more Americans killed every single day. Every one of them someone beloved. More than 200 mass shootings so far this year. At the beginning of this PRIDE month, we see the urgent need to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. And at the end of this month, we expect to see the Supreme Court’s ruling in the case that may very well overturn Roe v. Wade and the fundamental equality, dignity, and autonomy it has provided Americans for 50 years.
The weight of these issues and so many more leads us to ask so many questions about what we are doing and how we can do better. And one thing I am so grateful for is that, when faced with such overwhelming challenges, so many people are standing up for what’s right in all the ways they can – marching, writing, calling, organizing, canvassing, contributing, and never giving up.
And that includes everyone who has supported this campaign at this time. Support for this campaign will help make it possible for us to hold this seat in the House, to hold the House, and to turn voters out in Texas who can change the future of our state. I’m so grateful for everyone who contributed to our campaign last month.
The past few weeks have reminded us why our work together is vital and urgent. It could not be more clear that the people we empower as our leaders have power to profoundly shape these issues and our lives. To bring about change, we need to win elections.
That is what everyone on #TeamLizzie has been doing since day one. And I am so grateful to have your support and partnership, especially during weeks like these.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220603?refcode=lpfe220603_nd]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

And as we head into the summer months, we’re counting on your continued support to keep this seat red, fire Nancy Pelosi as Speaker, and END one-party Democrat control in Washington! Together, we can win a great victory for freedom and take back our country in November. Thanks again! \- Kevin Hern and Team Hern **_P.S. name: Liz, Team ODP
subject: Will Mike DeWine stand with Ohioans or the gun lobby?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Team,

After the terrible tragedy in Dayton, Mike DeWine promised Ohioans he’d "do something" to curb gun violence. Years later, after countless more shootings including recent tragedies in Buffalo, Uvalde, and Tulsa, DeWine hasn't taken action -- and we think we know why.

**The gun lobby has spent over $580,000 in political contributions in Ohio alone – and Governor Mike DeWine has received more contributions from the gun lobby than any other state-based politician since 2010.**

In 2021, DeWine signed the "Stand Your Ground" bill into law. Now after Uvalde, rather than take common-sense steps to stop gun violence, Gov. DeWine has announced that he will sign a bill that permits school districts to arm employees to "harden schools."

**Right now, Governor Mike DeWine has a choice to make: stand with Ohio students, teachers, and police officers or cave once again to the gun lobby and extremists funding his campaign.**

**[Join us in calling on Mike DeWine to take a stand against gun violence in our state NOW. | | | Dear Peter, Using the Fake News media to push lies to the American people, the Democrats continue to try and keep control of voters. Biden has _miserably_ failed all of us these past two years as our president.

**_But, despite all of his failures, the Left refuses to take any responsibility_**. They want to blame gun violence on Republicans. They want to blame Russia and Ukraine’s war on Trump. And they want to blame LGBT youth suicide on Christians.

**We need to fix this by showing all of America the root of the problems we’re facing here - Leftism. **

I am running for reelection to **_fix_** this country. Biden has had unchecked power the past two years. He has brought our economy to the brink of destruction. He has hurt our foreign affairs and turned our school systems into indoctrination centers.

If we don’t step up this midterm and rally behind strong Republicans, our country will be destroyed under Biden’s last two years as President!

Help me keep up the good fight in Washington by [**donating**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8ae339874f&e=645b3b1338) to my campaign today.

name: Peter Welch
subject: The mindset I’ll bring to the Senate:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Some U.S. Senators are too fixated on what they can’t do instead of what they can.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
Hello,
Right now, we have a U.S. Senate that isn't getting much done. Reproductive rights are in jeopardy, there’s been no movement on reducing gun violence, and families across the country are hurting. We need to elect more folks who will work together to get things done.
Over my career as a public servant, I’ve never stopped fighting for the progressive values that benefit both Vermont and the country. From working to lower the cost of prescription drugs to fighting climate change, there’s so much to accomplish, and not a second to waste.
This race is an important one if we’re going to expand the Democratic majority and stop Mitch McConnell Republicans from retaking the Senate. They’ve got their eyes set on Vermont, so we need to act.
[**If you’re able, will you make a $5 contribution to our campaign for Senate?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2901?t=3&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2901?t=15&amount=3&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2901?t=17&amount=15&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2901?t=19&amount=28&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2901?t=21&amount=50&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2901?t=11&amount=100&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2901?t=13&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
---

---
I’ve always had a ‘can do’ attitude. There’s solutions to find in working together. But we’ve seen Senate Republicans consistently block legislation that would help solve problems—they’re fighting for failure.
This is an All Hands On Deck moment, and I jumped in this race because of the urgency of this moment. Losing this seat could have devastating long-term effects on our democracy, and we can’t let that happen. When we win this election, I’ll be there on Day One to fight for our progressive values and on behalf of working families, and it’ll be all because of the power of this grassroots movement.
[**Your support is critical to our campaign. Can you pitch in right away?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2901?t=7&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)
Thanks for all you do,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22jun?refcode=em_20220603_f_p_senate&refcode2=491_61531_5jUZsT&akid=491%2E61531%2E5jUZsT)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The fight isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | | Friend,

**Great news! We won Georgia 's Republican primary for U.S. Senate.**

I'll be the Republican nominee to face Democrat Raphael Warnock in the Senate race in November, which means this fight is heating up.

It's no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent's campaign. In the first three months of the year, my opponent raised $13.6 MILLION - _that 's $151,000 per day or $105 per minute!_

Raphael Warnock has outraised EVERY candidate in the country, which is why I'm reaching out to you now. _**[Friend, I need your help now more than ever.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kDtvhDAQhH8NdEZ-cCYUFJGiS3UpokhXWsuygHXmIdvc_f2YJEhJE8mFNR7P7H5d02EHAnPbSC4l11yJJ8W5LGp1qk6d1NTWiC2WWcnBkY-Fp3VrnUWYI4Rbv3ikApcpHxuoJaHg0NWyxgpBybJWUAnsea-xpfx6MRewzs7DG0zU-NgbH0y8m9ADe4C7kTeaKSalEblrxhjXkKnnTJ7TCYSbp-JhZ0_d3rhrPayA6fL9mcXdqs5-t_pUk6mX6DfKpN7iZBCmFewwJ_VY1lxf2fvHuRCcV7o0I_mAI7ljmChEzdMbE5XUPykTdXabUgZNaZf1Rw3LlkAk9U_gUbzMkeb4uzeOxHo7jJHZMEe23MkXiQc7DLlvuvVhnbNBV4n9sJd9cY7_c_sEuDSV-w "Friend, I need your help now more than ever.")**_

_**[If you're able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it's $1 or $100, your help is critical.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kDtvhDAQhH8NdEZ-cCYUFJGiS3UpokhXWsuygHXmIdvc_f2YJEhJE8mFNR7P7H5d02EHAnPbSC4l11yJJ8W5LGp1qk6d1NTWiC2WWcnBkY-Fp3VrnUWYI4Rbv3ikApcpHxuoJaHg0NWyxgpBybJWUAnsea-xpfx6MRewzs7DG0zU-NgbH0y8m9ADe4C7kTeaKSalEblrxhjXkKnnTJ7TCYSbp-JhZ0_d3rhrPayA6fL9mcXdqs5-t_pUk6mX6DfKpN7iZBCmFewwJ_VY1lxf2fvHuRCcV7o0I_mAI7ljmChEzdMbE5XUPykTdXabUgZNaZf1Rw3LlkAk9U_gUbzMkeb4uzeOxHo7jJHZMEe23MkXiQc7DLlvuvVhnbNBV4n9sJd9cY7_c_sEuDSV-w "If you’re able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it’s $1 or $100, your help is critical.")**_

We must band together to flip this crucial Senate seat in Georgia. It's up to strong conservatives like us to win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track.

Thank you for your continued support.

On to victory,

Herschel Walker

Friend – Today is National Gun Violence Awareness Day, and I'm reaching out with an important message:
In the greatest nation in the world, you should be able to go to the grocery store, movie theater, your place of worship, or your _elementary school _without being worried about being gunned down by someone who never should have had a gun in the first place.
That's why I have always voted in favor of gun safety in the House – and now, I'm calling on the Senate to protect our children and communities from gun violence by passing crucial, commonsense gun reform legislation that protects our communities and saves lives.
**If you're as determined to protect worshipers, shoppers and students as I am, I need you to turn your grief into action. Please, join me in calling on the Senate to pass commonsense gun safety legislation _immediately_ :**
| | **Should the Senate vote to pass gun safety legislation?**

clean_body: | | | Friend – Today is National Gun Violence Awareness Day, and I'm reaching out with an important message: In the greatest nation in the world, you should be able to go to the grocery store, movie theater, your place of worship, or your elementary school without being worried about being gunned down by someone who never should have had a gun in the first place. That's why I have always voted in favor of gun safety in the House – and now, I'm calling on the Senate to protect our children and communities from gun violence by passing crucial, commonsense gun reform legislation that protects our communities and saves lives. If you're as determined to protect worshipers, shoppers and students as I am, I need you to turn your grief into action. Funerals are actively ongoing for the 19 children and teachers murdered in the mass shooting in Uvlade, Texas. If Republicans have it their way, they will sweep their murders under the rug. **But with Eric’s leadership,_this time will be different._**
By holding the GOP’s feet to the fire so publicly on gun violence, he’s forcing Republicans to continue to engage on the issue – and he won’t stop until we get meaningful, common-sense gun reform across the finish line and onto President Biden’s desk.
**Eric is bringing much-needed national attention to this critical issue that must be addressed. Inaction is NOT an option.[Take a moment to watch Eric’s stunning speech in the House Judiciary Committee now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46097983/348806012/1023798887?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWNkZGQ0YS04ZWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YtxjN2NqyUIPm6pHqFTUeUPoHXMMdIENXJ3zVacoiL8=&emci=390f81d1-89e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=55cddd4a-8ee3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=7878003)**
Thank you,
Swalwell HQ

Hey folks, From now until November, we’re ready to go up against Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick in the general election by bringing people together on the issues that matter most. Our team is working hard to talk to every voter about what’s at stake in this election — including voting rights, reproductive freedom, gun safety reform, climate action, and so much more.
