body:
Inaction in the face of this much gun violence and this many mass shootings is despicable. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_jnKxwmav2WIMSguQ3eRNl_gZjh5UE0AQaPv09yFpHmVhWFDzIiTglnlTZrjxqmR3SGq7P9kVGxncwtd-mTE47CsNmr-1cS1rreDQ9Ph9QW6fknLRfi44GdVdzJw4FqwH2SdhOl2ebCxkRgD7s81QgZiZrM2NSO2S-j936SKGEcVeaVLWNOEQ91A4Cc6EcZOg7DcHBRA0hKKfS_peQ7l1c59Bn77sAWmsZVqTiMPfpPQ/3ml/ZpbN0SRjRcy3LwnlmPRb6A/h0/RXYDTHSG7gMsCcbSLzYL0Vqn3ObobPnRBSvJNcboAr0)
**** Peter, **_[](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS-yzM-8A3P_-OhnVymYXzE8Xd2NLVPYXQciEdRaCia5k4hhow6tS2aBiToKmo9BnsbYNU2KrrUfaRh5dHG1vZuFEmaMZ6VB-UTRRDr9-Ibdidnf88M8qcSZUgi6hJ4KPkFEDYeMiy_gAQVov9TxnIeI-blO7Hc6O_YIMHUgKYJCpN-rF9IW624MIU_SHQAAVHtHJmyDflpA2UQy-Gr1oNftjxLQtThmJIAKqR5BVRWwFxK6-fy5b03714vJtdDBsaKHNsXuKqQAjDaPmIVUn1qgmMok1TkyG1W2VSsd6mKhwhtZ0d8AYDWPwgUQdCaZP4E2zU-HQqEU1R-21kx1UV6w/3ml/ZpbN0SRjRcy3LwnlmPRb6A/h1/1maErbr9rFDILyv7J9JZNocA8f_gxs6ymdpVRNvdccc)_** In the ten days since the horrifying massacre of school children and their teachers in Uvalde, Texas, there have already been additional mass shootings in Oklahoma, Iowa, and Milwaukee. **Kyrsten Sinema is standing in the way of comprehensive legislation that could help prevent these slaughters.** Instead of eliminating the filibuster so that Congress can heed President Biden’s call for meaningful action, Sinema is wasting time trying to cut deals with NRA-backed Republicans. Now is not the time for half-measures that shift blame away from guns and deflect from the root cause of these killings. **_[Can you donate $5 to make it clear that Sinema’s half-measures are not enough? We demand meaningful gun legislation that meets the severity of this moment — and that means Sinema abandoning her defense of the filibuster.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSHMOdAnxmrgj5tSBbkeWtflPJyBAHFjQYkEGz9fVbIQwVcPAKY5pXO557zstZS6KynOFnP8A8ed8qOaEGGi1RNW_NAz5DxXf-hfVX8XwaGcPK2nfBRn4xqxSiOhFEi9OTpesp4D1pXY6rVf_fCZySX7AD_MwlpAYB5GVg6TB3UAhhc-h7c8SdMBfk2AQZpNBrt9k0tV-mOoLVNLJjEER0c2JXThdIlLDYYxvlxRMFlinHA9q59O0ONTQm8KNBgY-Fx5RDWEBE06oKckPcbtD3ZybqOs-iyKDxG4aZqYjTkIX5RXwsBRLhS8P63ItokkCDVc0i7XUiQbzM1gYekwjN6w/3ml/ZpbN0SRjRcy3LwnlmPRb6A/h2/xoTD-0FkHh5Wrh4UUN0FPzEZzxmjV3nFusuogIAdChk)_** **_[](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSI1IbFJbDhn7bdu3Lg-49omq1dUh0Xi0kvvIspFSo8rh4FhG0FyM8aLMnKc7K84tT_5i4v23_dCvYBTI4IL6yVB4I694maFYZ4uYmV661ihCb1fIwMRVPBblreHxQML0c5i7_1F3A7Cpg8FrezV4kDE0hEGp4WM4VttvGEO4Ig7GwXnalPuzMRDjTiy5ZYN-7uqN4_tir5XnQ-KbldNWKyP4MWEzflrKxWzeNcfBv0LZw1MQSK4yxlg8kPUx92eo5gngP8nL7PtY4FoVrK4avl3JLJ8sYws8tbdnSooiziCQvQ3bp7cVn3q6eG4xi6ApjB0LCsnh_zA2dDdZGmjYlpw/3ml/ZpbN0SRjRcy3LwnlmPRb6A/h3/8XKgHwRw6Hyy7l5rGpZbp6YWr0hY-xnKrLuqovsmsvY)_****__** **__** **[Contribute $5](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSHMOdAnxmrgj5tSBbkeWtfudEbUhT6RrUaahjNov7wgETVCoamgJNBMNkaqV3r6IUeZPHE7S43ab8XAJA8LVbvsfzRq0sTaxdRKhoiTNNbJlesWlkSueDLHiBcWA1iqHVkSEYOe208ypGUj5N_RBcO6VJ86HnDljc9ilNqcDheLQIJakThmD41YX5fo2bWhHEA3tVjYB409uhfJG14nG-sw3P6AiWLkFxLpHJ0yhTs_ErPsq0rInZ1xTvWNAcU7FInUoczKyN5gZ-thTgD6uCjGDGum5zUJmjsLDZt5u8950nUDS25f0f0nuhm91T79MITmn7BgT16O3UdlMwFh9RYw/3ml/ZpbN0SRjRcy3LwnlmPRb6A/h4/YTwf-YG91q8ry8sWg8Q-cTsdBf5HyDmp5LQWLGUvv0Y)** Let’s be clear: Sinema is failing our children, our communities, and Americans everywhere. Her empty condolences are meaningless until she stops blocking progress. There have been over 230 mass shootings in the United States just this year. Congress has a responsibility to take action, and politicians like Kyrsten Sinema have a responsibility to protect their constituents’ lives through their policy choices. Sinema is making a CHOICE to prioritize an archaic procedural tool that allows the Republicans to dictate policy, instead of saving lives. That’s unacceptable. **_[Can you donate $5 to make sure we replace Sinema with a Democrat who will prioritize human life over the filibuster?](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSHMOdAnxmrgj5tSBbkeWtflPJyBAHFjQYkEGz9fVbIQx4rOMg6JyrDSRF2NCPrEY8tY5RATaokOjNr_sUfOBBZvUJNMT-fBk5QMYbQvnY2V1Vz4VCKk959PRD1AVHLa5_xheDLo2Ln1nTVb0RyN_1uUVdNptEhbke97ttOsksP6mbHm8Z2cOdskBDZXGp9c6Q224Dkf5TnfLxbt5LfH3xur_pzrkd3gQDpN-BPlvL69ebzqskYUOukX5sl64jz5fQhX5nxY9j2dRfULJCvX8bGcAE8smmS_mQytJQGjAsQ8lCAopS7829Au_Dy8otEOAhtyljBHgT8nCsG0qhCSAIWw/3ml/ZpbN0SRjRcy3LwnlmPRb6A/h5/N69v3_R5_9ROGgNbu3zl3Yl1hTcm9wgsmz5EQxcCMow)_** President Biden said it perfectly at his press conference:
> “ _Do something. Just do something. For God’s sake, do something. How much more carnage are we willing to accept?’ he asked. ‘How many more innocent American lives must be taken before we say: Enough. Enough._ ’”1
Thank you for your support in this critical moment, Primary Sinema Project

clean_body: Inaction in the face of this much gun violence and this many mass shootings is despicable. | | | ** Peter, In the ten days since the horrifying massacre of school children and their teachers in Uvalde, Texas, there have already been additional mass shootings in Oklahoma, Iowa, and Milwaukee. Kyrsten Sinema is standing in the way of comprehensive legislation that could help prevent these slaughters. Instead of eliminating the filibuster so that Congress can heed President Biden’s call for meaningful action, Sinema is wasting time trying to cut deals with NRA-backed Republicans. Now is not the time for half-measures that shift blame away from guns and deflect from the root cause of these killings. ** Let’s be clear: Sinema is failing our children, our communities, and Americans everywhere. Her empty condolences are meaningless until she stops blocking progress. There have been over 230 mass shootings in the United States just this year. Congress has a responsibility to take action, and politicians like Kyrsten Sinema have a responsibility to protect their constituents’ lives through their policy choices. Sinema is making a CHOICE to prioritize an archaic procedural tool that allows the Republicans to dictate policy, instead of saving lives. That’s unacceptable. President Biden said it perfectly at his press conference: “ Do something. Just do something. For God’s sake, do something. How much more carnage are we willing to accept?’ he asked. ‘How many more innocent American lives must be taken before we say: Enough. Enough. ’”1 Thank you for your support in this critical moment, Primary Sinema Project 1 - | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Who does that?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Who responds to gun violence by making it easier to carry guns in Texas without a background check? Who shows up to a press conference feigning concern for the victims only after stuffing his pockets with campaign cash, and then proposes no solutions to help prevent the next tragedy?
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=300%2E5257348%2Em6wBpR)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_beto.4YpX23&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220603_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=300%2E5257348%2Em6wBpR)
Dear Derek,
Last week made it more clear than ever that if we care about protecting the lives of our fellow Texans, if we want every child in this state to be healthy and happy, if we want to safeguard those who are closest to us from violent crime and gun violence, then we must overcome and defeat Greg Abbott.
After each mass shooting in Texas, he has promised solutions but provided none. In fact, he’s made it easier for violent criminals to carry guns on our streets and set the stage for more tragedies like Uvalde, Midland-Odessa, El Paso, Santa Fe and Sutherland Springs.
And if anyone still gave him the benefit of the doubt, he cleared that up last Tuesday night when he read the details of the school shooting to the press like he was reading the weather forecast and then, instead of traveling the 245 miles to Uvalde to be with grieving families, he chose to travel 300 miles in the opposite direction to a fundraiser. He was literally counting dollars while first responders in Uvalde were counting bodies.
Who does that? Who responds to gun violence by making it easier to carry guns in Texas without a background check? Who shows up to a press conference feigning concern for the victims only after stuffing his pockets with campaign cash, and then proposes no solutions to help prevent the next tragedy?
It’s the exact same guy who bans women from making their own health care decisions in a state with one of the highest rates of maternal mortality in the developed world, and sets a $10,000 bounty on the back on any Texan who helps any woman seek an abortion.
It’s the same person who does nothing after being told repeatedly by a Federal judge that his Child Protective Services is understaffed and unaccountable, and that children emerge from the foster care system “more damaged than when they entered.” Over 100 Texas kids have died in Abbott’s child welfare system since 2020. Instead of fixing it, he’d rather try to scare you about transgender kids and prosecute their loving parents.
It’s the same governor who couldn’t keep the lights on or the heat running in the energy capital of the world, causing more than 700 Texans — including children — to die because he cared more about his donors’ profits than about fixing the grid after being warned it could fail.
We must overcome his cruelty, incompetence and corruption if we are going to save lives and allow our children to live without the constant fear of being murdered in their schools, supermarkets, and places of worship; or be left to fend for themselves in a foster care system that has gone from bad to worse on his watch.
We overcome that by beating Greg Abbott in November. And we can do more to combat gun violence by holding our majority in the House, growing the majority in the Senate, and passing new gun safety bills. My friend, Adam Schiff, is helping to lead that effort.
**[Help me ensure we have the resources to reach every Texas voter and ensure they know the cost and consequence of keeping Abbott in office, and our opportunity to choose a better future for ourselves and our kids. Split a contribution between our campaign and Adam Schiff’s today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_beto.4YpX23&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220603_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=300%2E5257348%2Em6wBpR)**

name: Marianne Williamson
subject: It’s time for change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Nancy Pelosi’s leadership is a perpetuation of what has become a corrupt system in Washington, and we will not drive the car out of the ditch by looking to the same people who drove us into it. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, This is a sad and chaotic time in America, and we are challenged to change. From mass shootings to environmental damage to attacks on our reproductive rights, things are not working. We are faced with the knowledge that in many ways our system has failed us. **Nothing will seriously change if we continue to elect the same people who led us into this mess, in the hopes they can lead us out of it.** Nancy Pelosi has served in the House of Representatives since 1987; she has been Speaker of the House for a total of seven of those years. Even if I did not object to her support for a Congressional candidate who has an NRA A rating and is the sole pro-choice Democrat in the House, and even if I did not object to her support for stock trading by members of Congress; even if I did not object to her support for endless defense spending and oil drilling and subsidizing Big Oil – I would still be hoping for a new era of leadership in America. No one who has served in the halls of power for almost 35 years then has the consciousness or temperament to oppose that system; at this point they _have become_ the system. **That is why I support Shahid Buttar in his primary bid to replace her as the Democratic candidate for Congress in California's 11th congressional district.** Nancy Pelosi’s leadership is a perpetuation of what has become a corrupt system in Washington, and we will not drive the car out of the ditch by looking to the same people who drove us into it. Shahid’s background as a lawyer, non-profit leader and peace activist has made him a strong voice for change. This isn’t an election about personalities; it’s an election about policies. I am longing to see new faces, new voices, and new policies in Washington. We can turn what has become a government “of the corporations, by the corporations and for the corporations” back into a government that at least tries to be “of the people, by the people and for the people.” It is up to us to make the change, to end the season of our political despair. Buttar’s campaign is a powerful challenge to the status quo, and by voting for him you are joining a passionate wave of change. **[Please support the candidate who interrupts the trajectory of political dysfunction that has gripped our nation](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLgRhTW1vFwRig-uXxN0VTgdenzyijOeB_BMHI-MgIF13iBvzlNrDk_GIz3WFVyHwfSsbG_x_i2MqYOBMlqE2F7jmTzOysaZ4WIAPLyS26RPGnHXphFTH06z58QQrCwkWjEymq2GXS4kf7GpouyCoanIB35xsPyR134XNd_8nKbp9q-eLDvEE2x5k1QUHtK6crpzsP-Y746aZzLE6bo_nipx8BbUulLNTm4gbwVCB_xzBCDCK5QXGYIoZx2TuMm_II8vLUrTgPjNMzIS41NX6pQV3kArzgi6iW_JNAhikolrg/3ml/9dbs-E7OQFiSnuP07L8wqQ/h0/87Kx5xs0TTq53PmD8fd7b9-1-3I49Q0cnMODODGAgss)**. It’s time for change. All my best,
Marianne

clean_body: Nancy Pelosi’s leadership is a perpetuation of what has become a corrupt system in Washington, and we will not drive the car out of the ditch by looking to the same people who drove us into it. | | | | | Dear Peter, This is a sad and chaotic time in America, and we are challenged to change. From mass shootings to environmental damage to attacks on our reproductive rights, things are not working. We are faced with the knowledge that in many ways our system has failed us. Nothing will seriously change if we continue to elect the same people who led us into this mess, in the hopes they can lead us out of it. Nancy Pelosi has served in the House of Representatives since 1987; she has been Speaker of the House for a total of seven of those years. Even if I did not object to her support for a Congressional candidate who has an NRA A rating and is the sole pro-choice Democrat in the House, and even if I did not object to her support for stock trading by members of Congress; even if I did not object to her support for endless defense spending and oil drilling and subsidizing Big Oil – I would still be hoping for a new era of leadership in America. No one who has served in the halls of power for almost 35 years then has the consciousness or temperament to oppose that system; at this point they have become the system. That is why I support Shahid Buttar in his primary bid to replace her as the Democratic candidate for Congress in California's 11th congressional district. Nancy Pelosi’s leadership is a perpetuation of what has become a corrupt system in Washington, and we will not drive the car out of the ditch by looking to the same people who drove us into it. Shahid’s background as a lawyer, non-profit leader and peace activist has made him a strong voice for change. This isn’t an election about personalities; it’s an election about policies. I am longing to see new faces, new voices, and new policies in Washington. We can turn what has become a government “of the corporations, by the corporations and for the corporations” back into a government that at least tries to be “of the people, by the people and for the people.” It is up to us to make the change, to end the season of our political despair. Buttar’s campaign is a powerful challenge to the status quo, and by voting for him you are joining a passionate wave of change. . It’s time for change. All my best, Marianne | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . name: Charles Booker
subject: Enough is enough, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Enough is enough,
Peter.

For too long, Rand Paul has used his power in office to help his white
supremacist friends and incite hate and division in our country.

* He single-handedly blocked the Emmett Till Anti-Lynching Act from
passing in 2020 which would have made this heinous act a federal hate
crime two years ago.
* He voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and
denied basic voting protections for Black and brown communities.
* While families are still burying their loved ones following the
massacre in Buffalo in May, Rand Paul opposed the bill to address
domestic terrorism fueled by racism — saying racism has ‘gotten
better’ since the 1960s.
* He spread the lie that the 2020 election was stolen after a record
number of Black Georgians voted and helped incite a violent white
supremacist insurrection.

In this historic election, the choice couldn’t be clearer. Do we move
forward together, or do we let politicians like Rand Paul forever hold us
back and drive us apart?

In November, we will choose justice, healing, and humanity, and FINALLY
remove this dangerous man from the Senate.

I need your help to make this happen,
Peter. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220603.l1menz&refcode=em20220603-other-2014&t=1001&akid=2014%2E346206%2ErYT18o ]Will you chip in
$5 right now to show Rand Paul that this movement is rising
up to end his political career?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220603.l1menz&refcode=em20220603-2014&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=2014%2E346206%2ErYT18o ]Donate $5 now →

Let’s be clear, Rand Paul’s reactions to these painful events are all
connected, and they all have the same end goal: to maintain white
supremacy.

This year, we have a real chance to write a new chapter in our history;
one that moves us forward in the fight for economic, racial, and
environmental justice.

We have a chance to move our country forward towards a future where we
don’t have to worry about our door’s getting kicked in or our children
facing police violence because of the color of their skin.

We have a chance to send a young Black man from the hood and descendant of
enslaved Kentuckians to the United States Senate, replace Rand Paul, and
bring forth a new chapter of equitable, strong leadership to our
Commonwealth.

Rand Paul may want to divide us, but hate won’t win this time. I know
that, together, we can create the future we want — for ourselves, for our
loved ones, and for our communities.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220603.l1menz&refcode=em20220603-other-2014&t=1021&akid=2014%2E346206%2ErYT18o ]That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate and I hope you're ready to join
me in this fight. So I have to ask one more time: will you please chip in
$5 to our campaign?

It’s time to move forward together.

Thank you,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220603-2014-footer&t=1022&refcode2=2014_346206_rYT18o&akid=2014%2E346206%2ErYT18o

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2014%2E346206%2ErYT18o

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

This year, we have a real chance to write a new chapter in our history; one that moves us forward in the fight for economic, racial, and environmental justice. We have a chance to move our country forward towards a future where we don’t have to worry about our door’s getting kicked in or our children facing police violence because of the color of their skin. We have a chance to send a young Black man from the hood and descendant of enslaved Kentuckians to the United States Senate, replace Rand Paul, and bring forth a new chapter of equitable, strong leadership to our Commonwealth. Rand Paul may want to divide us, but hate won’t win this time. I know that, together, we can create the future we want — for ourselves, for our loved ones, and for our communities. [ ]That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate and I hope you're ready to join me in this fight. So I have to ask one more time: will you please chip in $5 to our campaign? It’s time to move forward together. Thank you, Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

subject: It has begun

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: sending this begrudgingly…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Since I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, our budgeting needs to be airtight.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46099136/348809904/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1091-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBjNDc5ZC05MWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l5T5tscURnqRF0E5fZrrEef3pOwcrd3jO69RakHe6FA=)
---
Hi,

I’d prefer not to email asking you for money. My focus is on fighting for commonsense gun legislation, action on climate change, protecting a woman’s reproductive rights, and lowering costs.

The reality is that I cannot continue this work if I lose my reelection, and New Hampshire is both a purple state and home to some of the most expensive media markets in the country.
**Since I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, our budgeting needs to be airtight****.** My team says that we’re pacing about $5,217 behind. That’s bad under normal circumstances – but with Mitch McConnell's dark money super PAC placing a $4.7 million ad buy against me and a recent public poll showing me down by two points, making budget cuts could set us back even further.
**[Please: Will you donate $3 or as much as you can to help us get out of this rut? Democrats can’t hold the Senate if we lose in New Hampshire, so your gift will help us win reelection and protect our narrow majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46099137/348809905/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1091-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjBjNDc5ZC05MWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l5T5tscURnqRF0E5fZrrEef3pOwcrd3jO69RakHe6FA=)**
Thank you for getting involved.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| | Hey Peter, Wanted to be sure you saw our note—Team Jacobs is marking an important milestone tomorrow with our final get-out-the-vote launch ahead of the Primary Election on Tuesday. **Are you able to join Matt, CAGOP Chairwoman Jessica Patterson, candidate for Controller Lahnee Chen, and our extended family of friends and supporters? ** It’ll be a big day for us, and would mean the world to Matt to have you there! Just a quick reminder to RSVP if you’re able to join us by replying to this email or by [clicking here](mailto:rob@mattjacobsforcongress.com,brandon@mattjacobsforcongress.com?subject=RSVP%20-%20Super%20Saturday,%20June%204&body=I'll%20be%20there,%20Team%20Jacobs! "rob@mattjacobsforcongress.com,brandon@mattjacobsforcongress.com"). Thanks, and hope to see you tomorrow!

—Brandon Field DirectorJacobs for Congress \-------Forwarded Message-------From: Pablo - Campaign ManagerDate: June 1, 2022 Subject: Come meet Matt! Join **CAGOP Chairwoman Jessica Patterson** and **Matt Jacobs** THIS Saturday, June 4, at 12:30pm, as we take part in our **FINAL Get-Out-The-Vote efforts before Election Day on June 7**! This is a great opportunity to learn about the fantastic work our campaign is doing in the community—**and to meet Matt!** Grab a slice of pizza with us, learn about what our campaign and Chairwoman Patterson are doing to flip CA-26, and if you have any questions about his candidacy, Matt will be here to answer them. Matt wants to earn your vote, and with your help, the votes of your neighbors and friends. **WHEN: Saturday, June 4th at 12:30PM****WHERE: Campaign HQ – 1362 Thousand Oaks Blvd.**

clean_body: I wanted to say thank you for helping us reach our May end-of-month deadline. | = | I wanted to say thank you for helping us reach our May end-of-month deadline. Our movement is people-powered, which means we rely on contributions from everyday Arizonans like you, so I really appreciate your support. We’ve still got more work to do before the election, and we have a HUGE FEC deadline coming up on June 30th, = | = If we want to keep the Democratic majority in Congress, we need to ensure we’re doing all we can to flip AZ-01 blue. Arizonans are getting tired of David Schweikert. It’s time to elect a leader that will actually fight for us. President Biden won this district by 1.5% in 2020, so I know we can win too. We’ve outraised David Schweikert before, and we can do it again. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation, Jevin * | | = Paid for by Friends of Jevin D. Hodge Friends of Jevin D. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. body:
We need your signature TODAY:
| | | **URGENT:** _Roe v. Wade_ is in SERIOUS danger of being overturned -- putting millions of Americans' rights in jeopardy -- **and Justice Sonia Sotomayor is raising the alarm:**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5996?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220603-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220603-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuote-Pros-sl1&akid=4553%2E9716520%2Eg4E6_a)

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: SCOTUS climate decision coming this month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
So much is at stake.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4289?t=2&akid=12978%2E53494%2EpnXNL_) Friend, This month, the Supreme Court will announce its ruling in _West Virginia v. EPA_ —a case that could undermine the federal government's very ability to fight the climate crisis. [_**When this decision drops, we must be ready to mobilize like never before. That's why we need you to watch and share our explainer video right now and help expose the conservative shadow campaigns that led to this moment.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4289?t=3&akid=12978%2E53494%2EpnXNL_) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4289?t=4&akid=12978%2E53494%2EpnXNL_) | [WATCH NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4289?t=5&akid=12978%2E53494%2EpnXNL_)
---
The _Clean Air Act_ —and hundreds of agency actions that are essential to our everyday lives and our clean energy future—are in jeopardy.
With their stolen supermajority, conservatives on the Supreme Court could overturn 50 years of precedent and rule that the executive branch—including the EPA—has no authority to regulate beyond what is explicitly written into legislation.
This means that instead of agencies having the power to develop rules, Congress would have to vote on every action that each federal agency takes.
[_**The very air we breathe is at stake. Watch our video, then share it far and wide before the decision comes out this month.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4289?t=6&akid=12978%2E53494%2EpnXNL_)
In solidarity,
Lena Moffitt
Chief of Staff, Evergreen Action
[WATCH NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4289?t=7&akid=12978%2E53494%2EpnXNL_)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=12978%2E53494%2EpnXNL_). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

With their stolen supermajority, conservatives on the Supreme Court could overturn 50 years of precedent and rule that the executive branch—including the EPA—has no authority to regulate beyond what is explicitly written into legislation. This means that instead of agencies having the power to develop rules, Congress would have to vote on every action that each federal agency takes. clean_body: Every single article that talks about the Senate majority mentions Georgia. | Fellow American, In 2021, Democrats narrowly won a pair of U.S. Senate races in Georgia, allowing President Biden to pass a $1.9 TRILLION spending package that most Americans believed wasn't needed. This package was only made possible by one man: Senator Raphael Warnock. His vote was the deciding vote on the bill. Because of this and other votes for the disastrous Biden agenda, you can thank Senator Warnock for: 1. Surging gas prices 2. Higher meat prices 3. Skyrocketing rent 4. Increased utility bills That's why when we continue to see news stories like the one below from Axios , we feel the need to share them with you immediately: The eyes of the nation are once again on Georgia, where we're running against the most successful, prolific fundraiser in the entire Democrat Party. If we're going to flip this Senate seat to Republican control, you cannot sit on the sidelines. Every single article that talks about the Senate majority mentions Georgia. This is where the Senate will be won or lost. - Please, don't wait. We need your help now more than we ever have before. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

| | Friend, In case you haven’t seen many emails from me yet, my name is CJ and I’m Derek Schmidt’s campaign manager. I wanted to reach out to you to make sure you saw Derek’s email two days ago and the email from our next Lieutenant Governor Katie Sawyer yesterday. Katie brings a new generation of young and energetic leadership to this ticket. **When she is sworn in next January alongside Derek, Katie will become the youngest Republican lieutenant governor in America. ** The whole team is so excited to have Katie**** on board, and we’re already hearing from voters from all across the state... They’re fired up and energized for this fight! To help welcome her to the team, we’re asking every Kansan to chip in a few dollars to our campaign to help show just how excited we all are to make Derek Schmidt our next Governor and Katie Sawyer our next Lieutenant Governor.

I wanted to reach out to you to make sure yo| | | | | Friend, In case you haven’t seen many emails from me yet, my name is CJ and I’m Derek Schmidt’s campaign manager. I wanted to reach out to you to make sure you saw Derek’s email two days ago and the email from our next Lieutenant Governor Katie Sawyer yesterday. Katie brings a new generation of young and energetic leadership to this ticket. When she is sworn in next January alongside Derek, Katie will become the youngest Republican lieutenant governor in America. The whole team is so excited to have Katie** on board, and we’re already hearing from voters from all across the state... They’re fired up and energized for this fight! To help welcome her to the team, we’re asking every Kansan to chip in a few dollars to our campaign to help show just how excited we all are to make Derek Schmidt our next Governor and Katie Sawyer our next Lieutenant Governor. You’ll need to act quickly, too, if you want**Katieto see your name on the list... This list is growing by the minute This is a huge announcement for our campaign – and Derek is really excited to be able to involve you this way. body:
With just a few days left until Election Day, we have one more major endorsement alert. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46099538/348811932/-1122995658?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110affhousing_TO_full_SLB_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2JlYmVlYy05N2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBWVWgej_BIN1cClH33ZXubpmta9fxUmRhmYFL-3ejI=)

Friends,
_***4 Days Until Election Day, June 7th!***_ If you would have told me on day 1 that would have such a big endorsement as the national organization of **Our Revolution** , I would tell you that there's no way we're going to lose. **Our Revolution **started in the wake of Bernie Sanders' run for President in 2016, and they have become a powerhouse of some of our sides’ strongest advocates and organizers for working people. Their endorsement, to me, means fighting together from here on out.
Our partnership means we'll have help in these final days calling, texting, and knocking on doors - but we need your help to pay for these services. clean_body: With just a few days left until Election Day, we have one more major endorsement alert. | = Friends, *4 Days Until Election Day, June 7th! If you would have told me on day 1 that would have such a big endorsement as the national organization of Our Revolution , I would tell you that there's no way we're going to lose. Our Revolution started in the wake of Bernie Sanders' run for President in 2016, and they have become a powerhouse of some of our sides’ strongest advocates and organizers for working people. Their endorsement, to me, means fighting together from here on out. Our partnership means we'll have help in these final days calling, texting, and knocking on doors - but we need your help to pay for these services. We're sitting at about $3,800 short of our goal that we need to raise by the end of the weekend. Can you pitch in to help us cross the finish line? = _________________________ = Sign up to Canvass with Team Ortega, or Virtual Phonebanking with Our Revolution - In case you missed it, please check out our campaign video and share on social media and with with friends, family: Yours In Solidarity, Mike Ortega | Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our campaign costs? =** | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Right now and through the weekend, volunteers and staff in the Central Valley are making thousands of calls into our community reminding folks to vote in our final get out the vote push. This primary is an important opportunity to show momentum, so we need every edge we can get.

There's still A LOT you can do to help us finish strong: 1\. **[Chip in $3 to help us meet our final "Get Out The Vote" fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46099774/348813903/-674430938?refcode=em-6.3.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2M2M2U0Yy05OWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gQdYZEZPxwp5egRJrnkNK9A-XTHaeCDiaxuZkLZVO-o=)** Anything we raise today will go to our final push.

2\. If you're in the Central Valley, **[join Marisa and the Kern, Inyo and Mono Labor Council for a weekend of canvassing](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46099778/348813912/-226782001?source=direct_link&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2M2M2U0Yy05OWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gQdYZEZPxwp5egRJrnkNK9A-XTHaeCDiaxuZkLZVO-o=&emci=7508b10a-7ae3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9cc63e4c-99e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=21170704)** to Democrats and undecided voters. Click the link above for details and to register.

3\. And last but not least, please don’t forget to cast your ballot! **If you have friends that need a friendly reminder, forward this email directly to them.** We’re headed into primary election in our strongest position yet. This is not the time to slow down. Let's keep the momentum going.

Thanks for your support,

Team Marisa Wood

name: Will Rollins
subject: Two things about my race:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46099733/348813863/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2M2M2U0Yy05OWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yT4DmlecGJebnBbKayA_en9G5yqOXHJHczadlSKQen8=)
I'll cut to it, Peter.

I'm humbly asking you to **[contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46099741/348813866/976319900?refcode=em-6.3.22-nopeners-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2M2M2U0Yy05OWUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yT4DmlecGJebnBbKayA_en9G5yqOXHJHczadlSKQen8=)** to bolster our final turnout efforts so we can win the primary and unseat Ken Calvert. With just 4 days until ballots are counted, we're picking up incredible momentum. Let me explain what I mean, and why this request is so important.
1. We just got word that for the first time in our district's history, Democrats now hold a narrow registration advantage in CA-41. **Registered Democrats outnumber registered Republicans in this district.**

2. A recent survey conducted by a third-party pollster showed our campaign neck and neck with Ken Calvert in a General Election matchup. **42% of likely voters support me with 41% backing Calvert. We're the strongest Democratic candidate to unseat him.**

CA-41 is no longer the Republican stronghold it once was. It’s clear local voters are ready to part ways with Calvert, but we need to keep pushing through next Tuesday:

**[Our data shows that we still need to increase Democrat turnout if we’re going to win this primary, so we set an end-of-week goal of $15,000 to keep our momentum going. “Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” |
[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=a533d39fc74e403e9204394fe212c731&_e=-oKas8Wnc8v9rlO0deyTvxaLFANEl1dNJ0h3TUyxM75NC_FMNhi5jJXHvcXxWStIN0tQQGVfCQr1ajkVCgt7Hm-j5tBaGpx1GTrOgyY19_BgHZlz8HXhYopSDkr1TNp8TfELZemeVhLn08dm35DMxXEj6Dtk1nPu5ZD_GXJfAY7QfAwEZJoZJbzLnVVt6que8G4uZe8zoqWH3xo0V7wYceC6Cz7BGX3H9ERs-5-8yYJCDiOTiwuZ0GdQ_j7jKWIdBfuSMeFLnJNWVA8Zsj_HwjCKzdNhMSkpHlu-NZaeiBMhoIbq53s9eXFL4QBWtYair_4A1WJan25y_b-uyeZZITpVF4s6_MVDCYTHiH_9PxnQZ2pUGI1kyRgfnGOJN8y7-g_ZxFn4JyMKekvxiJIAmtrlf7A_EA201DIv60VpxRLAo0pVSrRWh8Al1vhte-sJ_kgEMkozb_5PJPK8BRa3Q2ciAIVFBWU8OsA-tdkWDpO0XgVQuLrBffU9eaNF8W8u)

Peter,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. **[Without your support, winning will be much more difficult.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=a533d39fc74e403e9204394fe212c731&_e=-oKas8Wnc8v9rlO0deyTvxaLFANEl1dNJ0h3TUyxM75NC_FMNhi5jJXHvcXxWStIN0tQQGVfCQr1ajkVCgt7Hm-j5tBaGpx1GTrOgyY19_BgHZlz8HXhYopSDkr1TNp8TfELZemeVhLn08dm35DMxXEj6Dtk1nPu5ZD_GXJfAY7QfAwEZJoZJbzLnVVt6que8G4uZe8zoqWH3xo0V7wYceC6Cz7BGX3H9ERs-5-8yYJCDiOTiwuZ0GdQ_j7jKWIdBfuSMeFLnJNWVA8Zsj_HwjCKzdNhMSkpHlu-NZaeiBND35A9Cus1UBYgXuYXfohxbkOUyC2xZu_dEP_wCLP3TwiMbvcmyYZqpeV3osKMDWmUKag2sjLput4Ln22xVlt19kDyTX8dL4VH1yiKePoVG69WQO3HbLsQQ0Qock1ULa1BYYt22THGARNJIjWGnK2R0PDqmHRngEVsBEqB2FNo9oepwNymwCuKcd0POznuluzISVORjtKMIkG2mk0cqWue)**

Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - _I know what it's like to be in the big leagues._

Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me.

clean_body: “Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” | Peter, Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia. Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination. That very night, Democrats officially began their barrage of attacks against me. We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues. This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track. Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - total spending will likely exceed $200 million. As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden. Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - I know what it's like to be in the big leagues. Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me. If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Fellow Conservative,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

clean_body: 52% of Democrats just responded to a poll saying that they would surrender to the enemy rather than fight if the U.S. were invaded. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | “I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.” - Matthew Hennessey Fellow Conservative, Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out recently? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic. Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats - What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself? What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run? I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week. And in case you were wondering – 70% of Republicans polled said that they would stay and fight. name: Jessica Hanson
subject: ICYMI: KOAT Fact Checks Ronchetti’s Recent Campaign Ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
In case you missed it- KOAT fact checked Mark Ronchetti’s Recent Campaign Ad and found the claims to be true and documented. The fact check came of a| | |
---
| | In case you missed it- KOAT fact checked Mark Ronchetti’s Recent Campaign Ad and found the claims to be true and documented. The fact check came of a recent television advertisement pointing out Rebecca Dow’s role in a lawsuit brought by the victim's families of a child molestation case. Dow has falsely claimed the ad isn’t true, but KOAT evaluated all of the statements in the ad line by line. The ad is factually correct and all statements are supported by legal documents, media reports, and official state records. Watch the KOAT Fact Check here: [https://youtu.be/BXfrFgP8bcc](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=a10605c0d0974770be0420a795117cdc&_e=9Tksfmye0g1SEadS7bvy4AA2cIXhdJdyk_Y-KuUSIqTa9ziCVeUnJoRxcmQtYYml2M4daM_mgMDNQ36ARLX3yE7VZ8F36glTo6r4iA18a5PQK5wBIt423Nw3ElusaT-6S3ew-ELoTFjytn9iMbu_be2d16-X1vxCKNnXDGFFGhaGUQmAflGSMBOVVD8riGRWCfT1gdB6f3zulDE4-aNMw7U1uWh5MtTmmAfRo5KnYSRBPSlN1VxNbLo7HGgbtniaway6YYcBdPAym0WY-9Mk6g%3D%3D) Voters have a right to know the truth about the records of candidates running for the state’s highest office. It’s disappointing that Rebecca Dow would launch a negative campaign and then try to hide her own record by denying the truth. Dow has already been caught with an embarrassingly false ad against Ronchetti in which she completely fabricated quotes and now she’s trying to deny documented facts about her own record. Here’s the transcript from the KOAT story: “CLAIM: Did Dow run a taxpayer funded daycare? According to her bio and tax documents obtained by KOAT, “Dow was running two organizations, AppleTree Educational Center and Boys and Girls Club of Sierra County. According to the state’s checkbook, AppleTree received more than $8 million since 2009, and is still receiving money.” CLAIM: Was Dow’s employee accused of lewd conduct with a teenager and promoted? KOAT: Court documents of the lawsuit against Dow claim “Dow was aware of a previous incident in which Hernandez had, quote, ‘inappropriately questioned at least one teenaged girl about having sex with her boyfriend.’ The suit says Hernandez was not fired and instead received a written warning. Court records show Hernandez later oversaw the sleepover. The suit also says, after the first incident, Dow had interviewed Hernandez for a promotion and wanted him to get one. However, it is not clear if he was actually promoted.” CLAIM: Dow tried to bully the victim’s family to discourage them from filing a lawsuit. The predator was sent to prison, and families paid a $260,000 settlement. KOAT: “The lawsuit shows Dow was accused of trying to coerce the boy’s family from filing a claim.” “Court documents show Hernandez pled guilty to two counts of criminal sexual contact, and was sentenced to six years in prison. The case was settled. However, it’s not clear how much the two childcare centers run by Dow paid out. Many of the documents in reference to the settlement have been sealed.” Below is an article documenting the $260,000 settlement amount, something even Dow hasn’t disputed:
[https://nmpoliticalreport.com/2017/03/16/state-lawmaker-settles-lawsuit-for-260000/](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=a10605c0d0974770be0420a795117cdc&_e=9Tksfmye0g1SEadS7bvy4KgQU3dq3ogq3ccMSM1-W-eE37m7CDRByUmKG1lrr59zqbxkftT60dVQwQJlNxi20NAI4qCNojj0C2eQOqa_8OeCMHVRTTd6UhTUoLDeALAXd6KnL5jRGkaPltxOZK2x407JeiAAoJ6z5xNtFNSpANFvA34JL7nXA0khGS13_-1t9_xip_fQCcXzHsVszPBuP2yIfqbZSxgDh-vaOwrWyaDeWPB9y7ctpykaFhk_x9WVrO1bVuxGiPt7NRktz8XFFOL23kpehXX6t17sUVQHNLBsOx01KvXXaytnmGeWEHiZ0qkPBJboo5M1xQb_Qkox2w%3D%3D) ###
---
| | |
---
| | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer.
---
| | Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click [here](http://links.markronchetti.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_s=a10605c0d0974770be0420a795117cdc&_t=V57E8H_TUat5koku6Dc_hHRYfnxnG9J8gOjD2aZXYeZ7ZKaqqbO8wyTO2Z_sQa8y7H2CVvboQDJQZ4Zn0Qm0WHpMoKqR70T1-pEJhshf53begPJSRjf5oThoYGue1lJTD7BIa725ey3Sgdrf8C4f4Fa6d_k1PQZ4-Gnj8c-X0SU%3D) to unsubscribe.

Hey,
I’m gonna talk about growing up in Pennsylvania, but first, I have to ask: [**Can you split a $10 donation between me and Admiral Mike Franken to help fund our campaigns? I’m *so* grateful for your support (even if you think Wawa > Sheetz).**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46100112/348824072/1314858986?refcode=em20220603pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTU1YWY3Yy05ZGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-NmpFkXmVrF6ynmb_NRwBMPGb0LhfeiAPxL8scAPdM=) 🙄
Ok, now onto the good stuff.
I was born in Reading, Pennsylvania when my parents were just two teenagers starting out on their own. I love my parents, even if Gisele is their favorite.
We started out struggling. My dad was a union grocery worker at ShopRite, working night shifts. The union way of life helped keep our family together while he went to college. Dad ended up graduating, and got a good job as an underwriter.
After we moved, I grew up in suburban south central Pennsylvania. I graduated from Central York High School and went to college in Reading, just like my dad did.
When I left Pennsylvania for grad school, I *never* envisioned myself ending up in public service — not as Mayor of Braddock for 15 years, and certainly not as Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania.
But I came back to Pennsylvania because that's where my heart is. **And alongside my amazing wife, Gisele, I have dedicated my life to improving our Commonwealth.**
When Pennsylvania lawmakers pushed outdated, discriminatory policies banning marriage equality, I officiated one of the first gay marriages in Pennsylvania. 🌈
When Braddock was overlooked and counted out, we created jobs and got young people engaged. We created a community center, urban gardens, and a free store run by Gisele. ✊
And when the Pennsylvania GOP sent their flag police to take down my weed + pride flags, I put them back up. **I’m just gonna keep doing that.** ✅
[**If that’s the kind of never-give-up attitude you want to see in the U.S. Senate, can you split $10 between my campaign and Admiral Mike Franken today? To be successful, we’re gonna need to build huge campaigns across all 67 Counties in Pennsylvania and all 99 Counties in Iowa.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46100113/348824073/1314858986?refcode=em20220603pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTU1YWY3Yy05ZGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-NmpFkXmVrF6ynmb_NRwBMPGb0LhfeiAPxL8scAPdM=)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Who does that?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Last week made it more clear than ever that if we care about protecting
the lives of our fellow Texans, if we want every child in this state to be
healthy and happy, if we want to safeguard those who are closest to us
from violent crime and gun violence, then we must overcome and defeat Greg
Abbott.

After each mass shooting in Texas, he has promised solutions but provided
none. In fact, he’s made it easier for violent criminals to carry guns on
our streets and set the stage for more tragedies like Uvalde,
Midland-Odessa, El Paso, Santa Fe, and Sutherland Springs.

And if anyone still gave him the benefit of the doubt, he cleared that up
Tuesday night when he read the details of the school shooting to the press
like he was reading the weather forecast and then, instead of traveling
the 245 miles to Uvalde to be with grieving families, he chose to travel
300 miles in the opposite direction to a fundraiser. He was literally
counting dollars while first responders in Uvalde were counting bodies.

Who does that? Who responds to gun violence by making it easier to carry
guns in Texas without a background check? Who shows up to a press
conferences feigning concern for the victims only after stuffing his
pockets with campaign cash, and then proposes no solutions to help prevent
the next tragedy?

It’s the exact same guy who bans women from making their own health care
decisions in a state with one of the highest rates of maternal mortality
in the developed world, and sets a $10,000 bounty on the back of any Texan
who helps any woman seek an abortion.

It’s the same person who does nothing after being told repeatedly by a
Federal judge that his Child Protective Services is understaffed and
unaccountable, and that children emerge from the foster care system “more
damaged than when they entered.” Over 100 Texas kids have died in Abbott’s
child welfare system since 2020. Instead of fixing it, he’d rather try to
scare you about transgender kids and prosecute their loving parents.

It’s the same governor who couldn’t keep the lights on or the heat running
in the energy capital of the world, causing more than 700 Texans —
including children — to die because he cared more about his donors’
profits than about fixing the grid after being warned it could fail.

We must overcome his cruelty, incompetence, and corruption if we are going
to save lives and allow our children to live without the constant fear of
being murdered in their schools, supermarkets, and places of worship; or
be left to fend for themselves in a foster care system that has gone from
bad to worse on his watch.

We overcome that by beating Greg Abbott in November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220603-2.mJid2Q&refcode=ema20220603-192263&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=192263%2E444211%2EzZYC86 ]Help me by ensuring we have the resources to reach every Texas voter
and ensure they know the cost and consequence of keeping Abbott in office,
and our opportunity to choose a better future for ourselves and our kids.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220603-2.mJid2Q&refcode=ema20220603-192263&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=192263%2E444211%2EzZYC86 ]Contribute $3

Your help makes our victory possible.

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=192263%2E444211%2EzZYC86

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Attorney=20General=20Dave=20Yost?=
subject: We're winning the fight against Big Tech, Friend.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION
body:
Help us defend free speech and fair elections. | | |
---
| _Censoring conservatives.

Stamping out competitors.

Discriminating against consumers._

**Friend - Big Tech is out of control.**

That's why Republican Attorneys General have been standing up to Big Tech abuse and working to hold search engines and social media giants accountable - and last month, _**we delivered a major victory for free speech. **_
---
| [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=d26942b86f&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| An [Ohio Court has ruled](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=84f3420f63&e=edf8a4d16d) that our case to hold Google accountable for its discrimination against competitions and silencing of conservatives can move forward.

_This groundbreaking ruling could reign in Big Tech censorship and level the online playing field in a game rigged in favor of liberal politicians._

**Republican Attorneys General are fighting and winning against Big Tech** , but we need your immediate support to build on this momentum and defeat far-left, pro-censorship Democrats in this November's elections.

[Friend, can you pitch in $5 or $10 today to help combat Big Tech abuse?](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=7e1099a4dc&e=edf8a4d16d)

---
| [PITCH IN $5](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=ff5dc7b23b&e=edf8a4d16d "PITCH IN $5")
---
| [PITCH IN $10](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=a8e477384f&e=edf8a4d16d "PITCH IN $10")
---
| For too long, Big Tech has abused their power to stifle dissent. Republican Attorneys General are the last line of defense in Big Tech's war on free speech in America - and any donation will help us send more conservative fighters to the frontlines for freedom.

[_Click here to rush a donation of any amount._](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=d7c52af63c&e=edf8a4d16d)

---
| [RUSH A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=53f899c4e0&e=edf8a4d16d "RUSH A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT")
---
| | Thank you Patriot,

Dave Yost
Ohio Attorney General
---
| |

We're reaching out to you as a top **Democrat in your state** to hear YOUR thoughts on how we should protect voting rights heading into one of the biggest elections of our lifetime in November. **You 've been hand-selected for our Voting Rights Survey - and we need your input ASAP!** [**PLEASE, take our 90-second survey before it closes to help Democrats SAVE Voting Rights »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Survey/?source=VPP_20220603_EMSURV_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=2954%2E878179%2Ec4xT-W) | [TAKE 90-SECONDS TO COMPLETE YOUR SURVEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Survey/?source=VPP_20220603_EMSURV_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=2954%2E878179%2Ec4xT-W)

---

This is the most consequential year in the history of our democracy - **_if the GOP wins and erases our voting rights, it 'll be the end of democracy as we know it._**

So we're inviting our most trusted supporters (especially YOU!) to take part in our [**Voting Rights Survey**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Survey/?source=VPP_20220603_EMSURV_E3_T0_AC&t=11&akid=2954%2E878179%2Ec4xT-W) to help us form a winning midterm strategy.

_We won 't have a cutting edge strategy for Midterm Elections without insight from our most informed, and smartest supporters in your state._

[**So, please, we need a cutting edge strategy to stop the Republican scheme to take over the House and the Senate. Complete your Voting Rights Survey now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Survey/?source=VPP_20220603_EMSURV_E3_T0_AC&t=12&akid=2954%2E878179%2Ec4xT-W)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

| Team, I’ll be honest with you. I never thought this is how it’d go.

When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out.

I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family, and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get.

I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me.

And I never thought that I’d need to ask supporters to do more than that to defend this seat.

But I need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, the former president says beating me is the first step to “taking back America,” and we’ve missed a few fundraising goals in a row already this year.

So, please. You may not have woken up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my re-election, but I really need you if we’re going to hold this seat.

clean_body: | | | I’ll be honest, I never thought this is how it’d go. | | | Team, I’ll be honest with you. I never thought this is how it’d go. When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out. I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family, and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get. I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me. And I never thought that I’d need to ask supporters to do more than that to defend this seat. But I need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, the former president says beating me is the first step to “taking back America,” and we’ve missed a few fundraising goals in a row already this year. So, please. You may not have woken up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my re-election, but I really need you if we’re going to hold this seat. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you in advance for chipping in. It all adds up when we all do our part. Mark Kelly Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Arizona Democrats, please .

body:
Campaign Update | | | [](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=629aae454fa0700c781cd51e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.clarkbossert.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62996e19713be80b8831cccb%26ss_email_id%3D629aae454fa0700c781cd51e%26ss_campaign_name%3DCampaign%2BUpdate%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-04T00%253A59%253A06Z&w=60e4d983ac75935fc0b72056&l=en-US&s=5LHk-hDa12MicbHc08WVMiB732M%3D)
---
| |
---
## HELLO THERE!
---
|
---
### I am sure you have gotten your mail-in-ballot by now, and Early Voting is well underway. Election Day is just 11 days away!
---
#### We would like to sincerely **thank you** for all of your support over the last 9 months. This campaign has been an extraordinary adventure, and we have loved every minute of it! **We are truly overwhelmed with gratitude** for all that you have done to help us get this far, and I believe that we are well positioned for an exciting victory on June 14th.
---
|
---
---
| | [](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=629aae454fa0700c781cd51e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fclarkbossert.com%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62996e19713be80b8831cccb%26ss_email_id%3D629aae454fa0700c781cd51e%26ss_campaign_name%3DCampaign%2BUpdate%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-04T00%253A59%253A06Z&w=60e4d983ac75935fc0b72056&l=en-US&s=0Hjzgvu7mw89g-AhBdn9KXgfZUU%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
## _**Until June 14th...**_
---
|
---
#### Here is how you can help with the campaign:
1. #### Request a stack of flyers that you would be willing to distribute to your friends, family, neighbors, and coworkers.
2. #### Spread the word on social media by sending this video: https://youtu.be/BKOMzUcMHT0
3. #### Consider partnering with us to fund our final efforts to get the message out.
4. #### Vote June 14th!

---
|
---
#### _**Thank You!**_
#### -Clark Bossert for Congress team

subject: National Gun Violence Awareness Day
disclaimer_text: paid for by the NRA
body:
Every minute Washington fails to prevent gun violence in this country, we all watch in horror as the tragedies pile up, the body counts rise, and communities get torn apart. Every minute Washington fails to prevent gun violence in this country, we all watch in horror as the tragedies pile up, the body counts rise, and communities get torn apart.

Communities like Uvalde, Tulsa, Buffalo, Oak Creek, Milwaukee, Brookfield, and just yesterday, Racine. Every day, this is a crisis, and it demands our urgency.

But too many politicians don’t have the guts to stand up to the gun lobby and pass commonsense gun safety legislation. We’re talking about politicians like Ron Johnson — who has taken $1,269,486 from the NRA and refused to protect our communities from gun violence.

**If we want to change our gun laws, we have to change our leaders. That’s why Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate.**

Wisconsinites deserve better than a senator who is bought and paid for by the NRA. We need someone who’s going to fight for comprehensive background checks, red flag laws, a ban on high-capacity magazines, and more. That’s what Sarah will do in the U.S. Senate.

As a mom, Sarah knows the fear that takes over when parents drop their kids off at school and worry about their safety. She also knows that we can’t afford to just sit by and let Washington do nothing, tragedy after tragedy. It’s time to do _something_.

None of this is inevitable. We can’t accept gun violence as a normal part of our lives. That’s why, this National Gun Violence Awareness Day, we’re asking you to join Sarah in the fight to end this epidemic once and for all.

| | Hello Friend,

I hope you can make it to my campaign rally tomorrow. As you know, with the recent redistricting, all of Elmont and Valley Stream have been added to the new 4th Congressional District. With all of my Legislative District now within lines, we are more charged up than ever to bring resources back to our communities. Check out the new map.

---
| |
---
| | I look forward to discussing the issues that are impacting our district and bring the community together, united stronger than ever.

This rally will take place tomorrow, Satruday June 4th at 2:00pm in my office located at
1630 Dutch Broadway in Elmont, NY 11003.

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: We need to take meaningful action to combat gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
It's long past time we took meaningful action to combat the gun violence epidemic facing our country. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095536/348796012/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2M0NTRmOC04MmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MvPgPjIeLIWV5_yXhe2XJ1iN3qWIVR0mi0Oqb2c-Yb0=&emci=1a798702-7ce3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=13c454f8-82e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
---
Hey Peter,

It's long past time we took meaningful action to combat the gun violence epidemic facing our country.

There have already been 230 mass shootings this year alone, and nearly 8,000 lives have been taken by acts of gun violence.

Thoughts and prayers will never be enough to combat gun violence. **Today on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, we wear orange to honor those we've lost to gun violence and recommit to the fight for common-sense gun safety reforms.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095537/348796013/-3362604?ms=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___ks_ettx&refcode=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___ks_ettx&source=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220603_gun1_adv_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=MU5wDLF+s7DKUv0jFUN0xFLuzl97fRxau+3dscJkIN7FN4GUzmE8KYFj2xDMhbsGM0LFLBDJVyywoL9CTjKorj7M7zXDS8oYdodOgGc61f3Uu4rSuFFxpIqmTHmdzprLeuDdHOq5UZDtCyrlhMDnMErJrEoxcs1W+ykYVesqPFo=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2M0NTRmOC04MmUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MvPgPjIeLIWV5_yXhe2XJ1iN3qWIVR0mi0Oqb2c-Yb0=&emci=1a798702-7ce3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=13c454f8-82e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
As a mom, a pediatrician, and a member of Congress, I know we need common-sense legislation that keeps our communities safe, including universal background checks for gun ownership, federal red flag laws to keep guns out of the hands of people perceived to be a danger to others, and policies to ensure that children cannot get access to firearms.

I was proud to help pass the Bipartisan Background Checks Act in the House to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks. This would have been a crucial step in our fight against gun violence, but Republicans in the Senate have blocked our progress.

This shouldn't be a partisan issue – it's common sense, Peter. Over 90% of Americans – including a majority of Republicans – support background checks on gun sales. It's time we take action to ensure no more lives are lost to gun violence.

clean_body: It's long past time we took meaningful action to combat the gun violence epidemic facing our country. Hey Peter, It's long past time we took meaningful action to combat the gun violence epidemic facing our country. There have already been 230 mass shootings this year alone, and nearly 8,000 lives have been taken by acts of gun violence. Thoughts and prayers will never be enough to combat gun violence. Today on National Gun Violence Awareness Day, we wear orange to honor those we've lost to gun violence and recommit to the fight for common-sense gun safety reforms. As a mom, a pediatrician, and a member of Congress, I know we need common-sense legislation that keeps our communities safe, including universal background checks for gun ownership, federal red flag laws to keep guns out of the hands of people perceived to be a danger to others, and policies to ensure that children cannot get access to firearms. I was proud to help pass the Bipartisan Background Checks Act in the House to close loopholes that allow firearms to be purchased without background checks. This would have been a crucial step in our fight against gun violence, but Republicans in the Senate have blocked our progress. This shouldn't be a partisan issue – it's common sense, Peter. Over 90% of Americans – including a majority of Republicans – support background checks on gun sales. It's time we take action to ensure no more lives are lost to gun violence. | Thank you, Kim Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, June 3rd for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, June 3rd, 2022**
Peter,
With less than 50 days until the primary election ends, our coalition is growing stronger by the day.
We are so excited that this past week we were endorsed by both **Progressive Maryland** and **The United Association of Union Plumbers** **and Pipefitters!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095598/348796219/-1854772753?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmUxZGM1OC04M2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoWziy0GIpitsN2Rls_R353SQhqUoVKjgAW5LQIE1_k=&emci=1381de4c-4be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22e1dc58-83e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095599/348796220/1956323367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmUxZGM1OC04M2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoWziy0GIpitsN2Rls_R353SQhqUoVKjgAW5LQIE1_k=&emci=1381de4c-4be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22e1dc58-83e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
The**#momenTOM** is real, and we are so proud of the fact that our coalition stretches across the state and reaches more than hundreds of thousands Maryland households. Together, we will expand jobs, justice, and opportunity for all Marylanders.
All the best,
Team Tom
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095600/348796221/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmUxZGM1OC04M2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoWziy0GIpitsN2Rls_R353SQhqUoVKjgAW5LQIE1_k=&emci=1381de4c-4be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22e1dc58-83e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Last Friday, Tom and his wife, Ann Marie, celebrated the 35th anniversary of Radio America with its great leader, and fellow Dominican, Alejandro Carrasco.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095601/348796222/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmUxZGM1OC04M2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoWziy0GIpitsN2Rls_R353SQhqUoVKjgAW5LQIE1_k=&emci=1381de4c-4be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22e1dc58-83e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
On Saturday, he joined Team Tom member, Delegate Julie Palokovich-Carr and enjoyed the Hometown Holidays Rockville Festival.
He then headed to gorgeous Prince George’s to celebrate the legacy of the great honorary mayor of Laker Arbor, David Chapman.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095602/348796223/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmUxZGM1OC04M2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoWziy0GIpitsN2Rls_R353SQhqUoVKjgAW5LQIE1_k=&emci=1381de4c-4be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22e1dc58-83e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Shannon kicked off her weekend with a bright Saturday morning at Waverly Farmers Market with her great friend Baltimore City Councilman Ryan Dorsey.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095603/348796224/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmUxZGM1OC04M2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoWziy0GIpitsN2Rls_R353SQhqUoVKjgAW5LQIE1_k=&emci=1381de4c-4be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22e1dc58-83e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
She had a great time joining Senator Cory McCray and volunteers walking the talking with neighbors and door knocking in East Baltimore.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095604/348796225/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmUxZGM1OC04M2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoWziy0GIpitsN2Rls_R353SQhqUoVKjgAW5LQIE1_k=&emci=1381de4c-4be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22e1dc58-83e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Later, she caught up with another former colleague, Councilman Kris Burnett, in West Baltimore for a festival in Leakin Park.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46095605/348796226/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmUxZGM1OC04M2UzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoWziy0GIpitsN2Rls_R353SQhqUoVKjgAW5LQIE1_k=&emci=1381de4c-4be3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=22e1dc58-83e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
On Sunday, Tom enjoyed an inspiring and energizing service with the Iglesia de Dios Hispana community in Baltimore County.
