clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, June 3rd, 2022 Peter, With less than 50 days until the primary election ends, our coalition is growing stronger by the day. We are so excited that this past week we were endorsed by both Progressive Maryland and The United Association of Union Plumbers and Pipefitters! The#momenTOM is real, and we are so proud of the fact that our coalition stretches across the state and reaches more than hundreds of thousands Maryland households. Together, we will expand jobs, justice, and opportunity for all Marylanders. All the best, Team Tom On the Campaign Trail Last Friday, Tom and his wife, Ann Marie, celebrated the 35th anniversary of Radio America with its great leader, and fellow Dominican, Alejandro Carrasco. On Saturday, he joined Team Tom member, Delegate Julie Palokovich-Carr and enjoyed the Hometown Holidays Rockville Festival. He then headed to gorgeous Prince George’s to celebrate the legacy of the great honorary mayor of Laker Arbor, David Chapman. Shannon kicked off her weekend with a bright Saturday morning at Waverly Farmers Market with her great friend Baltimore City Councilman Ryan Dorsey. She had a great time joining Senator Cory McCray and volunteers walking the talking with neighbors and door knocking in East Baltimore. Later, she caught up with another former colleague, Councilman Kris Burnett, in West Baltimore for a festival in Leakin Park. On Sunday, Tom enjoyed an inspiring and energizing service with the Iglesia de Dios Hispana community in Baltimore County. Meanwhile, Shannon attended a service led by our great friend and her former constituent Bishop Shawn Bell at the Greater Paradise Christian Center in East Baltimore. Delegate Luke Clipppinger is a dedicated and tireless advocate for Baltimore City. We are so grateful to have him on our team. On Sunday, Tom joined Delegate Clippinger for his annual “Great Big Walk” where he literally walks every corner of the 46th legislative district. They even had the opportunity to stop to visit Baltimore native and Team Tom member Nancy Pelosi’s old neighborhood in Little Italy. On Monday, Tom and Shannon joined Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass for the annual Rockville Memorial Day Parade. #TeamPerezSneed showed out in force Tuesday to show their support for Tom at the Burgers and Brews forum hosted by the Maryland Democratic Party in Baltimore County. Tom had a great time catching up with friends and sharing his vision for the future of healthcare in our state. As Governor, Tom will ensure that 100% of Marylanders have access to quality healthcare —no matter their zip code. Senator Joanne Benson is a true servant leader for the 24th legislative district and across Prince George's County. Shannon was honored to join community members to support her in her reelection. Endorsements In the News “Perez has enjoyed a good week of endorsements, receiving the nod from the AFL-CIO and in recent days. Progressive Maryland is affiliated with several unions, some of whom have already endorsed Perez.” “We...need to understand that we have a lot of leverage as a state. We have state-owned properties. We should be looking at every parcel of state-owned property to see how we can convert it for use as affordable housing,’ Perez said.” “Folks are not only feeling the pain at the pump, but in the grocery line, and around the kitchen table,” said Perez. “Rather than subsidizing Big Oil through another tax holiday, I would urge leaders in Annapolis to explore opportunities to provide targeted relief to Marylanders who are struggling the most — including mass transit users.” “The race for governor is open as Republican Larry Hogan is term-limited. Seeking to succeed him in the deeply Democratic state are 10 Democratic candidates, including two former members of the Obama Cabinet: Labor Secretary Tom Perez and Education Secretary John King.” Schedule of Events Recurring Event Multiple Locations Recurring Event Multiple Locations Saturday, June 4 | 4:00 PM Upper Marlboro, MD Hosted by Victor & Aronda Agnew, Shavery Garrison, Walter & Francis Lewis, Leelannee Malin, Brittany Wiley Sunday, June 5 | 1:00 PM Baltimore, MD Hosted by Sue & Leo Fothergill featuring Senator Jill Carter Sunday, June 5 | 4:00 PM North Potomac, MD Hosted by Lisa and Geoffrey Fuller Wednesday, June 8 | 6:00 PM Cat’s Eye Pub | Baltimore, MD Saturday, June 11 | 1:00 PM Casa de maryland | 8151 15th Ave, Adelphi, MD 20783 Saturday, June 11 | 5:00 PM Sykesville, MD Hosted by the United Maryland Muslim Council Sunday, June 12 | 2:00 PM 6420 Orchard Ave, Takoma Park, MD 20912 Wednesday, June 15 | 6:00 PM Rockville, MD Hosted by Barbara and Donald Noveau, Senator Ben Kramer, Delegate Vaughn Stewart, Delegate Bonnie Culllison, and Eden Durbin Saturday, June 25 | 1:00 PM North Charles Street & East 33rd Street, Baltimore, MD 21218 Thursday, June 30 | 7:00 PM Annapolis, MD Monday, July 4 | 9:30 AM Takoma Park, MD Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer._ Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

June 3rd, 2022
**Congressman Bob Good Endorses Yesli Vega for Congress**

PRINCE WILLIAM COUNTY, VA– Yesli Vega, Republican candidate for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, has announced the endorsement of Congressman Bob Good from the neighboring 5th Congressional District.

**“I am proud to endorse fellow courageous conservative Yesli Vega in her race for the 7th District Republican nomination. Yesli is a true fighter whom I want serving beside me in Congress, fighting against the establishment and for our true conservative principles. She will put America first, and uphold the Constitution. Please join me in sending Yesli Vega to Washington!”** – Congressman Bob Good, Virginia's 5th Congressional District.

**"In his short time in office, Congressman Good has shook up Washington and held government accountable to we, the people. He's a man of strong faith and conviction and I look forward to fighting alongside him in the trenches. I'm extremely humbled and thankful for his endorsement,"** said Vega in response.

Congressman Good joins a growing list of state and national conservatives supporting the Vega Campaign, including former 7th District Congressman, Dave Brat, former Attorney General, Ken Cuccinelli (Campaign Chairman), Senator Ted Cruz, Corey Stewart, Ginni Thomas, Congressman Louie Gohmert, Delegate John McGuire, David Bossie, and many others. Vega, a law enforcement officer and elected supervisor in Prince William County, chaired the "Latinos for Youngkin" coalition in 2021 and was an appointee of President Donald J. Trump to the President's Hispanic Prosperity Initiative.

clean_body: ALERT! | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE June 3rd, 2022 Congressman Bob Good Endorses Yesli Vega for Congress PRINCE WILLIAM COUNTY, VA– Yesli Vega, Republican candidate for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, has announced the endorsement of Congressman Bob Good from the neighboring 5th Congressional District. “I am proud to endorse fellow courageous conservative Yesli Vega in her race for the 7th District Republican nomination. Yesli is a true fighter whom I want serving beside me in Congress, fighting against the establishment and for our true conservative principles. She will put America first, and uphold the Constitution. Please join me in sending Yesli Vega to Washington!” – Congressman Bob Good, Virginia's 5th Congressional District. "In his short time in office, Congressman Good has shook up Washington and held government accountable to we, the people. He's a man of strong faith and conviction and I look forward to fighting alongside him in the trenches. I'm extremely humbled and thankful for his endorsement," said Vega in response. Congressman Good joins a growing list of state and national conservatives supporting the Vega Campaign, including former 7th District Congressman, Dave Brat, former Attorney General, Ken Cuccinelli (Campaign Chairman), Senator Ted Cruz, Corey Stewart, Ginni Thomas, Congressman Louie Gohmert, Delegate John McGuire, David Bossie, and many others. Vega, a law enforcement officer and elected supervisor in Prince William County, chaired the "Latinos for Youngkin" coalition in 2021 and was an appointee of President Donald J. Trump to the President's Hispanic Prosperity Initiative. | | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. Support Yesli Vega for Congress by Voting YESLI on Tuesday, June 21st. * | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

name: Jordan Moskowitz - Political Director
subject: 30,000 signatures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Ron Johnson just broke a record

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=1)
---
Friend -- The momentum is clearly on our side. This week, Senator Ron Johnson [**submitted**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0do7dZbICJaYMWc_A_joBCO7fAsfqiKgeJmZ8Ci2AP9N8nvmqAJXGMmN5K1YzYZe83Tuq5Pflpt14enOUim8Pmq2c3mbT97Kon0yJhbMMXK0Tx3pWW5KybH50RwnDP5EXfHtBC7_eHFtBK8Ocqd8KbU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=2) a **record-breaking 30,000 nomination signatures** – over **DOUBLE** the previous record set by Tammy Baldwin**.** These nomination signatures came from supporters like YOU in all 72 counties. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TniGTJRrb5Q4HW8Eq_SWRj8vceWdb08zfoQ7fUlyoMimeN392WcfTDniz8PXh2QzucJ-HyFl2SoIByPPpQYRDt405nNu6cLALS47noRXX3jB&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=3)
**Senator Ron Johnson even doubled the number of nomination signatures submitted from his leading Democrats opponents COMBINED.** This accomplishment shows the strength of Senator Johnson’s grassroots support and our team’s capability to reach Wisconsinites in all corners of the state – but that doesn’t mean the fight ahead will be easy. New York, California, and Illinois liberals are pouring millions into our state to push misleading attacks against Senator Johnson because they know that the road to a Republican Senate majority runs through Wisconsin. The energy in 2022 is on our side, and this milestone showed that with hard work and grassroots support, we can defeat the corrupt, radical Democrats this November and re-elect Senator Ron Johnson. If you have not already signed up to volunteer, you can do so [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=4) , or if you are unable to donate your time, you can split a donation between the WisGOP and Senator Johnson’s campaign [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjw7UJi8rQ0_gVWo90iTxyG5s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=5). **Friend, we can’t win this Fight for Freedom without you.** Thank you again for your support. Forward, Jordan Moskowitz
Political Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjw7UJi8rQ0_gVWo90iTxyG5s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=6 "SPLIT A DONATION") [SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjw7UJi8rQ0_gVWo90iTxyG5s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=6)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=7) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=8) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=9) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nom_sigs_soft_ask_v1&n=10)

Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is still at war with the USPS as he works to slow down delivery even more and raise prices.
That’s why Democrats passed the Postal Service Reform Act into law, allowing the USPS to seek new revenue sources like check cashing, postal banking, selling transit passes, and new delivery services.
But instead of finding new ways to fund and save our Postal Service, Louis DeJoy just wants to keep cutting.
Democrat Derek Marshall is running for Congress against a Trump Republican to save the USPS. Will you stand with his campaign today? [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-usps-board-demand-dejoy-stop-slowing-down-mail-and-raising-prices-require-dejoy-expand-products-and-services-to-bring-in-new-revenue-instead-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220603_01%26noskip%3Dtrue]
Tell Louis DeJoy and the USPS Board: stop slowing down mail and raising prices. Expand products and save the USPS!
Across California’s 23rd District, every voter has received a ballot in the mail ahead of the June 7 primary.
Our democracy depends on the Postal Service. And it’s a lifeline, especially for rural communities.
We need to strengthen and improve the USPS, not dismantle and privatize it. That’s why we need Louis DeJoy and the USPS board to stop the cuts.
Tell Louis DeJoy and the USPS Board: stop slowing down mail and raising prices. Expand products and save the USPS! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-usps-board-demand-dejoy-stop-slowing-down-mail-and-raising-prices-require-dejoy-expand-products-and-services-to-bring-in-new-revenue-instead-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220603_01%26noskip%3Dtrue]

Fellow American,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Fellow American, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. clean_body: “Georgia Democrats signal brutal ad campaign against Herschel Walker as high stakes Senate race begins” | Fellow American, Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia. Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination. That very night, Democrats officially began their barrage of attacks against me. We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues. This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track. Fellow American, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - total spending will likely exceed $200 million. As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden. Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - I know what it's like to be in the big leagues. Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me. If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: To Our Esteemed Supporters
disclaimer_text: paid for by out of state, out of touch billionaires
body:
| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_3&n=2) Dear Peter -- Thank you for your patience with our newsletter! I’m Grayson, the newest member of the Rabine Team, and you’ll be hearing more from me in our upcoming updates. As we approach Election Day, many Illinoisans are asking an important question: who should I support for governor? This was a question I had asked myself, and I am excited to finally have an answer: Gary Rabine! The reasons to support Gary Rabine for Governor are the same that prompted me to join his campaign. First, Gary is a self-made man who started out paving driveways in rural McHenry. He now employs thousands in our state, and nationwide, under the Rabine Group. Gary is one of the greatest creators of well-paid jobs in Illinois, and his practical business experience makes him uniquely qualified to restore our failing state economy. Second, Gary will fight for our freedom. This is not just a promise, but a fact: he stood up to the Biden Administration’s unconstitutional employer vaccine mandate as lead plaintiff, battling it all the way up to the Supreme Court – and winning! Lastly, but most certainly not least, Gary is a true outsider, the only Republican candidate that isn’t bought and paid for by out of state, out of touch billionaires. We can’t trust career politicians like Richard Irvin and Darren Bailey to keep their campaign promises when they’re dancing to the tune of their powerful backers instead of listening to the people. Gary Rabine is leading a true grassroots movement for the future of our state, and he can’t be bought! So as Election Day approaches and you hear that question, who should I support for governor, answer proudly: Gary Rabine! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRawhzMJQQYcXW1FLSmoBTlV&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_3&n=3 "WATCH A CLIP FROM LAST NIGHT'S DEBATE") [WATCH A CLIP FROM LAST NIGHT'S DEBATE](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRawhzMJQQYcXW1FLSmoBTlV&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_3&n=3)
---

**Will you join our Growing Movement to Defeat JB Pritzker?******
Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around!
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_3&n=4 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_3&n=4)
---

### Volunteer With Us! (6/4)
CONTACT ISABELLA NICOLI FOR MORE INFO Isabella@rabineforgovernor.com
_Harvard Milk Days Parade:_
* Entry #33
* Assembly 1103 N. Jefferson Street, Harvard; entries report at the back of the high school. Tent set up for sign-in. Be there at 11:00 (behind high school on Garfield Street) Pick-up should be there at 11:00. Walkers around noon.
* Step-off at 1:00
* Walkers can park at in high school lot.
* Candy bags must be handed to spectators. T-shirts may be tossed.
* Attire: Rabine gear

_Literature Drop:_
* After parade (around 2:30 PM)**__**
* Walk lists will be assigned using the Voter Gravity accounts, using this link on mobile phones:**__**

MOBILE: [https://voter.mobi/](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=29MjwkkH4vVkE_csWVMXQGTbbBHgPIoxap3oX08dxIk&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_3&n=5)
---
_McHenry Township GOP Candidate Forum:_
* Richardson Farm: 909 English Prairie Rd, Spring Grove, IL** __**

* Gary will be speaking in the Forum form 6PM-8PM** __**
* Grounds are open 9AM-8PM, but we will all look to attend after walking in the Harvard Parade** __**
* Please wear Rabine gear! We will have some at our table.

### Gubernatorial Candidate Forum (6/4)
TIME
5:30pm \- 9:00pm
LOCATION
Richardson's Farm
909 English Prairie Road
Spring Grove, Illinois United States

Recent polls show Trump’s handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker, **_statistically TIED_** with Senator Raphael Warnock in what NBC calls **“2022's most important swing state” **\-- and now Republican megadonors are pouring _millions_ into Georgia!

**Losing even ONE Democratic seat would flip the Senate back into Mitch McConnell’s control,** which is why **we've set an emergency $25,000 fundraising goal to counter the GOP’s megadonors.**

| | The[ baby formula shortage](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikB1w1KDXsy-VqAAL5Raj3M0qCecBGLaS0rBOb93_dhy_39KmVFI-FMOe90A_tvp0-ACNZjD_o5MWlGIZwgSsmJMmc38WPT_GxyCRVemsPWH1DOARF1L_iKmlPZcyXck1BT09pBPU_G0Rc0uW7hPvV15ViLzrP7T97jVQW_laAD93wtUXtDbVh_rnS55AKmbLX1LJJ0VDxhhrFlUix5fuNM7I0rDot9yWDi_E98tMHZYDfFMjujK1ogN4Y6Yj51gIFoySgzDwGsh5iiaHBSQG16T21IvKhjzisCWQkK7RToBoFAxXhhm1JVmKMDBrmyfmpg%3D%3D) brought to you by the Food and Drug Administration and big government has devastated families nationwide, and Tennessee is one of the [hardest-hit states](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikJlMxRNUBFtP3nmGBpbwOefj7nVRYWz-6Jjx21JJ2wo02ofWBLGsJFR05qNj1DH8UWwKjSLQPy_0ttCsckXs_o9yxMCZjlCFcX-xqF8yv8DOLiruLaQbBOLYEQI7zI6-eEsp01kp2ykKc7NYEoB72i6RsTXwHd6qENvdeIEzE55MNR9Sn1I81qBreMCbW05T0VzGJI_WsxYd8cuXpLYtWWdBqB9mIwGt9fTzIKMeblc3KY_dwkXMfyw1cwRLS3w2R_nG6HqTtgplyIDmOnp4jUVVctcwTQ3b2ZbxfmFumZraK4kTrrUD1INvYZQv6ahzlA26xRBgYBsSqhHY3Y9YHBY%3D). As a father and your congressman, this makes me red as a hornet. This crisis was avoidable. Nine months ago, the FDA was [warned](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikLWK3BDsnzn5mOjXqHEx_ZcdPuzxtCJi0_H2mVy_3YtzOzAwo0j4YFoCzDerTtCY9_8uZBUDQGdjt-weMt3ckeHVthFityuzdzme0niQDix684tjmPRsQydm5nlBqirE4T561uxlHYCsqKgDof26zWVeUYoHBDIZ_CpwU5jUySTpcqZHjc-GFFsxtvRB79cC-QtOW9Prb3T6_ICl-4me_XtUHKWPNRDsDrOgrYOqlX53KDXuzxhDK4gxDwJd_Ok2746sOY0erjm62a1-4lgk0QLtbI8LmyUPXlyujUpxHArrAopB5FH4K0XgToYKJh3aRgLkvqzyER2zm7pfIFGbH3o%3D) about problems with one formula factory. What was its solution? To stay the course of the bureaucratic status quo and address it [months too late.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikDN18pw54m-TYMyFMJGN6lLsLFvaaFi-0zOwfpn7rPKlcXQhLxfYFwoubPmxWyFc90o0QqTbG-vWsEFHy5MxKxJ0zbeIi3VvDuy5K1bDwHi1UnW8sWjjJmdE714CJ46JNwqwtgluJZvZANNqxIacxL5VdNkCR28SSNnRBxmYYjOz07LLOaT2DBINv0gL7ibGTgHYmutpuBBIdjPing_C2fv0u4_I5RxpTQkpewy38sH2aoIMAP52Bj-8lf44t-ArgB3kdsicfned5GcJmWefktnTxRCgN-fuaBebKlkz00I5a1DGgtKAZ74WvIC3sOQYLv_W2j_N2mJdl9Sd-W--IBE%3D) Only after public outcry did the FDA loosen its [onerous regulations](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikC-mjT8-wfAZ8aqihGWNxsEGXnVag1LDg531F8rl05QexHY-fvmBvpwI2-iNoiTqzWUtNvqvDe5QmvJYej5506vNpHCvO6FPiX09UZf98tm7rljUvEdq7iwZSzo2gY-9maaMHIq9yH9JMgXmi0aMqirPbKJLs2lq7lK9-j8Lt4G_RVxvcCht564r1kQlylXRGk49o6W-Tvve4rVjmrvpUDKaR7wD3Knj1j_PXZ-6SqtF_SRwwOjIyyHjk84zw-4UU6laCzxqDKs8dAs-I6aFvePTBOx-GtK9-5IuEBfqZx4W8qqkX5C1nG776wfZzT4Oz8RMM9qhPR2pAzaQ6AAkLYByhCihTTtaRcsr0qYWZcDp944yt9TJ66r9gmoqQtyt4qZQg_5_5j0DOq9Z4M9hpKzFZDokOSyO6hK96e2sTItAPETAuBEp2wRoPo0Cj-6RByCt-B1oDNhiClwF335BYGU%3D) to give Americans more options for buying formula in May. Mind you, many of these regulations weren’t about public safety but monopolistic control. It’s flat-out despicable we are unable to feed our babies at home properly, but the Biden administration can find another whopping [$700 million](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikNtQK5rTdY14YxHWWeZpSZmq3Ux8ZISRsQ24wlQF2rgvSdW_zqEO9hJZoU_wrIGy4AJ6d8jyZyVsglaa_7YW5Uvs_lBvaJ7lr5qJBrJGz0Yl0BsO643XZpSEYo4yTD_vGrwRCvS8PoC8RCwacbGuH8qm4GTsxEDlzol5MDzBzsafgOl7sxFpvUIvBPVvlc5LUIcUuV6jZ9YsAXYLRThlGt3Eu0lM3N6TO5JhYFukF3RydppX04gj4fMhHrpN5KeywECXLcXCZeqIpcWDy8R8_rD9xdKkbgvlMLL2Iq1egJO-) to send to Ukraine. Big-government bureaucrats need to get their heads out of the sand. This is why I sent [letters](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikCmYC_CSOb1h64VldtD2OwmKC5HdWmL7Wy2YvxMFLqGcQXn1bEiUZBHJa_FkyMqxUuEpkZWeFEaA-mLdvIRi2AGe3zJHpJYAruZekdhq_MKuHr8XwpRtYw0o5qtGTz7Q0Eg10SYkPrdszJJPi7LUNuq4HokzL-HwST1naLk6KsGnMc3K7i7-kQk2kkD4YAV6Q3k9lqD4VWarUILVeannsj-If3EgoSsv9d6-bnNB4xnI27KzDwZvC_JZrB-0Z9LgGFZJ6qYfDiXHGZo45uWmjG_oYAPGnx5fdafY3onFWwIpEDAbX_Ui-RbrrJNBBaSVc5fvOzus8AcVC-vq5mksQw_pek2JYTrHOmWtzAweBqHk3hrhvMe5OileLernPSrQag%3D%3D) to the Tennessee and U.S. Attorneys General to demand they investigate any potential price gouging related to baby formula. I also voted for the bipartisan [Access to Baby Formula Act](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikIfwS7bIaxKtH6yYhfw4X7zw718yPQ-0c5Wa23FQ6liuZNfNcB_y_0yp5_yWpknJXi4B0IIUOs8YEaLuiBqRTwz--vtpw6ypwSP6cvvYY0-GO6GhcDJ5JzYW-T3WlQsH7pZCZKkzUawThioARQgOWpjvow8hKp61tpQLZEaG3YPXbGjsB6PW-pZr8hyU0v28jMx9_7Wh-UyoyGFAxzhMwYVXz8BNqiaXAEzn_r0R8I9iwcPXTaA5BApVbvSFYGYGpQ37DfBcBmJoHpgTChT6d44CmdSVQwjXc4m3fwTBlWpO6i9Z40BWGylLbXW3cuUmhiYts6jdGrJpVJI2R9NOfOM%3D) to give the USDA flexibility to address emergencies and [joined Leland Vittert](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikJXwbM1a_6Aolk0t2xTGA26tJKYHqTZhT7v-qgvJw5nlqzvQT2UHTykRKCXsrHVCQuU46VU3AB1JXz6q_S2hvzxvbWGId2NCPuyEPQSpu7ziXE-vTlZbbQxSxpAv83eUE624DLsMQekqo74LJOlI_E6R9D7dwuBgoMB0AAx_CkMdjTQZR6Sx6bf0-gH-WpSkh3_9KpWqRN6AeabUGa5HM3ZNw0qdTO2JLDt8PnNOyqy_AG5AD-OP-Z-NiptubHm4ow%3D%3D) on News Nation’s "On Balance" to discuss the [wasteful](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikI2E8JwML6MAYrvuls6f9LibNUeEua6iym4ZprHd4SaNuSMxTAvAhoAI7HclJPA2Am2LpdF-ItkHTwh1TvklUrR0tHc8CtYGSNiwxUQEDSfoC8QQegYhUqn3kTmTlKVhpQ9omv-TSPY2Aj8u5PGd7wyscwYAWTX_el9AxPqZzW7RobcbDlX8ZufPG1zLxUKu6VWlJfWyNvF93lRzo37ORVg-zRngEELtksYN3IBUb5qQhFOfutxjzDjoWkstdoGM8AKk3DuJndCr-63E82DdM0-WyCzEQuOzVuVidpq8SspU) Infant Formula Supplemental Appropriations Act Speaker Pelosi brought to the floor.
So while Democrats continue to push senseless bills that will only exacerbate the problem, know that [commonsense Republicans](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikGy4lFPGGNhQqDeuEa0yxElNLAMXRLn3xYRsJfCgG6nDRnGbVB690Cp28RFJpDRihVL5B8K_3KfoCdbXZ6puG95phJdauLbcfufUJKiUJA96X59vNyjmP7G6de7vGnYN0d30Q8pu01WFkRtrtm5kUgM39byGRDQhxolAgDjdVfxU9pzebnBf5MhvTKFqVmP86hJ8UwXrR_YvHs9R7tXLcL22AI-zlx18qwxPv6fgS9GWqd8_jhro8jsE6R-_3dx6wkxr82EqqZv4tuGl0nLpnrh1LX4EpxmgmNAb0M6AfarodWRUZ6Zr3NH7vhfqv6ghJuux9gezsRb_Is_1wZji6pTBM0TPqwlx2GgEhbRFq_Ai) are working hard to help fix this tragedy.

| | **Remembering General Carl Stiner 💪
**
---
| |
---
This week LaFollette native and military General Carl Stiner died at age 85. During this superb leader’s [service](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9b321b41b1b940178fd38f08d9080ffe&_e=R7bp_3qRvKlZj5_t6A1ikJlMxRNUBFtP3nmGBpbwOedN-Ag03VLcu8HyE_wECQTHrdAUkjY6TJc6xDiiM6aZ0R_GuiQls452iHab6xHZD0Fm5KvXWdeTnRKujFIPEgPhvuUoL0Pv8qif9saplRKVpXWQuqQLd2jyMjG98mqO4CccwbAvOGSKInWetdA5QCcg20JelG8u52tcuPIBPzqikrgCLkjwtKxEwCqyxXz8Pju0TvqrdW-s0adLZHLUguoPQSB0Is56ZNvTLmiw7X2_0vKQ2ItxJNm6KtgpZwJJqHL-5EIm6xwTtVKT2ORhKlYZimx3tGP7P9o6lf6lLVgui_KPAgbfJRENYQ9xEU4hOl4%3D), General Stiner was involved in the capture of terrorists in the Achille Lauro hijacking and helped with all special operations activities during Operation Desert Storm. It was an honor to be able to shake hands with this man and thank him for his dedication to our nation and love for our community. God bless General Carl Stiner. Hero just doesn’t quite cover it.

name: Team Ryan
subject: Ohioans will decide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ][IMG]

Extremism is on the ballot right here in Ohio, folks.

The GOP has rallied behind its most extreme, far-right candidate in JD
Vance—an anti-abortion, anti-democracy millionaire endorsed by Donald
Trump who ditched Ohio to buddy up to Silicon Valley billionaires in hopes
of kickstarting his political career.

Ohioans have the chance to reject the extremism that has pulled us apart
and stopped us from passing much-needed legislation—but we need your help.
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Will you chip in to help Tim defeat right-wing extremist JD Vance and
expand our Democratic Senate majority?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1017&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1018&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1019&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1020&amount=30&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Other Amount

Key issues like the future of abortion access, voting rights legislation
and abolishing the filibuster will depend on who controls the Senate in
2022 and beyond.

And Ohioans will be the ones to make that choice.

But “Senator JD Vance” would be a nightmare for Ohio and the country. He
wants to ban abortion care, even in the case of rape or incest, and wants
to make it harder for people to vote.

Those aren’t the views of someone who best represents the hardworking
people of Ohio. Those are the views of
an extremist in the pocket of dark-money GOP megadonors intent on pushing
through their far-right agenda.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1021&amount=25&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]So, will you reject extremism and defeat JD Vance by chipping in to
support Tim’s campaign? Winning this race is our BEST chance at expanding
our Democratic Senate majority.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1008&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14028?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4017%2E3611125%2EGQhCno ]Donate $50

Thanks,

Team Ryan

name: Our Revolution
subject: join our special LIVE call to Bust Big Tech on Monday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis -

Big Tech titans like Amazon think they own our government and our economy — paying lobbyists to make sure they can invade our privacy, escape liability, and build monopolies.

That’s why Our Revolution and our partners are fighting back by organizing to push transformative legislation to challenge their unlimited power.

Learn more on Monday’s official Bust Big Tech call! We’ll discuss key bills in Congress that can reduce this monopolistic behavior and we will give you the tools to take action with us

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

As we close in on our final fundraising deadline of this primary campaign ([which you can support by clicking here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzKJRBFYnnGuurjHNF501U9NIW8wL-3T4jNirG9BHycMwmn0TJJ-9sgrI_494brWrk1xFvB81MJv74lwhGcKzhhIq0yJ-QSAWPjjvXYLwtKH9MqOcg_zJOb3SK-qn7JMUKUkd5q6bc45fZq0RDLewbpkKDN3K3DyP7VqvcifSBFk6p-B8x3QpBaqqJDmdCAxLTiDaSOyjucfJlvbpCoMD6Yk_VUzaQUu-YfY4Q8dJZhvpSPnvly5EExQgXZR9tCOCRI93MmUCRrA0xtP6e_2qihibHEhm2vl__wrfg8JHL34OZTxcVCnAVTr3H7s1zPfU/3ml/PnfwYNrsRJWa7UaZKAm89g/h1/T83mqsbgUKP5aRZhT6gWJ1zIDyU0C2tJwwxyXFof1Tw)!), we wanted to take a moment to share some of our favorite moments from the campaign so far with you:

* Tom announced his campaign as a pragmatic progressive – and has earned the endorsements of Brand New Congress, Our Revolution, Congressman Ro Khanna, and more.
* Tom has been the leading Democrat in this primary exposing Ryan Zinke for his corruption – including uncovering that his “residence” in Montana is actually a hotel in a viral social media video.
* Tom also led on key issues impacting our community – like the Op-Ed he penned in _The Missoulian_ after the Russian invasion of Ukraine showing how we can start stabilizing our climate and stop rewarding bloodthirsty dictators by building up Montana’s energy independence.
* And what I’m most proud of: Tom and I have traveled the district relentlessly to meet voters where they’re at and listen to their hopes – and fears – for the future. And Tom has over 10,000 new miles on his truck to prove it.

**[These are just some of the highlights of our campaign. But as we reflect, we must look forward to what’s ahead. This primary will be decided in just a few days, and we still need to raise $1,477 to reach our FINAL fundraising goal. Can you rush a donation right away?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzKJRBFYnnGuurjHNF501U9NIW8wL-3T4jNirG9BHycCNkPg71O6p3X0bzyK0fOy682FBIzOYDxPoyB9BBo2K-Coc3xGel5oGaoGB9QcPLHMrAhNJIpJV3qnU7cWd5SHJa68nBnQe1UUU48FExn0Vhh0ZNt_j3ckuAJnMRqRoG5USl3ZdDQgCoNHpbmMZhZ5e1aZs5pgjLgglAM-zBh423ySuIBCb_n4n3oWxu36-IH8LT7C2ViwY-9U5K92-LhtSM4mI-Ej0sjyx4vJIMazrWwwmHkc3DdA3inV01RbMrgAG4bCfBtaM2In2tJSy1Txc/3ml/PnfwYNrsRJWa7UaZKAm89g/h2/U-b_x8N2GPTP97pJ9pYfhwI_OKc6tWwU7gFa_v7wGcc)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: It’s official. Dr. Oz won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let me just say that I ACTUALLY LIVE IN PENNSYLVANIA!
#
Derek,
Did anyone predict that a quack celebrity TV doctor was going to run for U.S. Senate in 2022?
You know, I wouldn't believe you if you said you did. But here we are.
**Dr. Oz is now the *official* Republican nominee for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania. 👇👇👇**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220603-2?refcode=em20220603-6093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6093_434096_Sf8kMK&akid=6093%2E434096%2ESf8kMK)
[**_Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign right now? We need ALL the online support possible now that Dr. Oz is officially our Republican nominee in the #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate Seat of 2022._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220603-2?refcode=em20220603-6093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6093_434096_Sf8kMK&akid=6093%2E434096%2ESf8kMK)
There are a lot of BAD things about Dr. Oz.
He’s a self-funded multi-millionaire. He’s a fraudster who made a fortune by lying to people on TV. He called Roe v. Wade “wrong” + supports an extreme total ban on abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest.
**And look, Derek, I never thought this would be a flex, but <checks notes>**
**I ACTUALLY LIVE IN PENNSYLVANIA!!!**
[**_Now that we know we’re running against Dr. Oz, can you make a $5 contribution (or more if you can swing it) to help us flip this seat blue? This race is going to be incredibly expensive, and it’s critical that we keep up with Dr. Oz’s spending._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220603-2?refcode=em20220603-6093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6093_434096_Sf8kMK&akid=6093%2E434096%2ESf8kMK)
